url('./videos/locations/backyard.jpg')"></div><div class="location-card-content"><span class="location-card-name">Backyard</span><div class="location-card-indicators"><<if setup.locationHasNewCanvases("3a290390-be56-4bec-8d72-3d495b5bd431")>><span class="nav-new-badge">NEW</span><</if>><<if setup.locationHasNewUnlockedChoices("3a290390-be56-4bec-8d72-3d495b5bd431")>><span class="nav-unlocked-badge">🔓</span><</if>><<for _npc range setup.getNpcsWithCanvasesAtLocation("3a290390-be56-4bec-8d72-3d495b5bd431")>><<if _npc.portrait>><img @src="'./videos/' + _npc.portrait" class="nav-npc-badge" @alt="_npc.name"><</if>><</for>></div></div></a></div><</nobr>> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Exit The Harmon Property->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "944b9a14-21ad-44bb-97b5-78d04af46147">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("944b9a14-21ad-44bb-97b5-78d04af46147")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("944b9a14-21ad-44bb-97b5-78d04af46147")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("944b9a14-21ad-44bb-97b5-78d04af46147")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Kitchen</h2> <p>The social hub. Butcher-block counters stained by decades of meals. A table that seats four but has five chairs — <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> added one when Lily arrived. The coffee maker starts at 5 AM. The window above the sink faces the backyard. At dinner, all three men are here. At 2 AM, it's just <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> with a whiskey and the refrigerator light.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("944b9a14-21ad-44bb-97b5-78d04af46147")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("944b9a14-21ad-44bb-97b5-78d04af46147")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Kitchen->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "e348fd01-c353-4230-bec6-a25635c1ee6b">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("e348fd01-c353-4230-bec6-a25635c1ee6b")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("e348fd01-c353-4230-bec6-a25635c1ee6b")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("e348fd01-c353-4230-bec6-a25635c1ee6b")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Living Room</h2> <p>Worn leather couch that fits three if nobody cares about personal space. A TV on a stand older than <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>. Bookshelves with more tools than books. A window seat where Lily reads when the couch is occupied. At night, the TV fills the room with blue light and whoever's watching sits in the glow.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("e348fd01-c353-4230-bec6-a25635c1ee6b")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("e348fd01-c353-4230-bec6-a25635c1ee6b")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Living Room->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "9a2ba072-6baf-4cdd-b9a7-5f16e5f179ab">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("9a2ba072-6baf-4cdd-b9a7-5f16e5f179ab")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("9a2ba072-6baf-4cdd-b9a7-5f16e5f179ab")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("9a2ba072-6baf-4cdd-b9a7-5f16e5f179ab")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Shared Bathroom</h2> <p>One bathroom for four people. The door lock is a hook-latch that doesn't always catch. Steam lingers for twenty minutes after a shower. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s towel is always on the floor. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s razor is by the sink. The mirror is directly across from the door — whoever walks in sees everything reflected.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("9a2ba072-6baf-4cdd-b9a7-5f16e5f179ab")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("9a2ba072-6baf-4cdd-b9a7-5f16e5f179ab")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Shared Bathroom->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "d4404aff-a4e9-4a50-9cd6-fea4a23ec785">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("d4404aff-a4e9-4a50-9cd6-fea4a23ec785")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("d4404aff-a4e9-4a50-9cd6-fea4a23ec785")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("d4404aff-a4e9-4a50-9cd6-fea4a23ec785")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Frank's Office</h2> <p>The only room in the house with a lock that works. A heavy desk covered in invoices, a filing cabinet, a desk lamp that casts the room in amber. Smells like leather and old paper. The chair behind the desk is <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s throne. The chair in front is where Lily sits for bookkeeping. When the door closes, the rest of the house disappears.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("d4404aff-a4e9-4a50-9cd6-fea4a23ec785")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("d4404aff-a4e9-4a50-9cd6-fea4a23ec785")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Frank's Office->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "f362bf6d-43e0-4bfa-8253-3858eb3e987c">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("f362bf6d-43e0-4bfa-8253-3858eb3e987c")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("f362bf6d-43e0-4bfa-8253-3858eb3e987c")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("f362bf6d-43e0-4bfa-8253-3858eb3e987c")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Lily's Room</h2> <p>A single bed, a desk for homework, a closet too small for the wardrobe she's accumulating. The window faces the backyard — she can see the creek from here. The wall to her left is shared with <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s room. At night, sound carries: pencil scratching paper, music through earbuds, the creak of a bedframe.</p> [[Change Clothes->WardrobePage]]<br> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("f362bf6d-43e0-4bfa-8253-3858eb3e987c")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("f362bf6d-43e0-4bfa-8253-3858eb3e987c")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Lily's Room->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "5baf18c9-b87a-467f-83f7-1ecce21d1939">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("5baf18c9-b87a-467f-83f7-1ecce21d1939")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("5baf18c9-b87a-467f-83f7-1ecce21d1939")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("5baf18c9-b87a-467f-83f7-1ecce21d1939")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Jake's Room</h2> <p>Art everywhere. Sketches pinned to the walls — landscapes, hands, the creek at different times of day. A desk buried under charcoal sticks and eraser shavings. The light is good in the afternoon — curtains open for natural light. The wall to his right is shared with Lily's room. His door is often cracked open.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("5baf18c9-b87a-467f-83f7-1ecce21d1939")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("5baf18c9-b87a-467f-83f7-1ecce21d1939")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Jake's Room->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "0d474909-c2fb-4869-8e4e-b281d065e7a9">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("0d474909-c2fb-4869-8e4e-b281d065e7a9")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("0d474909-c2fb-4869-8e4e-b281d065e7a9")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("0d474909-c2fb-4869-8e4e-b281d065e7a9")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Workshop</h2> <p>Detached from the main house, connected by a gravel path. Table saw, hand tools on pegboard, sawhorses, the smell of cut wood and motor oil. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s weights are in the corner — a bench press and dumbbells. This is where <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> starts his day at 5 AM and where the business runs.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("0d474909-c2fb-4869-8e4e-b281d065e7a9")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("0d474909-c2fb-4869-8e4e-b281d065e7a9")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Workshop->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><!-- Container with default entry: Auto-redirect --> <<goto "Location_Yard">><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "d0f86997-5499-4b18-946c-a1bb50151228">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("d0f86997-5499-4b18-946c-a1bb50151228")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("d0f86997-5499-4b18-946c-a1bb50151228")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("d0f86997-5499-4b18-946c-a1bb50151228")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Yard</h2> <p>The cleared area behind the house. Flat enough to jog loops. A clothesline running east-west. A bench by the garden where <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> sits on Sunday mornings. Sunbathing here means being visible from the kitchen window, <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s window, and the workshop.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("d0f86997-5499-4b18-946c-a1bb50151228")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("d0f86997-5499-4b18-946c-a1bb50151228")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Exit Backyard->Location_Hallway]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "78fcf80e-cf74-45d4-b1d7-117accdb8432">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("78fcf80e-cf74-45d4-b1d7-117accdb8432")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("78fcf80e-cf74-45d4-b1d7-117accdb8432")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("78fcf80e-cf74-45d4-b1d7-117accdb8432")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Creek</h2> <p>Fifteen minutes through trees from the house. Shallow enough to wade, deep enough at the bend to swim. Smooth rocks, overhanging branches, dappled light. Far enough that voices don't carry, close enough that anyone could walk down.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("78fcf80e-cf74-45d4-b1d7-117accdb8432")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("78fcf80e-cf74-45d4-b1d7-117accdb8432")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Creek->Location_Yard]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "a10836bd-f734-44fa-84cc-dac4f22e663d">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("a10836bd-f734-44fa-84cc-dac4f22e663d")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("a10836bd-f734-44fa-84cc-dac4f22e663d")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("a10836bd-f734-44fa-84cc-dac4f22e663d")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Ryan's Truck</h2> <p>A dented pickup that runs louder than it should. The cab smells like pine air freshener and whatever <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> wore to the job site. Bench seat — no center console. The radio plays classic rock too loud. He drives with one hand on the wheel and the other on the gear shift, uncomfortably close to her knee.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("a10836bd-f734-44fa-84cc-dac4f22e663d")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("a10836bd-f734-44fa-84cc-dac4f22e663d")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Ryan's Truck->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "b07c1426-72de-485a-a1ee-428fe7760687">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("b07c1426-72de-485a-a1ee-428fe7760687")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("b07c1426-72de-485a-a1ee-428fe7760687")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("b07c1426-72de-485a-a1ee-428fe7760687")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Town</h2> <p>Forty minutes by bus, fifteen in <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s truck. A small college town with a main street, a campus, and not much else. If Lily takes the bus, nobody knows she was here. If <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> drives, he knows everything. The price of independence is always $2.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("b07c1426-72de-485a-a1ee-428fe7760687")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("b07c1426-72de-485a-a1ee-428fe7760687")>> <div style="background-image: url('./videos/locations/property.jpg')"></div><div class="location-card-content"><span class="location-card-name">The Harmon Property</span><div @alt="_npc.name"><</if>><</for>></div></div></a></div><</nobr>> </div> <</if>><!-- Container with default entry: Auto-redirect --> <<goto "Location_Library">><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "54195c1c-cc72-4103-80ec-a945666dde12">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("54195c1c-cc72-4103-80ec-a945666dde12")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("54195c1c-cc72-4103-80ec-a945666dde12")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("54195c1c-cc72-4103-80ec-a945666dde12")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Library</h2> <p>Basement of the humanities building. Low ceilings, fluorescent lights, the smell of old paper. Study carrels along the walls, group tables in the middle. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> comes here on afternoons when his class lets out early. The carrels are semi-private — close enough to whisper, close enough to touch under the divider.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("54195c1c-cc72-4103-80ec-a945666dde12")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("54195c1c-cc72-4103-80ec-a945666dde12")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Exit Campus->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "a7921e05-7108-44cf-8d56-4455dffc3aa3">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("a7921e05-7108-44cf-8d56-4455dffc3aa3")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("a7921e05-7108-44cf-8d56-4455dffc3aa3")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("a7921e05-7108-44cf-8d56-4455dffc3aa3")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Clothing Store</h2> <p>A boutique on main street — farm-practical to surprisingly fashionable. The owner doesn't judge what you buy but remembers everything. Two dressing rooms with curtains that don't fully close. If <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> drove, he's outside watching the bags.</p> [[Browse Clothes->ShopPage]]<br> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("a7921e05-7108-44cf-8d56-4455dffc3aa3")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("a7921e05-7108-44cf-8d56-4455dffc3aa3")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Clothing Store->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "03553785-3d45-40aa-989a-fa10674ff0be">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("03553785-3d45-40aa-989a-fa10674ff0be")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("03553785-3d45-40aa-989a-fa10674ff0be")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("03553785-3d45-40aa-989a-fa10674ff0be")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>General Store</h2> <p>Narrow aisles, everything from groceries to art supplies to phone cards. The cashier knows every face in the county. Art supplies in the back — Lily's monthly expense she can't skip.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("03553785-3d45-40aa-989a-fa10674ff0be")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("03553785-3d45-40aa-989a-fa10674ff0be")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave General Store->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "be94f861-37a0-4757-a4c4-32ebcc70c21c">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("be94f861-37a0-4757-a4c4-32ebcc70c21c")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("be94f861-37a0-4757-a4c4-32ebcc70c21c")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("be94f861-37a0-4757-a4c4-32ebcc70c21c")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Gym</h2> <p>Old equipment that works fine. Free weights, treadmills, a bench press that <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> treats like a personal altar. A shared hallway between locker rooms. Bodies are unavoidable. Sweat is unavoidable.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("be94f861-37a0-4757-a4c4-32ebcc70c21c")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("be94f861-37a0-4757-a4c4-32ebcc70c21c")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Gym->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "cee01bcd-5e7b-4890-9f72-9c71632b82a1">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("cee01bcd-5e7b-4890-9f72-9c71632b82a1")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("cee01bcd-5e7b-4890-9f72-9c71632b82a1")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("cee01bcd-5e7b-4890-9f72-9c71632b82a1")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Park</h2> <p>Jogging trail, benches, a pond with ducks nobody feeds. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> comes here on weekends to sketch the water. Neutral territory — not the property, not <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s turf, not <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s domain.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("cee01bcd-5e7b-4890-9f72-9c71632b82a1")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("cee01bcd-5e7b-4890-9f72-9c71632b82a1")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Park->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "87d32676-8384-4c83-b745-712ef6abfc5d">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("87d32676-8384-4c83-b745-712ef6abfc5d")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("87d32676-8384-4c83-b745-712ef6abfc5d")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("87d32676-8384-4c83-b745-712ef6abfc5d")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Diner</h2> <p>Vinyl booths, laminate tables, coffee that's been sitting too long. A bell on the door. The owner is always hiring because the pay is bad. $45 a shift if she's willing to skip dinner at home.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("87d32676-8384-4c83-b745-712ef6abfc5d")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("87d32676-8384-4c83-b745-712ef6abfc5d")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Diner->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><!-- Container with default entry: Auto-redirect --> <<goto "Location_Rest_Stop">><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "a362490c-a044-4fc5-af41-b00d268be8a4">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("a362490c-a044-4fc5-af41-b00d268be8a4")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("a362490c-a044-4fc5-af41-b00d268be8a4")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("a362490c-a044-4fc5-af41-b00d268be8a4")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Rest Stop</h2> <p>A flat area with a picnic table and a valley view. The table fits four. Seating arrangement matters — across from someone is safe, next to someone is proximity. Things said at altitude feel more real.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("a362490c-a044-4fc5-af41-b00d268be8a4")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("a362490c-a044-4fc5-af41-b00d268be8a4")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Exit Trail Head->Location_Town]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>><<nobr>> <<set $player.current_location = "1d98fff0-f0ef-42a9-ad91-d7d0dc500ce5">> <<if not $game_state.visited_locations.includes("1d98fff0-f0ef-42a9-ad91-d7d0dc500ce5")>> <<set $game_state.visited_locations.push("1d98fff0-f0ef-42a9-ad91-d7d0dc500ce5")>> <</if>> <</nobr>><<set _autoFire = setup.getStoryCanvasRedirect("1d98fff0-f0ef-42a9-ad91-d7d0dc500ce5")>><<if _autoFire>><<goto _autoFire>><<else>><h2>Isolated Creek</h2> <p>A swimming spot deeper in the trail, off the main path. Cold water, bigger rocks, more privacy than the property creek. Far enough that voices don't carry. Close enough that someone could walk up unannounced.</p> <<= setup.renderNpcPortraits("1d98fff0-f0ef-42a9-ad91-d7d0dc500ce5")>> <<= setup.renderSoloActivities("1d98fff0-f0ef-42a9-ad91-d7d0dc500ce5")>> <div class="location-navigation"> <div class="location-nav-exits"> [[Leave Isolated Creek->Location_Rest_Stop]]<br> </div> </div> <</if>> <!-- STORY CANVAS PASSAGES --><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Buy Groceries <span style="opacity:0.7;">(utility_buy_groceries)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The General Store</div> <p>General store. Fluorescent lights, linoleum floors. The kind of place that sells everything and specializes in nothing.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/utility_buy_groceries.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=general+store+grocery+aisle+fluorescent&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_buy_groceries.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 general store grocery aisle fluorescent</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=small+store+grocery+aisle+shopping&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_buy_groceries.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 small store grocery aisle shopping</a></div></div><p>She grabs a basket. Eggs, bread, pasta, chicken, vegetables. The basics.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "6ee601b7-3fea-452d-84f8-e42a7e415a00">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "305b17e1-a81b-4f94-9ac4-3ae568727da1">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("6ee601b7-3fea-452d-84f8-e42a7e415a00");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("utility_buy_groceries.base") === -1) { vn.push("utility_buy_groceries.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "money", "operator": "gte", "value": 15}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('6ee601b7-3fea-452d-84f8-e42a7e415a00:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Buy groceries ($15)" "Location_General_Store">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", -15.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.addItem("groceries", 5);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("6ee601b7-3fea-452d-84f8-e42a7e415a00:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<link "Just browsing." "Location_General_Store">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Gym Pass <span style="opacity:0.7;">(utility_buy_gym_pass)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Front Desk</div> <p>Gym front desk. A signup sheet and a bored attendant.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/utility_buy_gym_pass.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=gym+front+desk+signup+counter&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_buy_gym_pass.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 gym front desk signup counter</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=gym+reception+desk+signup+attendant&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_buy_gym_pass.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 gym reception desk signup attendant</a></div></div><p>$30 for a 30-day pass. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is already at the bench press — he raises an eyebrow when he sees her at the counter.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "36af37f6-06c4-49e1-9b2a-ffd5d9300d07">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "3a92222f-5d28-4fb4-97d0-1f64da0275cd">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("36af37f6-06c4-49e1-9b2a-ffd5d9300d07");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("utility_buy_gym_pass.base") === -1) { vn.push("utility_buy_gym_pass.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "money", "operator": "gte", "value": 30}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('36af37f6-06c4-49e1-9b2a-ffd5d9300d07:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Pay $30. Get the pass." "Location_Gym">><<script>>setup.purchasePass("gym_pass");<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("36af37f6-06c4-49e1-9b2a-ffd5d9300d07:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<link "Not today." "Location_Gym">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Art Supplies <span style="opacity:0.7;">(utility_buy_art_supplies)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Back Aisle</div> <p>General store. Art supplies in the back — charcoal sticks, heavyweight paper, blending stumps. The good stuff <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> uses.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/utility_buy_art_supplies.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=general+store+art+supplies+aisle&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_buy_art_supplies.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 general store art supplies aisle</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=store+aisle+art+supplies+charcoal+pencils&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_buy_art_supplies.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 store aisle art supplies charcoal pencils</a></div></div><p>$60. She can feel the number in her stomach. But campus assignments need materials. And <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s face when she brings her own sketchbook...</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a85649cf-9683-489f-8a4e-d478f4daee89">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c6479371-c39f-4b13-b4ad-0dbe93e84094">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("a85649cf-9683-489f-8a4e-d478f4daee89");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("utility_buy_art_supplies.base") === -1) { vn.push("utility_buy_art_supplies.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Buy them. $60." "Location_General_Store">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", -60.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "has_art_supplies");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Not today." "Location_General_Store">><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 20}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("bcaac848-0a25-499f-a0ce-8363e0c27203");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Workshop Help <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_workshop_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Workshop</div> <p>Workshop. Sawdust, tool pegboard, the hum of the compressor. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is building something. He could use an extra pair of hands.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_workshop_frank.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=workshop+sawdust+tools+construction+older+man+working+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_workshop_frank.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 workshop sawdust tools construction older man working morning</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "bcaac848-0a25-499f-a0ce-8363e0c27203">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b6c58119-ef85-4ab0-bb7b-17206c793803">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("bcaac848-0a25-499f-a0ce-8363e0c27203");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_workshop_frank.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_workshop_frank.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Help without being asked." "Location_Workshop">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "intelligence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(150);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"What do you need?\"" "Location_Workshop">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "intelligence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(150);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_frank", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 15}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('bcaac848-0a25-499f-a0ce-8363e0c27203:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Work in silence together." "Location_Workshop">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("bcaac848-0a25-499f-a0ce-8363e0c27203:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(150);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>> <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Workshop]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 10}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("ffce277f-b3a1-4e8d-b3cb-eac317171280");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Late-Night Kitchen <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_late_night_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> 2 AM</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_tease", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_wine_night", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>The short sleep shirt. She heard his floorboard creak — she knows he's down here. She doesn't put on pants. When she pours water, she leans against the counter. The shirt rides up at the back. She doesn't fix it.</p> <</if>><p>Kitchen. Past midnight. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> at the table. Whiskey. Lamp light. The glass across from him is already poured.</p><p><em>He knew I'd come down.</em></p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "chose_confront_frank", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>He talks about the business. The real numbers. Not the ones in the clean ledger — the ones she found.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "chose_confront_frank", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>He talks about the house. Diana. How quiet it gets at 2 AM when you're the only one awake. Except tonight he's not alone.</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ffce277f-b3a1-4e8d-b3cb-eac317171280">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b6a4f0bf-59e5-4095-aaab-a268f90709b9">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("ffce277f-b3a1-4e8d-b3cb-eac317171280");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_late_night_frank.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_late_night_frank.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Listen. Let him fill the silence." He doesn't pull away. Her pinkie traces his knuckle.</p><p>She leans across the table. The whiskey glass tips. Neither catches it.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_late_night_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=older+man+younger+woman+kiss+kitchen+table+night+whiskey+intimate&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_late_night_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 older man younger woman kiss kitchen table night whiskey intimate</a></div></div><p>He tastes like whiskey and something underneath — the taste of a man who's been sitting alone at 2 AM for months. His hand finally moves. Finds her jaw. Holds it like he's been wanting to for weeks.</p><p>The kitchen clock ticks. Upstairs, nothing moves. The house sleeps while they don't.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ffce277f-b3a1-4e8d-b3cb-eac317171280">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b535c0cd-59a2-4e8f-a156-76f93a14da76">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_late_night_frank.whiskey_kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_late_night_frank.whiskey_kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Good night, Frank.\" Leave him wanting." Under the kitchen table. The wood is cold against her knees.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> looks down. His face — disbelief, then something darker. His hand finds the edge of the table. Grips.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_late_night_handjob.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=intimate+kitchen+table+night+older+man+forbidden&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_late_night_handjob.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 intimate kitchen table night older man forbidden</a></div></div><p>She finds him. Already hard. He won't make a sound — the boys are upstairs. His breathing comes through his nose, measured, controlled. His knuckles on the table are white.</p><p>The whiskey glass trembles. His whole body trembles. He finishes without a word. Just his eyes closing.</p><p>She climbs back into her chair. Picks up her glass. Drinks like nothing happened.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> You should go to bed.</div></div><p>He means it this time. Closer than she needs to be. Her arm brushes his. He goes still. She takes her time pulling back.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_tease", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_wine_night", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>No bra under the tank top. She says it from behind him. Two words. He freezes.</p><p>She turns him by the shoulder. The spatula clatters on the counter. His mouth tastes like the sauce he was testing — garlic, wine, something bitter underneath.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_cooking_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=older+man+younger+woman+kiss+kitchen+cooking+domestic+forbidden&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_cooking_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 older man younger woman kiss kitchen cooking domestic forbidden</a></div></div><p>The kiss lasts three seconds. Butcher block. His back against the edge. Her hand finds him through the apron.</p><p>His grip tightens on the counter behind him. His breathing stays measured — counted — even as his hips betray him.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_cooking_counter.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+intimate+kitchen+counter+domestic+forbidden+passionate&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_cooking_counter.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple intimate kitchen counter domestic forbidden passionate</a></div></div><p>The stove hisses. Something is actually burning now. Neither of them moves to fix it.</p><p>When it's over, he straightens his shirt. Turns back to the stove. Fixes the sauce.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Dinner in five.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "36175b45-d4e7-40d3-852b-a57df4ffdf89">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "5885c3ec-8a4a-4a3a-b114-310ae6f79149">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_cooking_frank.counter") === -1) { vn.push("activity_cooking_frank.counter"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Set the table. He looks down first. She doesn't.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_tease", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_wine_night", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>Skirt today. She crosses her legs. Uncrosses them. He loses his place in the receivables. Goes back two lines. She doesn't help him find it.</p> <</if>><p>Office. Invoices, receipts, the amber desk lamp. Leather and old paper.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_frank", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "lte", "value": 15}]})>> <p>Door stays open. He checks her work. Two chairs, maximum distance.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_frank", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 16}]})>> <p>The door closes. 'We can focus better this way.' The click of the lock. '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Move higher." "Canvas_activity_bookkeeping_frank_Node_4">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("fc6b31d9-be19-4bb9-8dab-e69904a90891:cc2");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>> <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Frank's_Office]] <</if>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Bookkeeping <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_bookkeeping_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Charged Silence</div> <p>She puts down the pen. Looks at him. Doesn't say anything.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is writing in the ledger. He feels her looking. His pen slows. Stops.</p><p>The clock ticks. The ledger page is still open to receivables but nobody is reading numbers anymore.</p><p>Coffee. His. Black. Getting cold.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "fc6b31d9-be19-4bb9-8dab-e69904a90891">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "49a51fdf-fc6c-451b-9cd6-bb28e0eb006c">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_bookkeeping_frank.silence") === -1) { vn.push("activity_bookkeeping_frank.silence"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Say what you mean, Frank.\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Pick up the pen. Get back to work." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Bookkeeping <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_bookkeeping_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Ledger Excuse</div> <p>She reaches past him for the ledger. Her arm crosses his chest. Their faces six inches apart.</p><p>He doesn't move. His jaw tightens. The pen in his hand hasn't moved in three minutes.</p><p>She closes the gap. The kiss is fast — his mouth tastes like black coffee and restraint. His hand grips the edge of the desk. Not her. The desk.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_bookkeeping_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=older+man+younger+woman+kiss+office+desk+professional+forbidden&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_bookkeeping_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 older man younger woman kiss office desk professional forbidden</a></div></div><p>He pulls back. Eyes closed for one second. Opens them.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Page forty-two.</div></div><p>Like nothing happened. Except his hand is shaking.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "fc6b31d9-be19-4bb9-8dab-e69904a90891">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "96ffa168-a3fc-422b-a04d-bd692ca59cab">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_bookkeeping_frank.office_kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_bookkeeping_frank.office_kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Go back to the numbers." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Bookkeeping <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_bookkeeping_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Below the Ledger</div> <p>Under the desk. The ledger is still open. His hand grips the edge of the oak — knuckles white.</p><p>She found him. Through the fabric first, then the zipper. He didn't stop her. That's how she knows the dam broke.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_bookkeeping_handjob.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=office+desk+intimate+older+man+younger+woman+forbidden+professional&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_bookkeeping_handjob.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 office desk intimate older man younger woman forbidden professional</a></div></div><p>He's thick. Warm. His jaw clenches — he won't make a sound. Control, even now. She strokes him slowly. His breathing changes — measured, deliberate, like he's counting.</p><p>The pen in his other hand hasn't moved in three minutes.</p><p>When he finishes, his eyes close. Just for a moment. Then he opens them. Looks at her. Says nothing.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Page forty-two.</div></div><p><em>She's never felt more powerful in her life.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "fc6b31d9-be19-4bb9-8dab-e69904a90891">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "d535a906-0cc9-47bd-887e-c14441823c19">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_bookkeeping_frank.under_desk") === -1) { vn.push("activity_bookkeeping_frank.under_desk"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pick up the pen." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 15}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("eaefd5e0-b5d1-4378-adcc-0ef8a5f71f6a");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Creek Swimming (Ryan) <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_creek_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Race</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_leaving_confirmed", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_stayed", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>He doesn't race today. Floats on his back. Looks at the sky. 'I'm gonna miss this creek.'</p> <</if>><p>Creek. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> strips his shirt. 'Last one in's a coward.'</p><p>He's already running. Splash. Cold water. She can hear his laugh bouncing off the trees.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_creek_ryan.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+creek+swimming+competitive+splashing+nature+summer&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_creek_ryan.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple creek swimming competitive splashing nature summer</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "eaefd5e0-b5d1-4378-adcc-0ef8a5f71f6a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "5381daab-fbf0-4c7e-b264-2eeb35599fce">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("eaefd5e0-b5d1-4378-adcc-0ef8a5f71f6a");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_creek_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_creek_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "fitness", "operator": "gte", "value": 35}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('eaefd5e0-b5d1-4378-adcc-0ef8a5f71f6a:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"Raise: loser tells a secret.\"" "Location_Creek">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("eaefd5e0-b5d1-4378-adcc-0ef8a5f71f6a:cc1");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>> <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Creek]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 15}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("704093db-5a15-4310-906a-df24a41e5ef7");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Job Site <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_job_site)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Work</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_secret_discovered", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>He works faster. Cleaner. Not for <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> — for himself. Every dollar is one step closer to the truck being packed.</p> <</if>><p>Workshop. Sawdust and motor oil. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> puts her to work — holding boards, sorting nails, sweeping.</p><p>A heavy board needs moving. He could do it alone.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_job_site.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=workshop+lumber+physical+work+man+woman+helping+construction&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_job_site.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 workshop lumber physical work man woman helping construction</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "704093db-5a15-4310-906a-df24a41e5ef7">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "af85086f-d3d6-4257-b860-847c64e1fa28">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("704093db-5a15-4310-906a-df24a41e5ef7");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_job_site.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_job_site.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "fitness", "operator": "gte", "value": 20}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('704093db-5a15-4310-906a-df24a41e5ef7:cc0') ? Their legs almost touching. The TV is background noise.</p><p>He doesn't look at her. But his leg shifts. Closes the gap by an inch.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f3dc342d-ba92-49ef-9406-b4ee718a29e6">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "46f195eb-2eb2-4a96-91bb-eb0cfe087ad5">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_tv_couch.close") === -1) { vn.push("activity_tv_couch.close"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Let her knee touch his." Comfortable silence." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> TV on the Couch <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_tv_couch)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Blue Light</div> <p>The TV casts blue light across his face. She leans across the cushion gap. His eyes widen for half a second — then he meets her halfway.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_tv_couch_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+kissing+couch+TV+blue+light+living+room+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_tv_couch_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple kissing couch TV blue light living room evening</a></div></div><p>His hand finds the back of her neck. The TV plays to an empty audience.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f3dc342d-ba92-49ef-9406-b4ee718a29e6">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "2d37471b-c350-47d8-bf03-6d293702f819">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_tv_couch.couch_kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_tv_couch.couch_kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pull back before someone walks in." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> TV on the Couch <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_tv_couch)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Under Cover</div> <p>The throw blanket from the arm of the couch. She drapes it over their laps. His eyebrows go up. Then the grin.</p><p>Her hand finds him under the blanket. The TV is loud enough to cover the sound of his breathing. Barely.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_tv_couch_blanket.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+couch+blanket+intimate+evening+living+room+secret&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_tv_couch_blanket.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple couch blanket intimate evening living room secret</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> could walk through at any moment. If I win, you buy protein shakes.\"" "Location_Gym">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a:cc2");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Gym Workout <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_gym_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Hands Close</div> <p>She spots him. He spots her. Hands near each other's bodies — functional, necessary. Professional.</p><p>His fingers brush her ribcage adjusting her grip. Neither acknowledges it.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "915aa16e-d421-49b9-9e2c-eab66b9ef907">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_gym_ryan.spotting") === -1) { vn.push("activity_gym_ryan.spotting"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Focus on form." Now.\"" "Canvas_activity_gym_ryan_Node_4">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a:cc4");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_handjob", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 20}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "fitness", "operator": "gte", "value": 35}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "corruption", "operator": "gte", "value": 85}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a:cc5') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"The shower.\"" "Canvas_activity_gym_ryan_Node_5">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a:cc5");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Gym Workout <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_gym_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Between Locker Rooms</div> <p>The hallway between locker rooms. Narrow. Fluorescent buzz overhead. Nobody here at this hour.</p><p>She grabs his tank top. Pulls. He lets himself be pulled — <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>, who never lets anyone pull him anywhere.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_gym_ryan_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+kissing+gym+hallway+athletic+sweaty+passionate&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_gym_ryan_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple kissing gym hallway athletic sweaty passionate</a></div></div><p>He tastes like sweat and protein powder. His hands grip her waist — not gentle, but not rough. Somewhere between workout and worship.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "7f26ee56-712e-44fa-8363-2b8614746564">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_gym_ryan.hallway_kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_gym_ryan.hallway_kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Anyone could walk in.\"" "Location_Gym">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Gym Workout <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_gym_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Hot Water</div> <p>The shower stall. Steam. The water is too hot and neither of them adjusts it.</p><p>His back against the tile. Her hand finds him through the water. He groans — the sound bounces off every surface in the empty locker room.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_gym_ryan_shower.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+intimate+shower+steam+athletic&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_gym_ryan_shower.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple intimate shower steam athletic</a></div></div><p>"If someone comes in—" She doesn't finish. He doesn't care.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2ba8ca04-1c98-46c0-9d32-0ce2b7ee8f6a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "da8360ee-866f-4122-9be3-bce25b19e4ff">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_gym_ryan.shower") === -1) { vn.push("activity_gym_ryan.shower"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Finish what she started." "Location_Gym">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 15}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Truck Ride <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_truck_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Truck</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_secret_discovered", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_leaving_confirmed", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>He takes the long way without explaining. The detours are getting longer. Neither of them mentions why.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_leaving_confirmed", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_stayed", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>Truck. He drives slower today. Like he's memorizing the roads. Every turn, every tree, every mile marker.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_stayed", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>Truck. He's smiling. Not the grin — the real one underneath. The roads feel different when you're not counting how many you have left.</p> <</if>><p>Pine air freshener and whatever <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> wore to the job site. The bench seat. No center console. The radio plays classic rock too loud.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_truck_ryan_base.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=pickup+truck+interior+bench+seat+rural+road+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_truck_ryan_base.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 pickup truck interior bench seat rural road morning</a></div></div><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_resisted", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>He turns the music up. Hands on the wheel. Ten and two. But he's looking at her mouth when he talks.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_allowed", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>His hand finds her knee before the driveway ends. Not testing now. Claiming. She doesn't move it.</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "fca41dde-a528-4520-9808-4d217b20d97b">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_truck_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_truck_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 12}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"Don't tell me to stop.\"" "Canvas_activity_truck_ryan_Node_5">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a:cc4");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>> <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Ryan's_Truck]] <</if>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Truck Ride <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_truck_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Nowhere</div> <p>No destination. He drives slow. The road unwinds through fields. Something's on his mind.</p><p>The radio is off. Wind through the open windows. She waits.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 18}]})>> <div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I didn't finish community college because I couldn't read fast enough. No joke after. Just the window down and the road.</div></div> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}]})>> <div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I don't want to go home yet.</div></div><p>The most vulnerable thing <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> has ever said.</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "344733e2-8ae4-4535-95df-b6b5a5757468">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_truck_ryan.ride_nowhere") === -1) { vn.push("activity_truck_ryan.ride_nowhere"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"You don't have to talk.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "trust", "operator": "gte", "value": 15}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a:cc5') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"Tell me about the scar. The real story.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a:cc5");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Truck Ride <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_truck_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Dare</div> <p>His grin snaps into place. He LOVES this.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> You're on. If I win, you owe me a beer.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "8fd66377-0f07-4ca6-805f-373796fbefc7">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_truck_ryan.challenge") === -1) { vn.push("activity_truck_ryan.challenge"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Name them. (Try to win.)"
