'' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"Raise: if I win, you tell me about the scar.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a:cc6");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Truck Ride <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_truck_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Gravel and Silence</div> <p>He pulls over. Gravel under tires. Engine off. The radio dies mid-song.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> C'mere.</div></div><p>One word. His hand behind her neck, pulling her across the bench seat. He tastes like mint gum and adrenaline. His stubble scrapes her chin.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_truck_ryan_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+kissing+pickup+truck+passionate+bench+seat&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_truck_ryan_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple kissing pickup truck passionate bench seat</a></div></div><p>She grabs his collar. The truck lurches — his foot slipped off the brake.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Took you long enough.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "aa0351e5-a565-4899-af43-ec1003b649b8">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_truck_ryan.kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_truck_ryan.kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I didn't do anything.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Kiss him harder." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Truck Ride <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_truck_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Gearshift</div> <p>Parked by the creek. Engine off. Windows fogged from the inside.</p><p>His hand is on the gearshift. Her hand covers his. Moves it. Higher.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Fuck.</div></div><p>One word. All breath. She grips him — firm, fast, no hesitation. His hand slams the truck ceiling.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_truck_ryan_handjob.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+intimate+truck+parked+foggy+windows&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_truck_ryan_handjob.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple intimate truck parked foggy windows</a></div></div><p>He finishes with a groan that fogs the windshield. Chest heaving. Then the grin comes back.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Your turn?</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "af413c41-ab6f-428f-9228-704fcd35dd8a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "88f91a76-ca65-43c7-b70c-4d0c8b19c506">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_truck_ryan.handjob") === -1) { vn.push("activity_truck_ryan.handjob"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Maybe next time.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Definitely.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 15}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("fd7a642e-8cc7-4dbe-9f11-bd33e02b2866");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Creek Swimming (Jake) <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_creek_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Water</div> <p>Creek. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> on the bank with his sketchbook. She wades in. The water is cold — her toes go numb, then her calves adjust.</p><p>He draws. She floats. The only sound is water over stones and the scratch of his pencil.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_creek_jake.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+swimming+creek+man+drawing+bank+nature+peaceful&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_creek_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman swimming creek man drawing bank nature peaceful</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "fd7a642e-8cc7-4dbe-9f11-bd33e02b2866">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "527e9f86-d7a9-477f-b7a1-c3e2ddbd73f1">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("fd7a642e-8cc7-4dbe-9f11-bd33e02b2866");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_creek_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_creek_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Float on her back. She sits next to him. Close enough to see the page.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_park_jake.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=park+bench+man+sketching+pond+nature&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_park_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 park bench man sketching pond nature</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+man+sketching+park+bench+pond+trees&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_park_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young man sketching park bench pond trees</a></div></div><p>Peaceful. Low ceilings, fluorescent buzz. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> at a study carrel, books spread open. He looks up when she sits down next to him.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_library_jake.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=library+basement+studying+couple+table+books&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_library_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 library basement studying couple table books</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+library+table+books+quiet+studying&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_library_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple library table books quiet studying</a></div></div><p>Side by side. Textbooks and sketchbooks. He explains composition theory — the rule of thirds, negative space, why Vermeer's light feels alive.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9dba8494-97db-4366-b32c-44bdec68bbb1">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "4e758b52-31b9-4dac-a33a-dfa81ccd4d1b">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("9dba8494-97db-4366-b32c-44bdec68bbb1");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_library_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_library_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Listen and learn." Through the wall: tap-tap. The familiar rhythm. Their ritual.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "709f5704-06dd-4f43-bccd-f0fd17e974ca">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_wall_knocking.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_wall_knocking.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Knock back." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", -1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>> <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Lily's_Room]] <</if>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Wall Knocking <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_wall_knocking)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Through the Wall</div> <p>She knocks back. Tap-tap.</p><p>Through the plaster: his voice, muffled. 'You up?'</p><p>They talk. About nothing. About everything. The wall between them makes honesty easier — no eye contact, no body language. Just voices and thin plaster.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "aefc0488-c5e0-4198-9a46-5ee4843ff069">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_wall_knocking.talking") === -1) { vn.push("activity_wall_knocking.talking"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Tell him about her day." '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"I wish this wall wasn't here.\"" "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462:cc1");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<link "\"Good night, Jake.\"" "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Wall Knocking <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_wall_knocking)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> His Room</div> <p>She opens his door. He looks up from the sketchbook. Not surprised — he was hoping.</p><p>The room smells like graphite and clean laundry. Desk lamp on. The walls covered in drawings she's seen a hundred times and one she hasn't.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "a3e5aa25-7a16-4888-97d3-4429f8ac5aac">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_wall_knocking.his_room") === -1) { vn.push("activity_wall_knocking.his_room"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit on the floor next to him." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "jake_kiss", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_jake", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 18}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "corruption", "operator": "gte", "value": 70}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462:cc2') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Kiss him." "Canvas_activity_wall_knocking_Node_4">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462:cc2");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "jake_pencil_dropped", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_jake", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "corruption", "operator": "gte", "value": 85}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462:cc3') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Pull him to the bed." "Canvas_activity_wall_knocking_Node_5">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462:cc3");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Wall Knocking <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_wall_knocking)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Through the Dark</div> <p>The desk lamp clicks off. The room goes dark except for the moonlight through the curtain.</p><p>She finds his face in the dark. His glasses are on the desk. Without them, his eyes are softer. Closer.</p><p>The kiss is different at night. Slower. No art between them. No excuse. Just mouths and the sound of breathing through the wall that used to separate them.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_wall_knocking_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+couple+kissing+dark+bedroom+night+moonlight+tender&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_wall_knocking_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young couple kissing dark bedroom night moonlight tender</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "ca2d485a-9f7c-4f74-90d3-d22f33c540f0">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_wall_knocking.night_kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_wall_knocking.night_kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Stay a little longer." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Good night, Jake.\" Go back through the wall." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Wall Knocking <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_wall_knocking)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Narrow Bed</div> <p>The bed is too narrow for two people. They make it work.</p><p>His hands are uncertain in the dark. She guides them. He makes a sound against her neck — quiet, like he's trying not to let it through the wall.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_wall_knocking_intimate.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+couple+intimate+narrow+bed+night+dark+tender+quiet&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_wall_knocking_intimate.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young couple intimate narrow bed night dark tender quiet</a></div></div><p><em>The wall is thin. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> might hear. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> might hear. The whole house might hear.</em></p><p><em>I don't care.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c396f42a-7909-41f3-9167-2b9054bb6462">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "bde2c8c6-9edd-40db-967d-465e045fe94a">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_wall_knocking.night_intimate") === -1) { vn.push("activity_wall_knocking.night_intimate"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Stay until his breathing slows." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 15}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Drawing Session <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_drawing_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Room</div> <p>Afternoon light through <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s window. Graphite and clean laundry. He's set up — sketchbook open, pencils arranged by grade.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_drawing_jake_base.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=artist+bedroom+afternoon+light+sketchbook+pencils+setup&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_drawing_jake_base.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 artist bedroom afternoon light sketchbook pencils setup</a></div></div><p>He looks up. The smile is automatic — his face decided before his brain caught up.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I was just— sit anywhere. The light's good today.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "1412ff60-52df-49ab-ad09-615b3c14172d">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_drawing_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("activity_drawing_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit down. Hold still." "Canvas_activity_drawing_jake_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I'll come back later.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>> <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Jake's_Room]] <</if>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Drawing Session <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_drawing_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Drawing</div> <p>The scratch of charcoal on paper. His hand moving with a certainty his voice never has.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_1_complete", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>He's sketching her hands. 'Hold still — the light on your knuckles.'</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_1_complete", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_2_complete", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>Portrait today. Her face. 'Turn your head slightly. There.'</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_2_complete", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_3_complete", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>Full figure. 'Can you stand near the window? The way the light falls on your—' He stops. Starts over. 'Just stand there.'</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_3_complete", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_4_complete", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>The pose is more intimate now. 'The strap is casting a shadow...' His voice is barely above a whisper.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_4_complete", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_5_complete", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>She's not wearing much. He draws without looking away. The pencil doesn't shake anymore.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Don't move. This is... you're perfect.</div></div> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "9d166e2c-d764-4817-9d65-38c47089ed8d">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_drawing_jake.session") === -1) { vn.push("activity_drawing_jake.session"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Ask about what he's drawing." Her hair brushes his neck. He goes very still.</p><p>The drawing. Her jawline. Her hands. Details she didn't know he'd noticed — the chip in her thumbnail, the freckle below her ear.</p><p><em>He sees things nobody else sees. Small things. True things.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "69c3d924-03da-492b-b959-1030c65632b9">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_drawing_jake.looking") === -1) { vn.push("activity_drawing_jake.looking"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"It's beautiful, Jake.\" Be specific." The pencil doesn't stop. Two words. He sets the pencil down like it weighs nothing and everything.</p><p>He crosses the room. His glasses bump her forehead — he pulls back, embarrassed — and she closes the gap.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_drawing_jake_kiss.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+couple+tender+kiss+bedroom+afternoon+gentle&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_drawing_jake_kiss.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young couple tender kiss bedroom afternoon gentle</a></div></div><p>His mouth is soft. He tastes like graphite and coffee he drinks too sweet. His hand finds her jaw, holds it like he's positioning a portrait. The sketchbook slides to the floor. Neither of them picks it up.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c8d3f54f-08e7-4a12-bb38-35ba0d676991">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_drawing_jake.kiss") === -1) { vn.push("activity_drawing_jake.kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pull him closer." Has been for twenty minutes. She knows why.</p><p>Her hand finds his. The pencil drops. She guides his hand — not to the sketchbook. He makes a sound. Small. Surprised. His glasses fog.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_drawing_jake_handjob.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+couple+intimate+bedroom+close+tender&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_drawing_jake_handjob.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young couple intimate bedroom close tender</a></div></div><p>She wraps her fingers around him. Gentle. He shakes.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> Is this okay?</div></div><p>He nods. Can't speak. She moves her hand. Slow. His hips lift off the chair without him deciding. The sketchbook slides to the floor.</p><p>He comes quietly — a shudder, his forehead against her shoulder. Kneels by his chair. His eyes go wide behind the glasses.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> You don't have to—</div></div><p>She does. His hand finds her hair — not pushing, not guiding. Just resting. Like he needs to hold something or he'll float away.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_drawing_jake_oral.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=intimate+couple+bedroom+kneeling+tender&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_drawing_jake_oral.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 intimate couple bedroom kneeling tender</a></div></div><p>His other hand grips the arm of the chair. Knuckles white. His breathing is the only sound in the room besides the clock.</p><p>When it's over, he pulls her up. Into the chair with him. It's not built for two but neither of them cares.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "e71e01ad-ca99-40bc-8206-23a2331c38c6">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_drawing_jake.oral") === -1) { vn.push("activity_drawing_jake.oral"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Stay in the chair with him." "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Drawing Session <span style="opacity:0.7;">(activity_drawing_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Drawing Can Wait</div> <p>The sketchbook is on the floor. The pencils are scattered. The afternoon light makes everything gold.</p><p>He undresses her slowly. Reverently. Like he's unwrapping something he's been drawing from memory for weeks. His hands shake but they know exactly where to go.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/activity_drawing_jake_sex.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+couple+intimate+bedroom+afternoon+undressing+tender&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Factivity_drawing_jake_sex.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young couple intimate bedroom afternoon undressing tender</a></div></div><p>She pulls him down to the narrow bed. It creaks — the wall is thin, <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s room is next door, and neither of them cares.</p><p>He's gentle. Careful. His forehead against hers, glasses abandoned on the desk. Every movement is slow, like he's memorizing it for later.</p><p>Afterward, he traces her collarbone with his fingertip. The same line he's drawn a hundred times. But this time, it's real.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I love you. I drew you again. I always draw you.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d937696-c982-451e-b31e-1be60931fc90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "e636f13b-9c88-4e48-b47b-abbd8a7ca89c">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("activity_drawing_jake.sex") === -1) { vn.push("activity_drawing_jake.sex"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I know.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 6.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(180);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 30}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("6d962c00-b71e-4613-9f72-1dbf6bad42e9");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Diner Shift <span style="opacity:0.7;">(utility_diner)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Shift</div> <p>Vinyl booths. Coffee that's been sitting too long. The bell on the door. Five hours on her feet.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/utility_diner.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=diner+shift+waitress+vinyl+booths+coffee&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_diner.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 diner shift waitress vinyl booths coffee</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+working+diner+waitress+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_diner.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman working diner waitress evening</a></div></div><p>She pours, she carries, she smiles. The tips are better when she smiles. The tips are better since she started caring about how she looks.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "beauty", "operator": "gte", "value": 40}]})>> <p>Good tips tonight. She's learned how to carry three plates. The regulars know her name.</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "6d962c00-b71e-4613-9f72-1dbf6bad42e9">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "ffe15ddd-3ac4-4bcd-b907-34a7a2e31909">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("6d962c00-b71e-4613-9f72-1dbf6bad42e9");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("utility_diner.base") === -1) { vn.push("utility_diner.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(300);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 45.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Shift's over.->Location_Diner]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Diner]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 20}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("61dea2c3-f306-4b84-9e48-216d0124300c");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> House Cleaning <span style="opacity:0.7;">(utility_cleaning)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Cleaning</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_tease", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_wine_night", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>Short shorts. Scrubbing the bottom step on her knees. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> walks through the hallway. His boots stop. Two seconds. Then they keep going. Faster.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/utility_cleaning.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+scrubbing+floor+hallway+cleaning+knees&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_cleaning.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman scrubbing floor hallway cleaning knees</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+cleaning+house+floor+hands+knees&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Futility_cleaning.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman cleaning house floor hands knees</a></div></div> <</if>><p>Mop. Scrub. Dust. The house is old and it shows — every surface collects something. Wood shavings from the workshop tracked through the hallway. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s boot prints. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s eraser shavings.</p><p>Three hours. Her back aches. But the $20 is guaranteed and it doesn't require anyone's permission or presence.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "61dea2c3-f306-4b84-9e48-216d0124300c">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b241bc4f-0767-41e3-8cc3-9a05ff43a9bf">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("61dea2c3-f306-4b84-9e48-216d0124300c");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("utility_cleaning.base") === -1) { vn.push("utility_cleaning.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(180);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 20.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Done. Collect pay.->Location_Hallway]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Hallway]] <</if>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Dinner <span style="opacity:0.7;">(meal_dinner)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Table</div> <p>Dinner. Five chairs at the table — <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> at the head, <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> and <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> on opposite sides, Lily between worlds.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/meal_dinner.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=family+dinner+table+kitchen+four+people+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fmeal_dinner.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 family dinner table kitchen four people evening</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=dinner+table+kitchen+multiple+people+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fmeal_dinner.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 dinner table kitchen multiple people evening</a></div></div><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_started", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> eats with earbuds in. His sketchbook is on the table next to his plate. He hasn't said a word to her since she arrived.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_leaving", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>Four chairs. Three people. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s seat faces the window. Nobody moves it.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "brothers_discover", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>The table is tense. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> and <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> don't look at each other. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> eats in silence. The only sound is forks on plates.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "brothers_discover", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> tells a story about the job site. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> laughs. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> shakes his head but almost smiles. Normal. The house pretending to be a family.</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "45d2c58c-2ca8-45f1-8bb0-f5dca4ded28a">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "ee2e1241-726e-4283-b7af-4626f9b8c45b">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("45d2c58c-2ca8-45f1-8bb0-f5dca4ded28a");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("meal_dinner.base") === -1) { vn.push("meal_dinner.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Eat with everyone."
