'' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link `"Sit next to " + $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name + "."` "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("45d2c58c-2ca8-45f1-8bb0-f5dca4ded28a:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<link `"Sit across from " + $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name + "."` "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_flirt", "operator": "is_true"}, {"type": "trait", "subject": "player", "trait_key": "corruption", "operator": "gte", "value": 40}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('45d2c58c-2ca8-45f1-8bb0-f5dca4ded28a:cc1') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link `"Sit across from " + $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name + ". Hold his gaze."` "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 25.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("45d2c58c-2ca8-45f1-8bb0-f5dca4ded28a:cc1");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Lunch <span style="opacity:0.7;">(meal_lunch)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Midday</div> <p>Sandwich. The kitchen is empty — everyone else is working or gone. Quiet. Just the fridge hum.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/meal_lunch.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=kitchen+sandwich+alone+quiet+fridge&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fmeal_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 kitchen sandwich alone quiet fridge</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+eating+kitchen+alone+afternoon&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fmeal_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman eating kitchen alone afternoon</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "8b325ed4-1e88-4278-96b5-6fa9ec27fccc">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b1f1089a-34a2-4c94-a641-19341d6180cf">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("8b325ed4-1e88-4278-96b5-6fa9ec27fccc");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("meal_lunch.base") === -1) { vn.push("meal_lunch.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 20.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Done.->Location_Kitchen]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Breakfast <span style="opacity:0.7;">(meal_breakfast)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Morning Table</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_started", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> doesn't look up. Sketchbook propped against the salt shaker. Pencil moving. Earbuds in. She might as well not be in the room.</p> <</if>><p>Kitchen. Coffee maker still hissing. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> at the head of the table, paper open. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> inhaling eggs.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/meal_breakfast.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=family+breakfast+kitchen+table+morning+coffee&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fmeal_breakfast.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 family breakfast kitchen table morning coffee</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "4a74e43f-8691-41e3-82e9-51a3b1936c59">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b409afbf-c31b-4378-92bc-4d2b9a653bbd">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("4a74e43f-8691-41e3-82e9-51a3b1936c59");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("meal_breakfast.base") === -1) { vn.push("meal_breakfast.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Eat quietly." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 15.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(45);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_started", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('4a74e43f-8691-41e3-82e9-51a3b1936c59:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link `"Talk to " + $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name + " about his drawing."` "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 15.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("4a74e43f-8691-41e3-82e9-51a3b1936c59:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(45);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<link `"Ask " + $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name + " about his plans today."` "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 15.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(45);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link `"Offer to pour " + $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name + "'s coffee."` "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "add", 15.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(45);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Sketchbook <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_jake_evening)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Cover-Up</div> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> on the floor by the couch, sketchbook on his knees, TV casting light he isn't watching. He's drawing something. When she walks in, his hand flips the page.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_jake_evening.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+man+floor+sketchbook+living+room+TV&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_evening.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young man floor sketchbook living room TV</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+drawing+sketchbook+living+room+floor+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_evening.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man drawing sketchbook living room floor night</a></div></div><p>Too slow. She caught a curve. A shoulder. Not a landscape.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a1a4c3e7-d249-417f-9090-1d274f8e4577">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "90e97020-96e2-4e4a-92f5-61388288953e">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("a1a4c3e7-d249-417f-9090-1d274f8e4577");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_jake_evening.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_jake_evening.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"What are you drawing?\"" "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Just passing through." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Ramen <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_jake_lunch)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Boiling Water</div> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> at the stove, reading the back of a ramen packet like it's literature. The water is already boiling over. He hasn't noticed.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_jake_lunch.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+man+stove+ramen+cooking+kitchen&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young man stove ramen cooking kitchen</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+cooking+ramen+kitchen+stove+reading&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man cooking ramen kitchen stove reading</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "59f59448-810a-4389-993e-9551af26ca84">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "11e412ef-f6b7-4dce-a198-4a238bae8f1c">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("59f59448-810a-4389-993e-9551af26ca84");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_jake_lunch.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_jake_lunch.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Want help?\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(20);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Leave him to it." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Soggy Cereal <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_jake_breakfast)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Napkin</div> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> at the table. Earbuds in, cereal getting soggy, drawing on a napkin with a stub of pencil. He doesn't look up when she enters.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_jake_breakfast.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+man+kitchen+table+earbuds+drawing+cereal&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_breakfast.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young man kitchen table earbuds drawing cereal</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+drawing+napkin+kitchen+breakfast+quiet&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_breakfast.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man drawing napkin kitchen breakfast quiet</a></div></div><p>Then he does. Quick. Back to the napkin. The pencil moves faster.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "fb9b49dd-f4b7-4fc8-b1df-6ba7f34de4cb">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "dce00070-9f8f-40f4-ad6d-c1c05dd62e23">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("fb9b49dd-f4b7-4fc8-b1df-6ba7f34de4cb");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_jake_breakfast.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_jake_breakfast.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit across from him." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(20);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Just coffee." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Couch <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_ryan_afternoon)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Dead Weight</div> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> on the couch, boots off, arm behind his head. Half-watching TV, half-napping. The couch sags under him like it's given up.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_ryan_afternoon.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+couch+napping+boots+off+living+room&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_afternoon.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man couch napping boots off living room</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=athletic+man+sleeping+couch+afternoon&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_afternoon.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 athletic man sleeping couch afternoon</a></div></div><p>He cracks one eye open when she walks in. Doesn't sit up.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2df75010-5f4d-4175-8daa-ad80a8c9a867">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0dc02894-4292-4840-9d56-9c3639fb09f1">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("2df75010-5f4d-4175-8daa-ad80a8c9a867");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_ryan_afternoon.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_ryan_afternoon.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit down." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(20);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Leave him." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Leftovers <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_ryan_lunch)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Fridge Door Open</div> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> standing with the fridge open, staring into it like it owes him money. He takes up most of the kitchen just by existing. Pulls out three containers, sniffs each one, puts two back.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_ryan_lunch.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+open+fridge+kitchen+standing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man open fridge kitchen standing</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=kitchen+fridge+open+man+choosing+food&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 kitchen fridge open man choosing food</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "3669c274-f5d1-46cd-990a-9ff2c88c4877">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c23d74a7-8381-4ee1-a4f8-9410417e82f0">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("3669c274-f5d1-46cd-990a-9ff2c88c4877");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_ryan_lunch.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_ryan_lunch.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Eat together." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(20);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I'll eat later.\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Protein Shake <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_ryan_morning)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Before Coffee</div> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> at the counter. Shirtless — he's always shirtless before 7 AM. Scratching his stomach, scrolling his phone, protein shake blending loud enough to wake the dead.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_ryan_morning.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=kitchen+counter+shirtless+man+protein+shake+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_morning.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 kitchen counter shirtless man protein shake morning</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=athletic+man+kitchen+morning+shirtless+phone&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_morning.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 athletic man kitchen morning shirtless phone</a></div></div><p>He looks up. The grin loads automatically.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Don't drink the shake. You'll puke.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "7b61dc63-bcd3-417b-8ae9-6ce7a6978cf0">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "4680070b-355c-4691-8489-e7d74a588daf">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("7b61dc63-bcd3-417b-8ae9-6ce7a6978cf0");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_ryan_morning.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_ryan_morning.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Morning.\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Grab something and go." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Afternoon Work <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_frank_workshop_pm)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Sawdust</div> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> sanding a cabinet door. Sawdust in the air, catching the light from the high windows. Sleeves rolled past the elbow. Radio playing something old and country. He works like nobody's watching — and he's better at it that way.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_frank_workshop_pm.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=workshop+sanding+wood+sawdust+man+afternoon&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_workshop_pm.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 workshop sanding wood sawdust man afternoon</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+workshop+woodworking+sawdust+afternoon+light&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_workshop_pm.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man workshop woodworking sawdust afternoon light</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "b19fdd1d-de46-4e57-aa79-806b27027b52">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "bffd7008-76e0-4edc-8ef0-21ee3e72d53b">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("b19fdd1d-de46-4e57-aa79-806b27027b52");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_frank_workshop_pm.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_frank_workshop_pm.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Watch him work." "Location_Workshop">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(20);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Leave him to it." "Location_Workshop">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Nightcap <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_frank_whiskey)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Lamp</div> <p>Living room. One lamp. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> on the couch, whiskey glass balanced on the armrest, TV on so low it's just moving light. He looks tired in a way that has nothing to do with the day.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_frank_whiskey.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=living+room+couch+whiskey+lamp+night+older+man&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_whiskey.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 living room couch whiskey lamp night older man</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+couch+whiskey+glass+dim+lamp+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_whiskey.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man couch whiskey glass dim lamp night</a></div></div><p>He sees her in the doorway. Doesn't straighten up. Doesn't hide the glass.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f1f6537c-52cb-45dd-ad84-6f06525d1460">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "878a5248-00c7-44c9-8909-6b98f00e9bc4">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("f1f6537c-52cb-45dd-ad84-6f06525d1460");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_frank_whiskey.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_frank_whiskey.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit down." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Good night.\"" "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Lunch Break <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_frank_lunch)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Standing Lunch</div> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> at the counter, sleeves rolled, assembling sandwiches with the same precision he uses on a table saw. He slides one toward her without asking. Turkey. Extra mustard. He remembered.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_frank_lunch.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=kitchen+counter+sandwich+making+older+man&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 kitchen counter sandwich making older man</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+making+sandwich+kitchen+counter+sleeves+rolled&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_lunch.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man making sandwich kitchen counter sleeves rolled</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "b24d664d-2b92-4be6-b22e-4c7952beeac4">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "a5c44e56-1c0d-42de-a25e-04187bffe006">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("b24d664d-2b92-4be6-b22e-4c7952beeac4");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_frank_lunch.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_frank_lunch.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Eat together." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Take it to her room." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Morning Coffee <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_frank_coffee)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Before Dawn</div> <p>Kitchen. The sky outside is still dark. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is at the table — newspaper flat, coffee black, reading glasses she's never seen him wear anywhere else. He nods when she walks in. Doesn't talk before his second cup.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_frank_coffee.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=kitchen+table+coffee+newspaper+older+man+dawn&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_coffee.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 kitchen table coffee newspaper older man dawn</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+coffee+kitchen+table+morning+dark+outside&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_coffee.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man coffee kitchen table morning dark outside</a></div></div><p>The coffee maker is still warm. The only sound is him turning pages.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "187544a5-25c3-44ad-b870-f4c319c23128">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "73427e77-079a-4911-adb5-93600498763b">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("187544a5-25c3-44ad-b870-f4c319c23128");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_frank_coffee.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_frank_coffee.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pour a cup. Sit with him." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Grab coffee and go." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Occupied <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_ryan_shower_evening)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Post-Workout</div> <p>She needs the bathroom. The door is cracked. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s sweaty gym clothes are on the floor in a heap. Steam everywhere.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_ryan_shower_evening.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bathroom+mirror+towel+athletic+man+steam&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_shower_evening.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bathroom mirror towel athletic man steam</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+towel+bathroom+mirror+post+workout&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_shower_evening.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man towel bathroom mirror post workout</a></div></div><<set _bp to random(0, 1)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p>He's singing. Badly. Some country song she doesn't know. She can see his outline through the fogged glass — big, moving under the water like it's a stage. He hits a note that makes her wince and smile at the same time.</p> <<else>> <p>He's standing in front of the mirror. Towel around his waist. Looking at himself — no, looking down. His hand goes under the towel. Slow. His reflection watches himself. She watches his reflection.</p> <</if>><p><em>She'll use the bathroom later.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f69bc456-9510-408b-a2c0-33fa445c21ac">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "95972672-936a-4805-921a-2d6a1947e393">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("f69bc456-9510-408b-a2c0-33fa445c21ac");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_ryan_shower_evening.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_ryan_shower_evening.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Walk away.->Location_Shared_Bathroom]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Occupied <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_jake_shower)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Steam</div> <p>She opens the bathroom door. The shower curtain is drawn, water running. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s glasses are folded neatly on the sink beside a worn paperback.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_jake_shower.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bathroom+shower+curtain+silhouette+lean+young+man&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_shower.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bathroom shower curtain silhouette lean young man</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+shower+curtain+silhouette+steam&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_jake_shower.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man shower curtain silhouette steam</a></div></div><<set _bp to random(0, 1)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p>His silhouette through the curtain — lean, shoulder blades sharp like wings. He's humming something off-key. She can see the outline of his hands in his hair, elbows pointed up. Skinnier than she expected. More real.</p> <<else>> <p>His breathing through the curtain. Fast. Rhythmic. The curtain shifts with his movement. Then — quiet, barely a whisper — her name. Just once. His hand hits the tile with a soft thud.</p> <</if>><p><em>She backs out so carefully the door doesn't make a sound. Her heart does, though.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "75c66cf9-1175-426f-be96-e58cdf3fee5e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "31e83d1d-3d7f-4e38-98df-b07767561602">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("75c66cf9-1175-426f-be96-e58cdf3fee5e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_jake_shower.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_jake_shower.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Close the door.->Location_Shared_Bathroom]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Occupied <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_ryan_shower_morning)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Steam</div> <p>The bathroom door is ajar. Steam curling into the hallway. She pushes it open without thinking.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_ryan_shower_morning.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bathroom+shower+athletic+young+man+steam&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_shower_morning.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bathroom shower athletic young man steam</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+shower+steam+glass+door+muscles&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_ryan_shower_morning.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man shower steam glass door muscles</a></div></div><<set _bp to random(0, 1)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> under the spray, scrubbing his hair with both hands. Arms up, everything on display — the chest, the abs, the V that disappears below his hip bones. Water runs down him like it's showing off. He spots her through the glass and grins. 'Need something?'</p> <<else>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> leaning against the shower wall. One hand braced on the tile, the other working between his legs. His eyes are closed, jaw clenched, hips moving in a slow grind. He hasn't noticed the door. A groan — low, animal — bounces off the tile.</p> <</if>><p><em>Her hand is still on the doorknob. She forgot how to let go.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a3f87d52-1eae-4a1f-afcf-e002bf27ba1c">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0ec8d8d9-4846-4de9-9adc-471e49a34637">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("a3f87d52-1eae-4a1f-afcf-e002bf27ba1c");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_ryan_shower_morning.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_ryan_shower_morning.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Close the door.->Location_Shared_Bathroom]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Occupied <span style="opacity:0.7;">(ambient_frank_shower)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Steam</div> <p>She pushes the bathroom door. It swings open — the latch catches on nothing. Steam billows out. The shower is running.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/ambient_frank_shower.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bathroom+steam+shower+older+man+back+muscles&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_shower.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bathroom steam shower older man back muscles</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+showering+bathroom+steam+glass+door&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fambient_frank_shower.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man showering bathroom steam glass door</a></div></div><<set _bp to random(0, 1)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> under the water. Broad back, soap running down the ridges of muscle along his spine. He hasn't heard the door over the spray. His head is tilted back, eyes closed. Water streams through the gray at his temples. She sees the scar below his shoulder blade — old, faded, the kind nobody asks about.</p> <<else>> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> braced against the tile wall with one arm. His head is dropped forward, shoulders hunched. His other hand is moving — rhythmic, purposeful. A low groan fills the bathroom, deep in his chest. The sound hits her like a wall. He hasn't heard the door.</p> <</if>><p><em>She stands there for three full seconds before her brain reconnects to her legs.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "05fe048b-ddca-4d9c-8823-e3a816ef22e3">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c22cb863-3b0e-4355-a3ad-29535f5a9c72">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("05fe048b-ddca-4d9c-8823-e3a816ef22e3");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("ambient_frank_shower.base") === -1) { vn.push("ambient_frank_shower.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Close the door. Quietly.->Location_Shared_Bathroom]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Alley <span style="opacity:0.7;">(event_street_encounter)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Shortcut</div> <p>The alley between the hardware store and the laundromat. A shortcut. She's used it before.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/event_street_encounter.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=alley+couple+against+wall+town+afternoon&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_street_encounter.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 alley couple against wall town afternoon</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+alley+brick+wall+standing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_street_encounter.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple alley brick wall standing</a></div></div><p>Halfway through — movement. Against the brick wall. Two people. His hand in her hair, her leg hooked around his hip. The sounds are unmistakable.</p><p>She should turn around. Walk the long way. Her feet don't move.</p><p>She watches. Five seconds. Ten. The woman's head falls back against the brick. The man's hand slides up her thigh.</p><p><em>Fifteen seconds. She counted again. Just like the phone.</em></p><p>She walks back the way she came. Her face is hot. Her hands are shaking. But not from fear.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "5e4c4f4e-4be1-42ba-adf1-3b7e1d1e9d24">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "6ce8e552-a6a5-48ab-a3db-d43673a796cd">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("5e4c4f4e-4be1-42ba-adf1-3b7e1d1e9d24");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("event_street_encounter.base") === -1) { vn.push("event_street_encounter.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(5);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Keep walking.->Location_Town]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Not Quite Closed <span style="opacity:0.7;">(event_door_cracked)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Gap</div> <p>Morning. She's changing. The door isn't latched — it drifts open two inches. She notices. Reaches for the handle.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/event_door_cracked.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+changing+bedroom+door+crack+hallway&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_door_cracked.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman changing bedroom door crack hallway</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bedroom+door+gap+shadow+hallway+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_door_cracked.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bedroom door gap shadow hallway morning</a></div></div><p>Her hand stops.</p><p>A shadow moves in the hallway. Footsteps slow, then stop. Someone is standing just outside the gap.</p><<set _bp to random(0, 2)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p>The shadow is broad. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>. She can hear him breathing. She unhooks her bra with her back to the door. Takes her time pulling the shirt over her head. The shadow doesn't move until she reaches for the handle.</p> <<elseif _bp is 1>> <p>The shadow is thin. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>. A sharp inhale from the other side. She pulls her top off, standing in just underwear. The pencil he's always carrying hits the floor. By the time she turns around, the hallway is empty.</p> <<else>> <p>The shadow is tall. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>. Complete silence from the other side. She changes slowly. Deliberately. When she opens the door fully, the hallway is empty. But his coffee mug is on the hallway table. Still warm.</p> <</if>><p><em>She looks at the door latch. It works fine. Always has.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "37d68ffb-1023-4cbf-9f98-6670a185fb95">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "94904157-cf81-4fd1-ab1f-5f195759f31b">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("37d68ffb-1023-4cbf-9f98-6670a185fb95");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("event_door_cracked.base") === -1) { vn.push("event_door_cracked.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Close the door.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Less Clothes <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_sleep_less)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Thin Shirt</div> <p>She opens the drawer. The oversized sleep shirt — the thin one. Cotton so worn it's almost translucent. No bra. She pulls it on. It barely reaches mid-thigh.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_sleep_less.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+thin+shirt+hallway+dark+night+bare+legs&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_sleep_less.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman thin shirt hallway dark night bare legs</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+sleep+shirt+hallway+dark+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_sleep_less.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman sleep shirt hallway dark night</a></div></div><p>The bathroom is down the hall. She opens the door. Bare feet on hardwood. The hallway is dark but the bathroom light is on — someone just left it.</p><<set _bp to random(0, 2)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> comes around the corner. Stops. His eyes travel down and back up in the time it takes her to inhale. Neither of them says good night.</p> <<elseif _bp is 1>> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s door opens as she passes. He sees her. She sees him see her. He closes the door so carefully it doesn't make a sound.</p> <<else>> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is at the end of the hall, heading to his room. He looks. Just once. The kind of look that knows exactly what it's seeing. He keeps walking.</p> <</if>><p><em>She could have worn the long pajamas. She chose this.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "58f8751c-8d87-4b37-a111-e93d53ac5d1f">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "d155ab51-780b-4749-abf8-c481d502b6f9">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("58f8751c-8d87-4b37-a111-e93d53ac5d1f");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_sleep_less.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_sleep_less.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Back to bed.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Through the Wall <span style="opacity:0.7;">(event_overhear_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Through the Wall</div> <p>Past midnight. The house is quiet except for the creek outside and the refrigerator hum downstairs.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/event_overhear_jake.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+bed+dark+bedroom+wall+listening+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_overhear_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman bed dark bedroom wall listening night</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+lying+bed+dark+room+night+still&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_overhear_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman lying bed dark room night still</a></div></div><p>Then — through the wall. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s bed. A rhythmic creak. Slow at first. His breathing, ragged, muffled like his face is in the pillow.</p><p>A groan. Low. Stifled. And then her name. Barely a whisper. But she hears it. She hears it.</p><p><em>She lies perfectly still. Hand on the sheet. Knuckles white. Heart slamming against her ribs.</em></p><p>The creaking stops. A long exhale through the wall. Then silence. She doesn't move for twenty minutes.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "7a4a58a2-8252-407b-8ca4-8d1c308d52fa">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "2817bd3f-4748-497d-8128-ab13e2e24bf4">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("7a4a58a2-8252-407b-8ca4-8d1c308d52fa");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("event_overhear_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("event_overhear_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Stare at the ceiling.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Eyes On You <span style="opacity:0.7;">(event_yoga_stare)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Stare</div> <p>Halfway through a downward dog, the floorboard behind her creaks.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/event_yoga_stare.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+yoga+downward+dog+living+room+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_yoga_stare.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman yoga downward dog living room morning</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+stretching+yoga+floor+living+room&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fevent_yoga_stare.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman stretching yoga floor living room</a></div></div><<set _bp to random(0, 2)>> <<if _bp is 0>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is in the doorway. Tank top, towel over his shoulder, heading to the shower. His eyes drop to her hips — linger there — and he doesn't look away when she straightens up. He grins. 'Don't stop on my account.' Then he's gone.</p> <<elseif _bp is 1>> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> freezes in the kitchen doorway. Coffee mug halfway to his mouth. His eyes go wide behind the glasses. He makes a sound — not a word, just air — and retreats so fast he bumps the doorframe. She hears him swearing softly from the kitchen.</p> <<else>> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> pauses at the hallway entrance, coffee in hand. He watches for exactly one breath — long enough that she feels it between her shoulder blades — then keeps walking. Doesn't say a word. Doesn't need to.</p> <</if>><p><em>She holds the pose. Doesn't adjust her shorts. Doesn't pull down her top.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e4a06396-f62b-4dfb-8cde-1e0db544c9b0">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "e378da73-07a5-4b67-af6a-0c57a9d84e20">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e4a06396-f62b-4dfb-8cde-1e0db544c9b0");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("event_yoga_stare.base") === -1) { vn.push("event_yoga_stare.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Finish the stretch.->Location_Living_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Watch TV <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_tv_channels)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Channel 1 — News</div> <p>She drops onto the couch, grabs the remote. The TV flickers on.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_tv_channels.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+couch+remote+TV+living+room+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_channels.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman couch remote TV living room evening</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+watching+TV+couch+remote+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_channels.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman watching TV couch remote night</a></div></div><p>Weather. Traffic. A segment about property taxes. Her eyes glaze.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a17cb240-a90a-4fd8-b2ef-df945d1cc316">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "4fc75cec-153a-4032-a209-537f6b98c08f">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("a17cb240-a90a-4fd8-b2ef-df945d1cc316");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_tv_channels.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_tv_channels.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Change channel." "Canvas_solo_tv_channels_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Turn it off." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Watch TV <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_tv_channels)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Channel 2 — Cooking Show</div> <p>A chef is doing something aggressive to a chicken. Studio audience laughs at nothing.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_tv_cooking.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=cooking+show+chef+kitchen+TV+screen&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_cooking.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 cooking show chef kitchen TV screen</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=TV+cooking+show+chef+audience+studio&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_cooking.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 TV cooking show chef audience studio</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a17cb240-a90a-4fd8-b2ef-df945d1cc316">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "75480f16-468f-478d-8975-b9800bcf9330">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_tv_channels.cooking") === -1) { vn.push("solo_tv_channels.cooking"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Change channel." "Canvas_solo_tv_channels_Node_3">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Turn it off." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Watch TV <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_tv_channels)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Channel 3 — Action Movie</div> <p>Car chase. Explosion. The lead actor says something that's supposed to be witty. She's seen this one. Twice.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_tv_movie.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=action+movie+TV+screen+car+chase+explosion&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_movie.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 action movie TV screen car chase explosion</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=TV+screen+action+movie+car+chase&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_movie.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 TV screen action movie car chase</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a17cb240-a90a-4fd8-b2ef-df945d1cc316">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "dabb07db-5846-47aa-954d-4c501b2020b5">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_tv_channels.movie") === -1) { vn.push("solo_tv_channels.movie"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Change channel." "Canvas_solo_tv_channels_Node_4">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Keep watching." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Turn it off." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Watch TV <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_tv_channels)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Channel 4 — Sports</div> <p>Two teams she doesn't recognize doing something with a ball. The commentator is yelling like someone died. The crowd agrees.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_tv_sports.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=sports+game+TV+screen+crowd+cheering&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_sports.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 sports game TV screen crowd cheering</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=TV+sports+broadcast+game+crowd&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_sports.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 TV sports broadcast game crowd</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a17cb240-a90a-4fd8-b2ef-df945d1cc316">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c2edd3f6-c77d-4aa2-a5aa-2128760bd7be">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_tv_channels.sports") === -1) { vn.push("solo_tv_channels.sports"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Change channel." "Canvas_solo_tv_channels_Node_5">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Turn it off." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Watch TV <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_tv_channels)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Channel 5</div> <p>The screen changes. Soft focus. Low music. Two bodies, tangled, moving together. Not acting.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_tv_adult.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+TV+screen+soft+focus+intimate&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_adult.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple TV screen soft focus intimate</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=TV+adult+channel+couple+bedroom+soft&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_tv_adult.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 TV adult channel couple bedroom soft</a></div></div><p>She should change it. Her thumb is on the button. She doesn't press it.</p><p>The sounds fill the living room. She turns the volume down — not off. Down.</p><p><em>Anyone could walk in. The hallway is right there.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "a17cb240-a90a-4fd8-b2ef-df945d1cc316">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "e601b767-3dea-443c-9b4f-83edcc8b0853">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_tv_channels.adult") === -1) { vn.push("solo_tv_channels.adult"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Change channel." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Turn it off." "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(10);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Rest <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_rest)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Winding Down</div> <p>She falls back on the bed, phone balanced on her chest. The ceiling fan ticks. Somewhere in the house, dishes clink — someone's cleaning up after dinner.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_rest.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+lying+bed+phone+evening+relaxing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_rest.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman lying bed phone evening relaxing</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+bed+phone+ceiling+fan+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_rest.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman bed phone ceiling fan evening</a></div></div><p>She scrolls past nothing. Puts the phone down. Picks it up. Puts it down again. The window is open and the evening air smells like cut grass and the creek.</p><p><em>Two hours of just... existing. No one asking anything. No one watching.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "d776f470-7f45-4ea4-9e95-c8e73ab2a78e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "fb17898c-440e-40c4-a039-a934ec6aaa67">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("d776f470-7f45-4ea4-9e95-c8e73ab2a78e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_rest.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_rest.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "set", 100.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Get up.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Sleep <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_sleep)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Lights Out</div> <p>She clicks the lamp off. The room goes blue — moonlight through the window, the backyard silver and still.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_sleep.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+bed+moonlight+bedroom+dark+peaceful&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_sleep.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman bed moonlight bedroom dark peaceful</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bedroom+moonlight+window+night+sleeping&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_sleep.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bedroom moonlight window night sleeping</a></div></div><p>Through the wall, <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s pencil scratches paper. Down the hall, the TV murmurs — <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> watching something with the volume low. The floorboards creak once near <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s office, then nothing.</p><p><em>The house breathes. She breathes with it.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "06eef8a1-5e72-4a24-affe-fbb510dd1773">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0def2718-3fcd-4543-b30a-f115476fed31">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("06eef8a1-5e72-4a24-affe-fbb510dd1773");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_sleep.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_sleep.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(480);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "energy", "set", 100.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Sleep.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 5}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("21852294-cc39-43d7-8c2f-649da0398f67");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Stargazing <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_stargazing)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Stars</div> <p>The porch. No light pollution out here — the sky is absurd. More stars than she's ever seen.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_stargazing.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+porch+night+sky+stars+rural&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_stargazing.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman porch night sky stars rural</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+sitting+porch+night+stars+countryside&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_stargazing.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman sitting porch night stars countryside</a></div></div><p>The house hums behind her. Kitchen light. Someone's still up. She doesn't go inside.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "21852294-cc39-43d7-8c2f-649da0398f67">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "f1e50afc-f5cb-4b0b-be37-36d7d27ac8a2">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("21852294-cc39-43d7-8c2f-649da0398f67");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_stargazing.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_stargazing.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Go to bed.->Location_Yard]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Yard]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 5}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("d847a486-7e89-4eec-9eba-a8784fe78086");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Journal <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_journal)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Writing</div> <p>The notebook Mom gave her before Dubai. She writes. Not about the house — about herself. Who she was. Who she's becoming.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_journal.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+writing+notebook+bed+lamp+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_journal.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman writing notebook bed lamp night</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+journal+writing+bedroom+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_journal.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman journal writing bedroom evening</a></div></div><p>The words come easier now than they did on day one.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "d847a486-7e89-4eec-9eba-a8784fe78086">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "7726f3c1-30ed-4c05-bd36-227170963e1f">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("d847a486-7e89-4eec-9eba-a8784fe78086");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_journal.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_journal.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "intelligence", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Close the notebook.->Location_Lily's_Room]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Lily's_Room]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 10}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("e8980d21-d7cb-4dfc-b2af-309cd5667070");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Self-Care <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_grooming)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Mirror Time</div> <p>Shower. Steam fills the bathroom — the lock doesn't catch but she's learned to wedge a towel under the door.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_grooming.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+bathroom+mirror+self+care+grooming&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_grooming.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman bathroom mirror self care grooming</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+bathroom+getting+ready+mirror&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_grooming.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman bathroom getting ready mirror</a></div></div><p>Skincare. The stuff she brought from the dorm. Her face in the mirror looks different than it did eight weeks ago. Sharper. More aware of being looked at.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e8980d21-d7cb-4dfc-b2af-309cd5667070">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b4cfe382-14ea-49e5-a91a-c69d57c7782d">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e8980d21-d7cb-4dfc-b2af-309cd5667070");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_grooming.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_grooming.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(45);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "beauty", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Done.->Location_Shared_Bathroom]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Shared_Bathroom]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 20}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("934952f3-7949-4e27-8b2b-b917eabae05c");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Campus Classes <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_campus)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Art History</div> <p>Brick buildings. North-facing windows. The professor talks about Caravaggio's use of light — chiaroscuro, the dramatic contrast between dark and light.</p><p>She takes notes. Thinks about the lamp in <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s office. The way it casts everything in amber. Chiaroscuro.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_campus.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=college+art+class+lecture+hall+student+notes&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_campus.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 college art class lecture hall student notes</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "934952f3-7949-4e27-8b2b-b917eabae05c">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "84f7181d-21e5-4faf-87d7-dfc672a9b6d6">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("934952f3-7949-4e27-8b2b-b917eabae05c");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_campus.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_campus.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(180);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "intelligence", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Class over.->Location_Campus]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Campus]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 20}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("964d1f98-6ac6-4ae8-b1ad-5db21c145602");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Jogging (Park) <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_jog_park)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Trail Run</div> <p>The park trail loops around the pond. Shade from oaks. Nobody here on weekday mornings — just her and the ducks.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_jog_park.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+jogging+park+trail+pond+shade&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_jog_park.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman jogging park trail pond shade</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+running+park+path+trees+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_jog_park.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman running park path trees morning</a></div></div><p>She runs until her lungs burn. Then walks.
