Then runs again.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "964d1f98-6ac6-4ae8-b1ad-5db21c145602">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "8e01decb-f0f0-4e4d-8a46-bdd17d459ef5">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("964d1f98-6ac6-4ae8-b1ad-5db21c145602");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_jog_park.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_jog_park.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Done.->Location_Park]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Park]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 15}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("ac26aacb-bc06-460e-bf78-b25089d5b782");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Jogging (Property) <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_jog_property)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Morning Run</div> <p>Early morning. The grass is still wet. She runs loops around the property — past the workshop, along the tree line, back to the porch.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_jog_property.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+jogging+rural+property+morning+dew&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_jog_property.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman jogging rural property morning dew</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+running+yard+morning+rural+field&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_jog_property.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman running yard morning rural field</a></div></div><p>The air smells like dew and cut wood. From the workshop window, <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s silhouette. He's already working.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ac26aacb-bc06-460e-bf78-b25089d5b782">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "bb4accd5-c0d0-4c39-89cb-a0b0841bae8d">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("ac26aacb-bc06-460e-bf78-b25089d5b782");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_jog_property.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_jog_property.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(45);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Done.->Location_Yard]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Yard]] <</if>><<set _costs to [{"trait": "energy", "value": 10}]>>\ <<if setup.checkCostsAffordable(_costs)>>\ <<script>>setup.deductCosts("c234f5c1-f79f-4710-80b2-ab84a03033bd");<</script>> <div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Yoga <span style="opacity:0.7;">(solo_yoga)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Yoga</div> <p>She rolls out an imaginary mat on the bedroom floor. Stretches, breathes, tries to quiet her head.</p><p>The floor creaks. Through the wall, <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s pencil stops — then starts again.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] activities/solo_yoga.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+yoga+stretching+bedroom+morning+floor&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=activities%2Fsolo_yoga.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman yoga stretching bedroom morning floor</a></div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c234f5c1-f79f-4710-80b2-ab84a03033bd">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "1575367c-22cb-4706-b35a-234e3d8b0ee8">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("c234f5c1-f79f-4710-80b2-ab84a03033bd");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("solo_yoga.base") === -1) { vn.push("solo_yoga.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "beauty", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Done.->Location_Living_Room]] <<else>> <div class="cost-blocked-message"> <p><<= setup.getCostBlockedMessage(_costs)>></p> </div> [[Back->Location_Living_Room]] <</if>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pencil Drops <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_pencil_drops)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> He Can't Draw</div> <p>She's bare. He's been drawing for forty minutes. The golden hour is ending — the light shifting from warm to amber to something that makes skin glow.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_jake_pencil_drops.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=artist+drops+pencil+woman+undressed+bedroom&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_pencil_drops.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 artist drops pencil woman undressed bedroom</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+woman+bedroom+nude+drawing+afternoon&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_pencil_drops.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man woman bedroom nude drawing afternoon</a></div></div><p>He's drawing her hip. The curve where it meets her thigh. His pencil traces the line on paper. His eyes trace the same line on her body.</p><p>His hand slows. The pencil stops moving but stays on the page. He's not drawing. He's staring. At the real thing, not the paper.</p><p>His breathing has changed. She can hear it from across the room.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I can't— I can't draw right now.</div></div><p>The pencil drops. Rolls off the desk edge. Falls to the floor. The sound is small — wood on hardwood — but it fills the room.</p><p>Neither of them picks it up.</p><p><em>The artist disappeared. What's left is a boy holding nothing, looking at me like I'm the only real thing in the room. Like the drawings were practice for this moment and now the practice is over.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ace66e6f-f7f2-4ab9-b193-294defca4825">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "d9e0d8d8-5c61-4087-8490-5748f895e27a">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("ace66e6f-f7f2-4ab9-b193-294defca4825");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_pencil_drops.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_pencil_drops.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Then don't draw.\"" "Canvas_story_jake_pencil_drops_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Don't stop. Keep drawing.\"" "Canvas_story_jake_pencil_drops_Node_3">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pencil Drops <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_pencil_drops)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Then Don't Draw</div> <p>She reaches for his hand. The one that was holding the pencil. Charcoal-stained fingers, shaking. She pulls it from the desk to her knee.</p><p>His fingers — warm, rough from graphite — on her skin. First time he's touched the subject instead of drawing it.</p><p>He crosses the room. His glasses bump her forehead — he pulls back, embarrassed — and she closes the gap.</p><p>His mouth is soft. He tastes like graphite and the coffee he drinks too sweet. His hand finds her jaw. Holds it like he's positioning a portrait. But this isn't a portrait. This is her mouth and his mouth and the sketchbook sliding off the bed and neither of them reaching for it.</p><p><em>He drew me a hundred times. Hands, face, body, bare. Every line was practice for touching me. And now his hand is on my jaw and the pencil is on the floor and the drawing can't hold him anymore.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ace66e6f-f7f2-4ab9-b193-294defca4825">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "8128dd7b-0b8e-4c9b-b902-baf679698eae">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_pencil_drops.kiss") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_pencil_drops.kiss"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pull him closer." "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_pencil_dropped");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pencil Drops <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_pencil_drops)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Keep Drawing</div> <p>She stays still. He picks up the pencil.</p><p>But his hand doesn't go to the paper.</p><p>It goes to her hip. The charcoal tip traces the line he was drawing — on her skin instead of paper. Collarbone. Ribcage. The curve of her waist. He's drawing ON her.</p><p>The charcoal is cool on her skin. His breathing changes. Hers changes. The line he draws follows the same path his eyes have been tracing for weeks — but now the paper is her body and the distance is zero.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Hold still.</div></div><p>But his voice is different now. Not the artist's instruction. Something lower. Something that makes her stomach pull.</p><p><em>He's drawing on me. The art and the body are the same thing now. His hand on my skin and the charcoal leaving lines and I can feel every one like a sentence he can't say out loud.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ace66e6f-f7f2-4ab9-b193-294defca4825">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "29847051-018d-404f-9871-e29256aa99ef">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_pencil_drops.trace") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_pencil_drops.trace"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Don't stop.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_pencil_dropped");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Without Anything <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_drawing_milestone_5)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Everything</div> <p>She takes off the shirt without being asked. Folds it on the chair. Sits on the edge of his bed in the afternoon light.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_drawing_milestone_5.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+undressing+shirt+art+session+nude&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_5.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman undressing shirt art session nude</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+removing+shirt+man+drawing+bedroom+nude&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_5.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman removing shirt man drawing bedroom nude</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s hand doesn't shake anymore. That's new. He looks at her the way he looked at the creek at sunset — like he's memorizing something that won't stay.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Don't move. This is... you're perfect.</div></div><p>The pencil moves. Steady. Sure. The shy boy who couldn't finish sentences draws her like he was born to.</p><p><em>He's not shaking. He's not blushing. He's just drawing me like I'm the most important thing he's ever seen. And I'm sitting here bare and I don't feel naked. I feel seen.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1c389925-8450-463a-b121-314c2c08a817">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "2a967320-b211-46c0-959c-9c8ad57b6535">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("1c389925-8450-463a-b121-314c2c08a817");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_drawing_milestone_5.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_drawing_milestone_5.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_5_complete");<</script>> [[Let him finish.->Location_Jake's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Strap <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_drawing_milestone_4)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Lower</div> <p>He's drawing her shoulder. The strap keeps slipping — it's been slipping for twenty minutes and neither of them has fixed it.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_drawing_milestone_4.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+shoulder+strap+slipping+man+drawing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_4.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman shoulder strap slipping man drawing</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+strap+falling+shoulder+man+watching+drawing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_4.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman strap falling shoulder man watching drawing</a></div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> The strap is casting a shadow. Can you—</div></div><p>He doesn't finish. She lowers it herself. His pencil stops. Starts again. Slower.</p><p>The room is very quiet. Just charcoal on paper and his breathing, which has changed.</p><p><em>He asked me to lower it. He'll never say what he actually wants — he'll frame it as art. And I'll let him. Because it IS art. And because it isn't.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "27994f0b-7642-4727-8ce0-95f4e67f2a51">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "3bc5dab5-6d8a-4c88-a959-a667a8f07870">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("27994f0b-7642-4727-8ce0-95f4e67f2a51");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_drawing_milestone_4.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_drawing_milestone_4.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_4_complete");<</script>> [[Hold the pose.->Location_Jake's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pose That Changed <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_drawing_milestone_3)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Different Now</div> <p>She looks at the latest drawing. It's different from the first one — the hands drawing was careful, respectful. This one is intimate. The way her collar falls. The shadow on her collarbone. The look in her eyes that she didn't know she was making.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_drawing_milestone_3.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+posing+artist+closer+intimate+drawing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_3.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman posing artist closer intimate drawing</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+pose+drawing+session+closer+intimate&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_3.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman pose drawing session closer intimate</a></div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> They're getting better. Or you're getting more comfortable. I can't tell which.</div></div><p><em>Both. It's both.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e04e9736-80a4-4afc-ad04-be1272ebfd5e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "a5212661-d776-4e8d-9811-06a162b82e17">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e04e9736-80a4-4afc-ad04-be1272ebfd5e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_drawing_milestone_3.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_drawing_milestone_3.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_3_complete");<</script>> [["Don't stop."->Location_Jake's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Finished Drawing <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_drawing_milestone_1)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Finished</div> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> sets down the pencil. Looks at the page. Then at her. Then back at the page.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_drawing_milestone_1.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=finished+portrait+drawing+pencil+art+close&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_1.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 finished portrait drawing pencil art close</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=completed+pencil+drawing+portrait+woman+paper&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_drawing_milestone_1.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 completed pencil drawing portrait woman paper</a></div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> It's done.</div></div><p>He turns the sketchbook toward her. Her hands — every line, every shadow. The chip in her thumbnail. The freckle below her ear.</p><p><em>He finished it. The first one. He's already looking at a blank page like he's planning the next.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "5e9d98c0-c5ee-4a88-87fc-2d4c3678b05e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "f1e736df-359e-418f-8f4c-4f1b38d22c79">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("5e9d98c0-c5ee-4a88-87fc-2d4c3678b05e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_drawing_milestone_1.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_drawing_milestone_1.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_1_complete");<</script>> [["It's perfect, Jake."->Location_Jake's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Seven Days <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_final_week)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Last Week</div> <p>Seven days.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_final_week.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+window+bedroom+countdown+calendar&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_final_week.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman window bedroom countdown calendar</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+looking+out+window+bedroom+thoughtful&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_final_week.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman looking out window bedroom thoughtful</a></div></div><p>The number is in the sidebar. She's been watching it shrink for weeks but it never felt real until now.</p><p>The house is different. Charged. Everyone knows the timer is running.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_jake", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 20}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> draws faster now. More urgently. Like he's trying to capture enough of her to last. "I need to finish this." He means the drawing. He means everything.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 20}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is more direct. Less joking. "I mean it" has replaced "relax" in his vocabulary. He drives slower when she's in the truck. Stretching the time.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_frank", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 20}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is in the kitchen every night now. The whiskey is always poured. The glass is always waiting. "Diana's landing Saturday." He says it to the table. Not to her.</p> <</if>><p><em>Seven days. Everything I've built — routines, relationships, whatever this is — has an expiration date.</em></p><p><em>Every conversation from now on is a last conversation. Every touch might be the final one.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "018c1b38-78c1-4b44-ad62-206b1ad3ab73">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "bc5cc62a-0c77-40b6-9553-3dca00bbfb8f">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("018c1b38-78c1-4b44-ad62-206b1ad3ab73");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_final_week.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_final_week.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "endgame_active");<</script>> [[Make the last week count.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> She's Coming Home <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_moms_return)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Call</div> <p>Her phone rings during dinner. Mom.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_moms_return.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+phone+dinner+table+call+shocked&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_moms_return.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman phone dinner table call shocked</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+phone+call+dinner+surprised+family&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_moms_return.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman phone call dinner surprised family</a></div></div><p>She excuses herself. The kitchen goes quiet behind her — <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s fork stops, <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> watches her leave, <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s pencil pauses.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="dialog-content"><strong>Diana:</strong> Honey, I'm coming home. Next week. I booked the flight.</div></div><p>The words land in her stomach like cold water.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "mom_suspicious", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>Diana sounds worried. She's been calling more often. Asking sharper questions.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> Is everything alright there? Really alright? You'd tell me if it wasn't?</div></div> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "mom_suspicious", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p>Diana sounds tired. Relieved to be coming home. Normal.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> I can't wait to see you. I hope <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> took good care of you.</div></div> <</if>><p>She hangs up. Sits on the bed. The countdown in the sidebar just became real.</p><p><em>One week. She'll walk through that door and see... what? Who am I now?</em></p><p>She goes back to the kitchen. Tells them.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> sets down his fork. Carefully.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> leans back. Looks at the ceiling.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s pencil snaps.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ceac23ee-4684-4ca3-8a8d-3bf11360782f">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "536c9336-4324-43e5-ae61-058418332f23">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("ceac23ee-4684-4ca3-8a8d-3bf11360782f");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_moms_return.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_moms_return.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", -2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", -2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", -2.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "mom_returning");<</script>> [[Finish dinner. Nobody talks.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> I'll Cover Everything <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_arrangement)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Offer</div> <p>Evening. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> asks her to come to the office. The door closes. The lock clicks.</p><p>He's not behind the desk. He's standing by the window. Looking out at the dark yard.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> I know you're struggling with money.</div></div><p>Not a question. He's been doing the books. He knows exactly how much she has.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "chose_confront_frank", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> I know you can't afford this. Neither can I.</div></div><p>He turns from the window. His face is honest in a way she's never seen. Two people drowning, offering each other rope.</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "chose_confront_frank", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> I'll cover everything. Bus pass. Art supplies. Phone. Food.</div></div><p>He turns from the window. His face is controlled. This is a transaction he's rehearsed.</p> <</if>><img src="./videos/story/story_franks_offer_the_office.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> In exchange, you stay. Late nights. The office. Whatever I need help with.</div></div><p>"Help with." They both know what that means. The words are doing a job the truth won't do.</p><p><em>He's offering to save me. The price is him. Or maybe the price is me.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "42a30a0c-37e7-4013-b8a4-f6ffed00914f">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "cf442d8c-9b14-4097-bef5-b0c3a8e82938">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("42a30a0c-37e7-4013-b8a4-f6ffed00914f");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_arrangement.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_arrangement.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Deal.\"" "Canvas_story_franks_arrangement_Node_2">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 150.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_offer");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I don't need your money.\"" "Canvas_story_franks_arrangement_Node_3">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_offer");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I'll help with the business. As a partner, not a favor.\"" "Canvas_story_franks_arrangement_Node_4">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "intelligence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_offer");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> I'll Cover Everything <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_arrangement)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Deal</div> <p>One word. She watches it land on him.</p><p>Relief. Hunger. Guilt. All three cross his face in two seconds.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Starting tonight.</div></div><p>He sits behind the desk. His chair. Her chair. The positions set.</p><p><em>I sold something. I'm not sure what yet. But the math works now. The math finally works.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "42a30a0c-37e7-4013-b8a4-f6ffed00914f">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c3d6c844-5212-4bb3-b411-bb91da4dc7a5">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_arrangement.accepted") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_arrangement.accepted"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>> [[Stay.->Location_Frank's_Office]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> I'll Cover Everything <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_arrangement)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Refusal</div> <p>His eyebrows lift. Genuine surprise. He wasn't expecting no.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> You can barely afford—</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> I'll figure it out. I always do.</div></div><p>He looks at her. Really looks. Not at the girl who cleans his house or does his books. At a person who just chose difficulty over comfort.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> ...Alright.</div></div><p>The ellipsis is audible. Something shifted. He sees her differently now — not a transaction, not a responsibility. A person.</p><p><em>The money's still impossible. But I'm still mine.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "42a30a0c-37e7-4013-b8a4-f6ffed00914f">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "6c7c00aa-728e-4117-909e-a4cad5f22859">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_arrangement.refused") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_arrangement.refused"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> [[Leave the office.->Location_Frank's_Office]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> I'll Cover Everything <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_arrangement)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Partnership</div> <p>He blinks. That wasn't one of the options he'd prepared for.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> A partner.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> I'm good with numbers. You said so yourself. Let me help with the real books. Not the cleaned-up version — the real ones. I'll earn my keep, but as a partner, not a...</div></div><p>She doesn't finish. They both know what she didn't say.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> sits down. Leans back. Studies her with those steady dark eyes.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Fifty a session instead of twenty-five. I'll cover the bus pass. The rest you earn.</div></div><p>He extends his hand across the desk. A handshake. Like the first day — but this time, neither of them lets go quickly enough.</p><p><em>Business partners. In a room with a locked door. At night. Sure, Frank. Business partners.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "42a30a0c-37e7-4013-b8a4-f6ffed00914f">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "aa3de5ee-30ed-4b72-ac5f-b0b1e7d0e337">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_arrangement.negotiated") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_arrangement.negotiated"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> [[Shake his hand.->Location_Frank's_Office]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Bounce <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_financial_crisis)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Red Numbers</div> <p>Her phone buzzes. Bank notification. Mom's transfer: returned. Insufficient funds on the sending end.</p><p>She stares at the number. $47. In three days: bus pass due ($80). Art supplies overdue ($60). Phone bill overdue ($45).</p><p>Total needed: $185. She has $47.</p><p><em>I can't call her. She doesn't have it either. The exchange rate, the timing — it's not her fault. But the math doesn't care whose fault it is.</em></p><img src="./videos/story/story_financial_crisis_the_bounce.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>At dinner, <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> mentions the food contribution. Not aggressive — the weight of it. He's been covering more than he should. The business that's $40,000 in debt, covering a girl who can't afford $50.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "frank_secret_complete", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>She catches <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s eye across the table. He knows the business numbers. She knows the business numbers. Neither speaks.</p><p><em>He can't afford to cover me. I can't afford not to be covered.</em></p> <</if>><p>Something has to give. Something already has.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "dc03bfc7-bbd0-4704-90c5-5cfa10bbc849">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "d8458f44-5690-41ed-b19f-38e989e375c1">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("dc03bfc7-bbd0-4704-90c5-5cfa10bbc849");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_financial_crisis.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_financial_crisis.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pick up extra diner shifts. Work harder." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "financial_crisis");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Call Mom. Ask her to try again." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 100.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "financial_crisis");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "mom_suspicious");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Wait. Something will come up. It has to." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "financial_crisis");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hallway <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_brothers_discover)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> No More Secrets</div> <p>Night. She opens <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s door. Steps into the hallway.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is standing three feet away. Leaning against the wall. Arms crossed. He's been waiting.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Late night art class?</div></div><p>His voice is quiet. No grin. The humor stripped out.</p><p>Behind her, <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> appears in his doorway. Sees <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>. Freezes.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_brothers_discover_discovery.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Both of us?</div></div><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_leaving_confirmed", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s voice is different. Not just jealous — desperate. He's leaving in days and this is what she's been doing with her time.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I'm gone in ten days. And THIS is where you've been?</div></div> <</if>><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s face crumbles. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s jaw tightens. The hallway is four feet wide and it's the smallest space in the world.</p><p><em>This is it. This is the moment everything breaks.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "30ff0766-1755-47e9-8b65-98653d6b8ed8">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b1b9f4bc-1ff0-491d-a39c-b32e73ecf8cc">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("30ff0766-1755-47e9-8b65-98653d6b8ed8");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_brothers_discover.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_brothers_discover.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"It's none of your business.\"" "Canvas_story_brothers_discover_Node_2">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", -3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", -2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "brothers_discover");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "crisis_resolved");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Please don't fight.\"" "Canvas_story_brothers_discover_Node_3">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", -1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", -1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "brothers_discover");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "crisis_resolved");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "(Say nothing. Walk away.)" "Canvas_story_brothers_discover_Node_4">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", -3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", -3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "brothers_discover");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "crisis_resolved");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hallway <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_brothers_discover)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> None of Your Business</div> <p>Both brothers stare at her. The silence is loud.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> uncrosses his arms. Not angry — stunned. Nobody talks to Ryan like that.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> looks at his feet. Then at her. Something in his eyes shifts — fear to something else. Admiration, maybe.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I didn't know you had that in you.</div></div><p>She walks between them. Doesn't touch either one. Goes to her room. Closes the door.</p><p>Through the wall: silence. Then <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s boots going downstairs. Then <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s door closing. Nobody fights tonight.</p><p><em>I don't belong to either of them. They needed to hear it. I needed to say it.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "30ff0766-1755-47e9-8b65-98653d6b8ed8">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c4a3cb0f-518b-4ab2-bcd3-3e51efe16026">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_brothers_discover.independent") === -1) { vn.push("story_brothers_discover.independent"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> [[Close the door.->Location_Hallway]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hallway <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_brothers_discover)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Please Don't Fight</div> <p>Her voice cracks. Both brothers look at her instead of each other.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s hand finds the doorframe. Holding on.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> takes a step back. Unclenches his fists. He didn't know they were clenched.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Nobody's fighting.</div></div><p>A lie. But a necessary one. The hallway breathes.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> goes back inside. Closes his door. Quietly.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> stands there a moment longer. Looks at her. Then walks downstairs. She hears the front door open and close. His truck starts.</p><p><em>Fragile peace. Everyone pretending. But nobody bled.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "30ff0766-1755-47e9-8b65-98653d6b8ed8">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "86976e46-4380-4531-b9a3-4fdfa607a6db">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_brothers_discover.peacemaker") === -1) { vn.push("story_brothers_discover.peacemaker"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> [[Go to your room.->Location_Hallway]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hallway <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_brothers_discover)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Walk Away</div> <p>She turns. Walks to her room. Doesn't look back.</p><p>Behind her: silence. Then voices. Low at first.</p><p>Through her closed door: <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s voice getting louder. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s getting quieter. A thud. Something falls off a shelf.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> You little—</div></div><p>Another thud.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Don't—</div></div><p>Boots on the stairs.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> ENOUGH.</div></div><p>Silence. The kind that comes after something breaks.</p><p>She lies in bed. Through the wall: <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> crying. Trying not to. Failing.</p><p><em>I walked away. I let them fight. I don't know if that makes me smart or a coward.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "30ff0766-1755-47e9-8b65-98653d6b8ed8">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0b63da86-3722-4bd5-a332-eaf1dc7904b1">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_brothers_discover.avoidant") === -1) { vn.push("story_brothers_discover.avoidant"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> [[Close your eyes. Try to sleep.->Location_Hallway]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Drawing Under the Door <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_repair)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Apology</div> <p>Something under her door. A sheet of paper slid through the gap.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_jake_repair.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=drawing+paper+under+door+bedroom+floor&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_repair.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 drawing paper under door bedroom floor</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=paper+slid+under+bedroom+door+drawing&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_repair.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 paper slid under bedroom door drawing</a></div></div><p>Not her. Not a portrait. Not a body.</p><p>Her coffee mug. The one she uses every morning. Drawn from memory — the chip on the rim, the way the light hits the ceramic. A detail only someone who watches her constantly would notice.</p><p>No signature. No note. The drawing IS the apology.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "chose_tender_jake", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>On the back, in his handwriting: "I'm sorry I scared you. I'll only draw what you let me."</p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "chose_possessive_jake", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>On the back, in his handwriting: "I'm not sorry. But Dad shouldn't have seen."</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ec34c1fd-200e-4da8-8ae3-6611c593daf1">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "5924af59-1015-460e-af06-ca418f319ae2">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("ec34c1fd-200e-4da8-8ae3-6611c593daf1");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_repair.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_repair.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Go to his room. Sit with him." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_repair_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Slide a note back. \"Draw me something new.\"" "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_repair_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Come In <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_frank_repair)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Three Days Later</div> <p>Three days of cold dinners. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> eating in the workshop. Clipped sentences. 'Miss Chen' instead of 'Lily.'</p><p>The office door has been locked every day. No bookkeeping. No amber lamplight. Just silence and the sound of him drinking alone.</p><p>She knocks. First time she's knocked instead of walking in.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Come in.</div></div><p>Two words. An opening.</p><p>He's behind the desk. Unshaven. Eyes red. The whiskey bottle is on the shelf — not the desk. He put it away before she knocked. Trying.</p><p>She doesn't sit across from him. She walks around the desk. Sits in the chair beside his. Same side. First time.</p><p>He doesn't tell her to move.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_frank_repair_repair.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_3_complete", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>The drawings are gone from the desk. She doesn't ask where they are. He doesn't mention them.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Did you know?</div></div><p>About the drawings. About <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>. He's asking.</p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "ed18a69c-255c-4e5a-90a5-d2fc33190020">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b99cc2d9-1e22-4580-ae30-db2de7b460b4">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("ed18a69c-255c-4e5a-90a5-d2fc33190020");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_frank_repair.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_frank_repair.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Tell me what happened.\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_repair_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Sit in silence with him. Let the quiet do the work." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_repair_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Call <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_frank_crisis)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Miss Chen</div> <p>She arrives for bookkeeping. The office door is locked. Not closed — locked. First time.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_frank_crisis.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+office+door+locked+desk+papers+stressed&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_frank_crisis.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man office door locked desk papers stressed</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=office+locked+door+man+desk+stressed+papers&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_frank_crisis.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 office locked door man desk stressed papers</a></div></div><p>Through the wood: a drawer slamming. A bottle on the desk. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s voice — low, tight, the one she's never heard.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> What do you mean the payment's not coming?</div></div><p>Silence. Then his chair scraping the floor. Pacing. She can feel the floorboards through her shoes.</p><p>The door opens. He sees her in the hallway. His face: white. The controlled mask with a crack running through the center.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> No bookkeeping today, Miss Chen.</div></div><p>Miss Chen. Not Lily. The wall is back up. He closes the door.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_3_complete", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p>Through the gap before the door shuts: on his desk, under the invoices — drawings. Charcoal on heavy paper. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s linework. Portraits of her. Poses she recognizes and ones she doesn't.</p><p><em>The business AND the drawings. Two things falling apart at once.</em></p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "drawing_3_complete", "operator": "is_false"}]})>> <p><em>The business is dying. Nobody knows except me. And now he doesn't even want me in the room.</em></p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "36119742-ebbb-48ab-b359-23b0dafb014e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "98a73324-4460-4fb8-aaba-b8e5303012f1">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("36119742-ebbb-48ab-b359-23b0dafb014e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_frank_crisis.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_frank_crisis.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Frank—\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_crisis");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Wait in the hallway. Listen to the silence." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_crisis");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Truth <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_sex)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> No More Pretense</div> <p>Drawing session. But nobody's drawn anything in twenty minutes.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_jake_sex.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bedroom+couple+sex+bed+afternoon&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_sex.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bedroom couple sex bed afternoon</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+bed+sex+bedroom+afternoon+light&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_sex.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple bed sex bedroom afternoon light</a></div></div><p>The sketchbook is open. The pencils are out. The pretense is set up and neither of them is using it.</p><p>She's on his bed. He's in his chair. Afternoon light turning gold. The same room. The same positions. Everything the same except nothing is.</p><p>She looks at him.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> I want to fuck you.</div></div><p>Three seconds. His glasses. His shaking hands. The sketchbook slides off the desk and hits the floor.</p><p>He crosses the room.</p><p>The narrow bed. It creaks. The wall is thin — <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>'s room is right there. Neither of them cares.</p><p>He's gentle. Careful. His forehead against hers, glasses abandoned on the desk. Every movement is slow, like he's memorizing it for a drawing he'll never make.</p><p>Afterward, he traces her collarbone with his fingertip. The same line he's drawn a hundred times. But this time it's real.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I love you. I drew you again. I always draw you.</div></div><p><em>No art metaphor. No pretense. No pencil between us.
