Just his body and mine and the truth we ran out of ways to avoid.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2a0cf6ef-c84f-4046-a0bf-53b12ef60363">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "807e1a53-d117-489d-94fa-98d6da30c2ce">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("2a0cf6ef-c84f-4046-a0bf-53b12ef60363");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_sex.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_sex.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Stay.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 6.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 6.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "sex_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(180);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> You Deserve This <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_blowjob)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Three Pieces</div> <p>She walks in. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> is at his desk. A letter open in front of him. He's smiling — not the nervous smile. The real one.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_jake_blowjob.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bedroom+kneeling+oral+young+couple&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_blowjob.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bedroom kneeling oral young couple</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=bedroom+blowjob+kneeling+couple&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_blowjob.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 bedroom blowjob kneeling couple</a></div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> They said yes. Three pieces. The creek, the hands, and—</div></div><p>He stops. The third piece is of her. The portrait she posed for. The one she told him to submit.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Three pieces. My first show.</div></div><p>His first exhibition. The boy who couldn't finish a sentence when she arrived just got his art on a wall. Because she told him it was good enough. Because she sat still while he drew.</p><p>She's proud of him. Not the way you're proud of a child. The way you're proud of someone who worked for something real and got it.</p><p>She kneels by his chair.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> You deserve this.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> You don't have to—</div></div><p>She does. His hand finds her hair — not pushing, not guiding. Just resting. Like he needs to hold something or he'll float away.</p><p>His other hand grips the arm of the chair. Knuckles white. The acceptance letter flutters off the desk. Neither reaches for it.</p><p><em>He earned this. Not just the show — this. Every drawing, every hour of holding still, every line he traced on paper and on my skin. This is what 'you deserve this' feels like.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "b1974aaa-f956-4cd9-8beb-b5dab795bb90">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "8f225ba9-c379-43ae-b940-276fb8e44ed4">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("b1974aaa-f956-4cd9-8beb-b5dab795bb90");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_blowjob.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_blowjob.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I know.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "blowjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Wine <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_frank_wine_night)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Bottle</div> <p>She doesn't bring paperwork. She brings wine.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_frank_wine_night.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+woman+office+wine+night+lamp+intimate&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_frank_wine_night.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man woman office wine night lamp intimate</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+wine+office+night+desk+lamp+close&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_frank_wine_night.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple wine office night desk lamp close</a></div></div><p>Knocks on the office door. Late. The house is asleep.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> You look like you need this more than I do.</div></div><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> looks at the bottle. Then at her. The controlled face — calculating, measuring, deciding. Then something loosens behind his eyes.</p><p>He opens it without a word.</p><p>They don't sit at the desk. Not tonight. The floor. Backs against the bookshelf. Wine between them. The amber lamp casts everything in gold.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9bfcfd60-36fa-4934-8d13-3996f8ebb738">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c5eeadb1-e2f2-4f72-b4cf-ef6029e50ec9">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("9bfcfd60-36fa-4934-8d13-3996f8ebb738");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_frank_wine_night.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_frank_wine_night.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pour. Sit. Listen." "Canvas_story_frank_wine_night_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Wine <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_frank_wine_night)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Floor</div> <p>He talks. Really talks. Not the clipped <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> sentences. The underneath ones.</p><p>Diana. How she looked the morning she left for Dubai. How she kissed him at the airport like she was already gone. The mortgage payment he's missed twice. The client who owes eight thousand and won't return calls.</p><p>The wine goes down. His voice gets lower. Rougher. The control slipping with every sip.</p><p>She's close. Her knee against his thigh. The bookshelf behind them. The lamp above.</p><p>She's been teasing this man for weeks. No bra in the kitchen. The short shorts mopping. The skirt on bookkeeping days. Crossing and uncrossing her legs while he tried to read receivables. All deliberate. All to see if the controlled man would crack.</p><p>She looks down.</p><p>He's hard. Straining against his jeans. Not because of anything she did tonight — because of everything she's done for a month.</p><p>He doesn't know she noticed. Or maybe he does and he's praying she won't say anything.</p><p><em>I've been giving him those for weeks. In the kitchen. In the office. Every time I reached for the top shelf or crossed my legs or wore the sleep shirt downstairs. All for him. All to see that exact reaction.</em></p><p><em>This time I'm not going to walk away smiling.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9bfcfd60-36fa-4934-8d13-3996f8ebb738">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "25339659-8110-4cb5-a5fd-653ea5738237">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_frank_wine_night.floor") === -1) { vn.push("story_frank_wine_night.floor"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Put your hand on his thigh." "Canvas_story_frank_wine_night_Node_3">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Pour more wine. Let it build." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_wine_night");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Wine <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_frank_wine_night)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Lily</div> <p>Her hand on his thigh. He stops talking mid-sentence. The word dies in his mouth.</p><p>She doesn't move it away. She moves it higher.</p><p>His breath catches. His eyes close. The controlled man — the one who runs the house, reads the numbers, says 'Miss Chen' when he's angry — makes a sound he's never made in front of anyone.</p><p>She strokes him through the denim first. Feeling the shape of him. He grips the wine bottle like it's the only solid thing in the room.</p><p>Then the zipper. He doesn't stop her. His head falls back against the bookshelf. A book shifts behind him. Neither of them cares.</p><p>His hand finds her wrist — not to stop her. To hold on. His fingers wrap around her forearm like she's an anchor.</p><p>When it's over, he opens his eyes. Looks at her. The mask is gone. Not cracked — removed. He took it off.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Lily.</div></div><p>Not Miss Chen. Lily. First time since the crisis.</p><p><em>The game was fun. The teasing, the watching him try not to look. But this isn't the game anymore. This is the man underneath it. And he said my name like it's the only word he knows.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9bfcfd60-36fa-4934-8d13-3996f8ebb738">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "9528f0df-bbbf-403d-a0d5-eecc0662d4bf">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_frank_wine_night.moment") === -1) { vn.push("story_frank_wine_night.moment"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Say it again.\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_wine_night");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "handjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Clean him up. Don't say a word. Let the silence hold." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_wine_night");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "handjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Gearshift <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_escalation_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Higher</div> <p>Parked by the creek. Engine off. The windows are fogged from the inside.</p><p>They've been kissing. His hand is on the gearshift between them — has been since they parked. But his fingers are tracing circles on the vinyl. Getting closer.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Tell me to stop and I'll stop.</div></div><p>His voice is different. Lower. The performance stripped away.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_flirtation_ryan_truck_flirt.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>His hand moves from the gearshift. To her knee. Higher.</p><p><em>He's asking. Ryan is actually asking.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "d3b54f9e-3662-45dd-b5ff-e25afc5d8259">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b21e97a6-a5f0-4590-96f6-80ebae43df19">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("d3b54f9e-3662-45dd-b5ff-e25afc5d8259");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_escalation_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_escalation_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Don't tell him to stop." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "handjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_handjob");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Stop.\" Mean it." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Complete Series <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_escalation_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> All of It</div> <p>She walks into his room. The drawings are laid out on the bed. All of them. In order.</p><p>Her hands — the first one. The chip in her thumbnail, the freckle below her ear. Then her face. Her jawline in afternoon light. Then full figure by the window. Then the strap, lowered, collarbone exposed. Then bare. All of her, in charcoal, from the first sketch to the last.</p><p>A complete series. She's never seen them together like this. Each one is a step — a step of trust, a step of skin, a step closer.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_flirtation_jake_charged_pose.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> is standing by the window. Nervous. He laid them out on purpose. Wanted her to see them together.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> It's you. All of it. I wanted you to see what I see.</div></div><p>She looks at the drawings. Then at him. The boy who couldn't finish a sentence when she arrived just showed her every version of herself he's been carrying in his head.</p><p>She crosses the room. Her hand finds him. Not the drawings. Him.</p><p><em>He gave me something nobody else ever has. He showed me what I look like when someone is paying attention. Every line. Every shadow. Every inch I gave him, given back in charcoal.</em></p><p><em>I want to give him something back.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e0a9f597-7052-4b17-8acb-b16d9b48ad32">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "221bcdb7-6ca6-4d1c-bb64-73e932758849">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e0a9f597-7052-4b17-8acb-b16d9b48ad32");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_escalation_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_escalation_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"You earned this.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "handjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"They're perfect. You're perfect.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "handjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Forty Thousand <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_secret)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Real Numbers</div> <p>Bookkeeping. The usual — invoices, receivables, payroll. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is in the workshop. He left her alone with the books.</p><p>She opens the wrong drawer. Or maybe the right one.</p><p>A second ledger. Not the one she works from — the one underneath. Different handwriting. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s. The numbers are smaller, tighter, cramped with worry.</p><p>Outstanding loans. Credit line maxed. Three clients who haven't paid in six months. A mortgage payment circled in red with a question mark.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_franks_secret_the_ledger.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>She does the math. The intelligence she's built — campus classes, bookkeeping practice — makes the picture clear in seconds.</p><p>The business is $40,000 in debt. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> has been hiding it. From <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>, from <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>, from Diana.</p><p><em>He can't afford this house. He can't afford his sons. He can't afford the fifty dollars a week he's charging me for food.</em></p><p><em>He's drowning. And nobody knows but me.</em></p><p>The workshop door opens. Boots on gravel. He's coming back.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f7213c1b-2619-4ee2-9722-71b5dabca557">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "501d580a-3a24-4f71-ac8c-3ec85b0d2a07">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("f7213c1b-2619-4ee2-9722-71b5dabca557");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_secret.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_secret.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I found something in the books, Frank.\"" "Canvas_story_franks_secret_Node_2">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_secret_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "chose_confront_frank");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Close the drawer. Put the ledger back. Say nothing." "Canvas_story_franks_secret_Node_3">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_secret_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Forty Thousand <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_secret)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Confrontation</div> <p>He stops in the doorway. Sees the ledger open. His face goes white.</p><p>Then angry. Not at her — at the situation. At being caught. At the look on her face that says she already did the math.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> That's not your concern.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> Forty thousand dollars isn't my concern?</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> I said I'll handle it.</div></div><p>His jaw is tight. The controlled man, controlled. But cracking.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> You're charging me fifty a week for food money you can't afford to lose. You offered me a job doing books that prove you're broke. And Diana doesn't know.</div></div><p>Silence. The clock ticks. He sits down. Not behind the desk — in the other chair. Her chair. Like the power just shifted and even the furniture knows it.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> No. Diana doesn't know.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f7213c1b-2619-4ee2-9722-71b5dabca557">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "bd2725e3-7c21-4f1b-b81c-9ffcfc002734">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_secret.confront") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_secret.confront"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", -3.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 3.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Leave him alone with the numbers.->Location_Frank's_Office]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Forty Thousand <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_secret)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Protection</div> <p>She closes the drawer. Slides the ledger back under. Smooths the papers on top.</p><p>By the time he walks in, she's working on receivables. The correct ledger. The safe numbers.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Everything in order?</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> Everything's fine.</div></div><p>He looks at her. A beat too long. Something in his eyes — does he know she found it? Does he suspect?</p><p><em>I carry his secret now. He doesn't even know I have it.</em></p><p><em>Forty thousand dollars of silence between us. A bond he didn't ask for and I didn't plan.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f7213c1b-2619-4ee2-9722-71b5dabca557">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "23e8de40-369f-4d43-a251-731290ec50f2">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_secret.protect") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_secret.protect"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>> [[Finish the books.->Location_Frank's_Office]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Candlelight <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_power_outage)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Dark</div> <p>Thunder. The lights flicker twice, then die. The whole property goes black.</p><p>The fridge hum stops. The house is suddenly, completely silent except for rain on the roof.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_power_outage_dark.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> finds candles. Six of them, arranged on the coffee table. The living room flickers amber. For the first time, all four of them are in the same room without electronics as a buffer.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> opens whiskey. Even <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> gets a glass.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "7eecdd76-6e29-4a24-831c-24c8929214d5">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_power_outage.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_power_outage.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Tell me a story.\"" "Canvas_story_power_outage_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Candlelight <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_power_outage)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Stories</div> <p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> talks about building the house. How the roof leaked for two years. How <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> fell through the bathroom floor when he was twelve.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I didn't fall through. The floor gave out.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Same thing.</div></div><p>They're laughing. All of them. The sound is strange — she's heard them talk, argue, eat in silence. She hasn't heard them laugh together.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> sketches by candlelight. Quick portraits. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>, leaning back, one arm over the couch. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>, whiskey in hand, face half in shadow. Her, watching all of them.</p><p>Then <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> tells a real story.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Eighteen. Job site. A board slipped off the saw table and I caught it with my arm instead of letting it fall.</div></div><p>He pushes up his sleeve. The scar. Candlelight catches the raised line.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I thought it was broken. I didn't want to cry in front of the crew.</div></div><p>Silence. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> looks at his whiskey.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> I drove you to the ER. Didn't say a word the whole way.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> You were fine.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I know. That's why you didn't talk.</div></div><p>The storm fades. The candles get lower. Nobody moves to check the breaker.</p><p>She looks at them — <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> with his whiskey, <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> sprawled on the couch, <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> drawing by dying light. For one moment she sees them clearly: just three men in a house that's too quiet, each carrying something they don't talk about.</p><<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "flag", "subject": "player", "flag_key": "ryan_leaving_confirmed", "operator": "is_true"}]})>> <p><em>He told the scar story like it happened to someone else. But I know what it really means — the day he decided to leave. And nobody in this room knows except me.</em></p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "bfd29d01-ce80-40ca-a38e-c1b0442a7ff3">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_power_outage.stories") === -1) { vn.push("story_power_outage.stories"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I'm glad I'm here.\"" "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "power_outage");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 12}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link `"Lean against " + $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name + "."` "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "power_outage");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_jake", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 12}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c:cc1') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link `"Lean against " + $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name + "."` "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "power_outage");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("3507038b-c34b-47a5-ae23-7ac4f373d76c:cc1");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<link "\"Thank you for the stories.\"" "Location_Living_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "power_outage");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(120);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Three Inches <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_franks_late_night)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Table</div> <p>Kitchen. Past midnight. The house is asleep.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is at the table. Undershirt. Barefoot. The whiskey is half gone — not tonight, over time. The bottle lives in the cabinet above the stove.</p><p>He poured her glass before she came down. It's sitting at the chair across from him. Still full.</p><p><em>He knew I'd come down. The glass was already there.</em></p><p>She sits. Drinks. The whiskey burns. The kitchen is dark except for the lamp over the stove — everything in amber.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_franks_late_night_two_am.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>He talks. About Diana. About the business. About the house — how he built the addition himself, the summer <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> was thirteen and held boards he couldn't lift.</p><p>His hand is on the table. Three inches from hers.</p><p>Neither of them moves it closer. Neither of them moves it away.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> You should go to bed.</div></div><p>He means it. He also doesn't mean it. She can hear both.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "3ccc4f0c-bb45-4d29-b74f-c44bb93216c5">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "10eb8bd5-c10a-4633-93c1-53b338f14451">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("3ccc4f0c-bb45-4d29-b74f-c44bb93216c5");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_franks_late_night.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_franks_late_night.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Touch his hand. Just her pinkie on his." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_kitchen_moment");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Good night, Frank.\" Leave the whiskey unfinished." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_kitchen_moment");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hidden Drawings <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_sketches)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Under the Mattress</div> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> is in the shower. She's in his room — waiting for him, looking at his portfolio. The usual drawings: the creek, the workshop, her hands.</p><p>A page sticks out from under his mattress. Not in the portfolio. Hidden.</p><p>She pulls it out.</p><p>Her. Sleeping. The shirt riding up. Her face slack, mouth slightly open. Drawn with the same care as the creek at sunset.</p><p>Behind it: another. Her reaching for something on a high shelf. Her back arched. The tank top pulling.</p><p>Another. Her towel slipping. The bathroom. She didn't know he saw that.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_jake_secret_sketches_discovery.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>He's been watching. Drawing her when she wasn't looking. Poses she never held for him. Moments she thought were private.</p><p>The shower stops. Footsteps in the hallway. He opens the door. Sees her holding the drawings.</p><p>His face goes white.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I— those aren't— I was going to throw them away. I wasn't—</div></div><p>He can't finish the sentence. His hands are shaking. His hair is dripping on his shirt.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "b174bbf5-b44a-458e-b565-2990ef26eb3b">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "86051ce5-d548-4fa4-987d-c4245dc374a6">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("b174bbf5-b44a-458e-b565-2990ef26eb3b");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_sketches.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_sketches.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"They're beautiful, Jake.\"" "Canvas_story_jake_sketches_Node_2">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_sketches_discovered");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "chose_tender_jake");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"You've been watching me?\"" "Canvas_story_jake_sketches_Node_3">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", -2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_sketches_discovered");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "chose_possessive_jake");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hidden Drawings <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_sketches)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Beautiful</div> <p>His mouth opens. Closes. He wasn't expecting that.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> You're not— angry?</div></div><p>She holds the drawings carefully. The one of her sleeping — the care in the linework, the attention to how light falls on her cheekbone.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> You see me like this? This is how you see me?</div></div><p>His eyes are wet. He nods. The boy who can't finish sentences just said everything without a word.</p><p><em>He's been watching. But not like Ryan watches — not measuring, not wanting. Memorizing. Like I might disappear and he needs proof I was real.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "b174bbf5-b44a-458e-b565-2990ef26eb3b">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "9a3790e0-f4d1-461c-a19e-f6a9834d9f7d">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_sketches.tender") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_sketches.tender"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> [[Sit with him.->Location_Jake's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hidden Drawings <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_sketches)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Watching</div> <p>He flinches. The shame hits first — red face, eyes down, hands reaching for the drawings like he can take them back.</p><p>Then something else. His jaw sets. He meets her eyes.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I can't stop.</div></div><p>Not an apology. A confession. The shy boy has teeth.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I draw you when you're not looking because that's when you're real. When you're posing you're... performing. When you're sleeping you're just you.</div></div><p><em>The sweet one. The harmless one. He's been drawing me in my sleep. And he's not sorry.</em></p><p><em>I should be angry. I'm not angry. I'm something else.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "b174bbf5-b44a-458e-b565-2990ef26eb3b">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "d2fb8928-ed41-42ae-af77-07b7fc21e933">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_sketches.possessive") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_sketches.possessive"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>> [[Leave his room. Don't say anything else.->Location_Jake's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Whiskey and This Can't Happen <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_kiss_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Break</div> <p>2 AM. Kitchen. The whiskey is doing what the whiskey does.</p><p>His hand is on the table. She puts hers next to it. Their pinkies overlap by a millimeter.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Lily.</div></div><p>A warning.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> Frank.</div></div><p>He closes his eyes. Opens them. Looks at her mouth.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> This can't happen.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> I know.</div></div><img src="./videos/story/story_first_kiss_frank_kitchen_kiss.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>He kisses her like a man drowning. Controlled, even now — but the control costs everything he has. His hand grips the back of the chair, not her. He's holding the furniture because if he holds her he won't stop.</p><p>He pulls back. Stands up. The chair scrapes the floor.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Good night.</div></div><p>He leaves the kitchen. His coffee is still warm. She drinks it. It tastes like him.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "80512b94-f894-4396-9685-c2cb0d2fed83">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "6e406622-17a2-43d4-bc98-4f74e41ab815">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("80512b94-f894-4396-9685-c2cb0d2fed83");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_kiss_frank.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_kiss_frank.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Finish his coffee. Go to bed. Lie awake for hours." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Leave the coffee. Go to bed. Don't think about it." "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Pulled Across the Bench Seat <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_kiss_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Grab</div> <p>He pulls the truck over. Gravel under the tires. Engine off. The radio dies mid-song.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> C'mere.</div></div><p>One word. He doesn't wait for permission. His hand is behind her neck, pulling her across the bench seat.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_kiss_ryan_truck_kiss.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>He tastes like mint gum and adrenaline. His stubble scrapes her chin. She grabs his collar — the truck lurches because his foot slipped off the brake.</p><p>He pulls back. The grin. But different — less performance, more hunger.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Took you long enough.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "235de3f7-5fb7-41e3-8246-9d7e4591a78d">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c82efd5d-5ca5-4204-9d2c-edd85cc9dffe">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("235de3f7-5fb7-41e3-8246-9d7e4591a78d");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_kiss_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_kiss_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I didn't do anything.\" Kiss him again." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Push him back. \"Slow down.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Glasses Bumping Foreheads <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_kiss_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The First</div> <p>Late afternoon. The sketchbook is closed. They've been talking — about art school, about the future, about things that don't exist yet.</p><p>He's sitting on the floor. She's on the edge of the bed. Their knees are touching and neither of them has moved apart.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I keep drawing you. I can't stop drawing you. I've tried.</div></div><p>His voice is steady. The stammer is gone. For once, he knows exactly what he's saying.</p><p>He leans forward. Careful. His glasses bump her forehead and he pulls back, embarrassed —</p><p>She closes the gap.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_kiss_jake_the_kiss.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>His mouth is soft. He tastes like graphite and the coffee he drinks too sweet. His hand finds her jaw — holds it like he's positioning a portrait.</p><p>The sketchbook slides off the bed. Neither of them picks it up.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "f6a38d05-5396-4205-ba9f-e832f6a7b431">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0e25fe93-4954-4c1f-817c-31a85e4ea9d5">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("f6a38d05-5396-4205-ba9f-e832f6a7b431");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_kiss_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_kiss_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Pull him closer." "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Pull back. \"We shouldn't.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "kiss_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_kiss");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> You're Never Around <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_catches)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> He Noticed</div> <p>Dinner. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> across the table. He's been watching her all evening — not the usual watching. Measuring something.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_catches.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=dinner+table+man+staring+across+couple+tension&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_catches.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 dinner table man staring across couple tension</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+staring+woman+across+dinner+table&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_catches.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man staring woman across dinner table</a></div></div><p>She's checking her phone under the table. Looking at the clock. Her mind is somewhere else and her body language says it.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> sets down his fork. Carefully.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> You're never around anymore.</div></div><p>Not angry. Hurt. The cocky version of <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> would make a joke. This one just says it.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I told you something real. Something I haven't told anyone. And you haven't said a word about it since.</div></div><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> looks up from his plate. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> goes still. The table is very quiet.</p><p><em>He's right. He told me he's leaving and I've been acting like it's not happening. Like if I don't acknowledge it, it's not real.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "28cca971-54d2-460b-96a4-95be1491f4d3">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "e6543521-a3b3-492b-9835-2dd3c2bfe3da">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("28cca971-54d2-460b-96a4-95be1491f4d3");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_catches.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_catches.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I've been busy.\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", -2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_caught_her");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I know. I'm sorry.\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_caught_her");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Floor <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_tease_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Scrub</div> <p>Cleaning day. She's on her knees scrubbing the kitchen floor. Short shorts — the ones she picked this morning on purpose.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_tease_frank.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+kneeling+scrubbing+floor+man+watching+hallway&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_tease_frank.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman kneeling scrubbing floor man watching hallway</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+floor+cleaning+man+watching+doorway&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_tease_frank.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman floor cleaning man watching doorway</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> walks through the hallway. His boots on the hardwood.</p><p>She doesn't stand up. Keeps scrubbing. Arches her back just enough. The shorts ride up at the back.</p><p>His boots stop. Two seconds. Three.</p><p>Then they keep going. Faster than usual.</p><p><em>He stopped. I heard him stop. Three seconds of Frank Harmon not being in control of where his eyes go. Three seconds of me owning the hallway.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1c5fe5d1-60ec-482b-b815-c7d9b739fc9d">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "88c9ede6-d8fc-4f54-98c3-ccf71d7479e4">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("1c5fe5d1-60ec-482b-b815-c7d9b739fc9d");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_tease_frank.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_tease_frank.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Keep scrubbing. Smile at the floor." "Location_Hallway">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "tease_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_tease");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Look over her shoulder. Catch his eyes." "Location_Hallway">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "tease_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_tease");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Spot <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_tease_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Bench</div> <p>Gym. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> on the bench press. She's spotting him. Standing above, hands near the bar.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_tease_ryan.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=gym+bench+press+woman+spotting+man+close&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_tease_ryan.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 gym bench press woman spotting man close</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+spotting+man+bench+press+gym+close&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_tease_ryan.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman spotting man bench press gym close</a></div></div><p>She leans over to adjust his grip. The tank top hangs open. She knows exactly what he can see from that angle. She takes three seconds too long fixing his hand position.</p><p>His rep stutters. The bar wobbles. She catches it — her hands over his on the metal.</p><p>His eyes are not on the bar.</p><p><em>He challenges everyone. Dares everyone. Today I challenged him. With a tank top and gravity and three seconds he wasn't expecting.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "70db6051-45cc-46f2-aa98-5bf80b406f96">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "7edb0722-bc9f-4413-ae1f-0bb6b6087539">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("70db6051-45cc-46f2-aa98-5bf80b406f96");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_tease_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_tease_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Focus.\" Step back."
