"Location_Gym">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "tease_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_tease");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Stay there. \"Need help with the next set too?\"" "Location_Gym">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "tease_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_tease");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Stretch <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_tease_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Break</div> <p>Break between poses. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> is sharpening a pencil. She's been sitting still for twenty minutes.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_tease_jake.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+stretching+man+watching+drawing+room&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_tease_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman stretching man watching drawing room</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+stretch+man+staring+artist+bedroom&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_tease_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman stretch man staring artist bedroom</a></div></div><p>She stretches. Arms above her head. Back arches. The shirt rides up — stomach, ribs, the line of her bra underneath. She holds it longer than a stretch needs.</p><p>His pencil hovers over the page. He's not drawing the stretch. He's watching it.</p><p>She brings her arms down. Slowly.</p><p><em>That wasn't a stretch. I wanted to see his face when I gave him something he didn't ask for. And now I know what his face does.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e23d652a-3d03-41a3-bd93-a4cd8e50a655">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "2ef0b586-27d8-4f4c-b6f4-1f2d88cba045">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e23d652a-3d03-41a3-bd93-a4cd8e50a655");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_tease_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_tease_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit back down. \"Ready when you are.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "tease_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_tease");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Hold the stretch. Watch his eyes drop." "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "tease_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_tease");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Silence That Means Something <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_flirt_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Stretch</div> <p>Bookkeeping. The office door is closed. Amber lamplight. Numbers that stopped mattering five minutes ago.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_flirt_frank.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=office+desk+man+woman+close+paperwork+lamp&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_flirt_frank.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 office desk man woman close paperwork lamp</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+office+desk+close+amber+lamp+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_flirt_frank.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple office desk close amber lamp night</a></div></div><p>She puts down the pen. Looks at him. Doesn't say anything.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is writing in the ledger. He feels her looking. His pen slows. Stops.</p><p>He doesn't look up. His jaw tightens.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Something wrong with the numbers?</div></div><p>His voice is level. Controlled. But the pen hasn't moved.</p><p><em>I'm not looking at the numbers, Frank. You know I'm not looking at the numbers.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e37149d0-282a-4acc-80eb-2548020775cd">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "eb02452b-7824-422d-8051-b8585c8d7d18">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e37149d0-282a-4acc-80eb-2548020775cd");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_flirt_frank.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_flirt_frank.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Nothing's wrong. I just like watching you work.\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "flirt_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_flirt");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Pick up the pen. Get back to work. Let him wonder." "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "flirt_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_flirt");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Matching Energy <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_flirt_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Dare Back</div> <p>Truck. Windows down. He's been making comments all day — nothing new. The usual Ryan testing.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_flirt_ryan.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+truck+windows+down+flirting+driving&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_flirt_ryan.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple truck windows down flirting driving</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+woman+truck+driving+flirting+grinning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_flirt_ryan.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man woman truck driving flirting grinning</a></div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> You know, for a college girl, you're not bad company.</div></div><p>She turns to face him. Plants her elbow on the bench seat. Chin on her hand.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> For a guy who can't read fast enough for community college, you're not bad either.</div></div><p>His grin freezes. Then cracks wider. Something shifts in his eyes — surprise. She KNOWS about the reading. She filed it away. And she used it. Not cruel. Playful.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Oh, so that's how it is?</div></div><p><em>That's how it is.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "56c78583-703d-4828-a900-8d9fcd1e6855">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "de3e4cf4-2662-4048-b0d0-9bcebb90e50f">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("56c78583-703d-4828-a900-8d9fcd1e6855");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_flirt_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_flirt_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Scared?\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "flirt_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_flirt");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Wink. Turn back to the window." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "flirt_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_flirt");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pencil Pause <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_flirt_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Deliberate</div> <p>He's drawing her profile. She's been holding still for ten minutes. His pencil moves in long, careful strokes.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_flirt_jake.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+man+drawing+woman+portrait+close+pencil&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_flirt_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young man drawing woman portrait close pencil</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=artist+drawing+woman+portrait+afternoon+close&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_flirt_jake.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 artist drawing woman portrait afternoon close</a></div></div><p>She shifts. Turns her head toward him. Slowly. Not the pose he asked for.</p><p>His pencil stops.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> That's— that's not the angle I—</div></div><p>She's looking directly at him now. Not at the drawing. At him.</p><p>His ears go red. The pencil trembles between his fingers.</p><p><em>I did that on purpose. I wanted to see what his face does when I look at him instead of away.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "8bb2e702-e0a2-4e55-b2f8-957b65873015">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "b35dd7a4-7024-4e47-9d57-0ad7b32e8bc4">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("8bb2e702-e0a2-4e55-b2f8-957b65873015");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_flirt_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_flirt_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"You're cute when you're flustered.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "flirt_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_flirt");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Hold the look. Say nothing. Let it build." "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "flirt_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_flirt");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Portfolio <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jakes_art)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Real Work</div> <p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> pulls a portfolio case from under his bed. Black leather, zipped. His hands are shaking — not the drawing kind of shaking. The showing-someone kind.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I've never— nobody's seen these. Not Dad. Not <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>. My professor saw three.</div></div><p>He unzips it. Charcoal on heavyweight paper. The creek at four different times of day. The workshop in morning fog. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>'s hands on a coffee mug — just the hands, just the mug, and everything about the man is in the grip.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_jakes_confession_the_sketchbook.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>They're good. Not student-good. Actually good.</p><p>He's watching her face. Cataloging her reaction like data. Every micro-expression is a verdict.</p><p><em>He sees things. The workshop in fog, Frank's hands on a mug. He sees what I'm starting to see — this house is beautiful and terrible and he's been drawing it his whole life.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "c0e81e52-4eb9-40bd-bf61-0dbc2b641e80">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "e223828d-1016-459b-adbe-b22189e1918e">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("c0e81e52-4eb9-40bd-bf61-0dbc2b641e80");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jakes_art.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jakes_art.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Point to the hands drawing. \"This one. Tell me about this one.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "saw_jakes_art");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_2_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Jake. These are incredible.\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "saw_jakes_art");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_2_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Swimming Hole <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_creek_discovery)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Water</div> <p>The creek. Fifteen minutes through the trees. She found it on a walk — the property slopes down, the woods thicken, and then: water over smooth stones, dappled light, the sound of nothing man-made.</p><p>Shallow enough to wade. Deep at the bend — deep enough to swim if you're willing.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_creek_swim_the_heat.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>The water is cold. Her toes go numb in seconds. But the sun is on her shoulders and nobody is watching and for the first time in two weeks, the house isn't pressing in.</p><p><em>This is mine. The one place in this property that doesn't belong to any of them.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "0cd8d56d-30c3-4efb-8d4c-1a961a8f7907">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "7877afd1-a354-4179-8af6-03d0a6e084a9">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("0cd8d56d-30c3-4efb-8d4c-1a961a8f7907");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_creek_discovery.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_creek_discovery.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Wade in deeper." "Location_Creek">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_swim");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Sit on the bank. Just breathe." "Location_Creek">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_swim");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Office Door <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_bookkeeping_offer)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Numbers</div> <p>She passes his office during cleaning. The door is open — unusual. He's at the desk, papers fanned out, pinching the bridge of his nose.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Lily. You good with numbers?</div></div><p>He gestures at the invoices. Client payments, supply costs, payroll for the crew. The filing cabinet behind him is overflowing.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Twenty-five dollars per session. Three times a week. You handle the receivables, I handle the rest.</div></div><p>The office smells like leather and old paper. The desk lamp casts everything in amber. There are two chairs — his behind the desk, and one in front.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_bookkeeping_offer_the_offer.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p><em>Twenty-five dollars. Three times a week. That's seventy-five a week. That changes everything.</em></p><p><em>Behind a door that locks.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "1d3e4d0b-00f1-44f5-a140-a63736257c01">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "344d917e-ca62-480b-85ec-822712281802">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("1d3e4d0b-00f1-44f5-a140-a63736257c01");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_bookkeeping_offer.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_bookkeeping_offer.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"When do we start?\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "bookkeeping_started");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I'd like that. Thank you, Frank.\"" "Location_Frank's_Office">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "bookkeeping_started");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Engine Running <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_departure)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Dawn</div> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}]})>> <p>Dawn. Early light through her window. The sound of an engine — not starting. Already running. Idling in the driveway.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_departure.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=pickup+truck+dawn+driveway+leaving+engine&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_departure.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 pickup truck dawn driveway leaving engine</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=truck+leaving+dawn+gravel+driveway+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_departure.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 truck leaving dawn gravel driveway morning</a></div></div><p>She looks out. The truck. Bag in the bed. Tarp over it. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> in the driver's seat. Staring at the house.</p><p>He's waiting. Not for long.</p><p><em>He's leaving. Right now. The engine is running and the bag is packed and he's looking at the house like he's memorizing it.</em></p> <<elseif setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "lt", "value": 22}]})>> <p>Dawn. She wakes to the sound of gravel. Tires on the driveway. By the time she reaches the window, the truck is at the end of the road.</p><p>Brake lights. Red. For three seconds he stops at the turn. Then he's gone.</p><p>The driveway is empty. The house is quiet in a way it wasn't before.</p><p><em>He didn't say goodbye. He wasn't sure he could.</em></p> <</if>> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "1350026b-f8a3-4641-a52c-682062406a25">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_departure.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_departure.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc0') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Go outside. Now." "Canvas_story_ryan_departure_Node_2">><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc0");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc1') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Watch from the window. Let him go." "Location_Yard">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_leaving");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc1");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "lt", "value": 22}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc2') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "Close the curtain." "Location_Yard">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_leaving");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc2");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <<if not (setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}]}) or setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 22}]}) or setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "lt", "value": 22}]}))>> No available choices<br> [[Continue->Location_Yard]] <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Engine Running <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_departure)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Stay</div> <p>She runs. Bare feet on cold ground. The gravel bites but she doesn't stop.</p><p>She opens the passenger door. Gets in. He looks at her. The engine is running. The bag is packed. His hand is on the gearshift.</p><p>She puts her hand on his. Moves it off the gearshift. To the bench seat between them. Then lower.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> Stay.</div></div><p>Her hand moves. He closes his eyes. The performance is gone — the grin, the cocky set of his jaw, the testing. Just a man in a truck with his eyes closed and his breath catching.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-player"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/lily.jpg" alt="You" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong>You:</strong> We'll figure it out. You and me. Your own jobs. I'll do the numbers, find the clients. You're better than your dad's leftovers.</div></div><p>He makes a sound. Not the Ryan sound. The real one underneath — the one from the lookout point, from the scar story, from every moment the act drops and there's just a boy who wanted to be more than his father's shadow.</p><p>His hand finds hers. Grips it. The engine is still running.</p><p>He turns it off.</p><p>The driveway is quiet. The truck stays.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "4e601d72-058e-400d-9875-5df96170f890">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_departure.convince") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_departure.convince"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"You and me.\"" "Location_Yard">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 5.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_stayed");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "handjob_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_handjob");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<if setup.triggerConditionsSatisfied({"version": "1.0", "logic": "AND", "items": [{"type": "trait", "subject": "npc", "npc_id": "npc_ryan", "trait_key": "love", "operator": "gte", "value": 25}]})>> <span @class="setup.isChoiceVisited('2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc3') ? '' : 'unlocked-choice'"> <<link "\"Take me with you.\"" "Location_Yard">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>setup.markChoiceVisited("2f4a072d-c4bb-4c38-af56-6aed80d39af1:cc3");<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> </span> <</if>> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Come With Me <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_ultimatum)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Question</div> <p>Truck. The lookout point again. He drove here on purpose. Engine off. Radio off.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_ultimatum.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+woman+truck+lookout+serious+talk&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_ultimatum.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man woman truck lookout serious talk</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+truck+lookout+point+serious+conversation&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_ultimatum.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple truck lookout point serious conversation</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> doesn't look at the valley this time. He looks at her.</p><p>He's not performing. No grin. No testing. The version of Ryan that exists underneath all of it.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I leave in ten days.</div></div><p>A breath.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Come with me.</div></div><p>Not a dare. Not a negotiation. Not leverage. A man sitting in his truck asking someone to choose him over everything else.</p><p>The valley below is getting dark. The farmland lights are coming on one by one.</p><p><em>He's not asking me to run away. He's asking me to run toward something. With him.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "08922050-8261-4c84-a14f-ba3a9ea26901">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "fb5b73ea-6e1c-405e-b1ec-ecb3ee4589a5">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("08922050-8261-4c84-a14f-ba3a9ea26901");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_ultimatum.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_ultimatum.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I'll think about it.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_ultimatum_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"I can't leave.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", -2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_ultimatum_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Ask me again in a week.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_ultimatum_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Twenty-Three and Stuck <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_truth)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Whole Story</div> <p>Parked. Somewhere she's never been — a lookout point off the back highway. The valley below. Farmland and distant lights.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_truth.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=couple+parked+lookout+point+truck+talking&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_truth.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 couple parked lookout point truck talking</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=truck+parked+overlook+couple+talking+night&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_truth.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 truck parked overlook couple talking night</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> turns the engine off. Sits. Both hands on the wheel like he's still driving.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I'm twenty-three.</div></div><p>He says it like a diagnosis.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Twenty-three. Dad's house. Dad's truck. Dad's jobs. Dad's roads. I know every back road in this county because I've been driving them since I was sixteen and nothing's changed.</div></div><p>He pulls up his sleeve. The scar on his forearm — faded, but the raised line catches the light.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Eighteen. Job site. Board slipped off the saw table and I caught it with my arm instead of letting it fall. Know why? Because Dad's clients were watching. Because if I let it fall, it'd cost us a day. I was eighteen and I took a board to the arm so Frank Harmon's deadline wouldn't slip.</div></div><p>His voice is steady. Not angry. Just tired.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> That's the day I knew. If I don't leave, I'm him. Forty-five, this house, these roads, until the house falls down.</div></div><p>He looks at her.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> The job is real. My own crew. Real money. I leave before your mom gets back. Nobody needs to know until I'm gone.</div></div><p><em>He's been carrying this the whole time. The detours, the phone calls, the map. All of it was him building an exit while I was falling into the house.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "93d30eec-97fb-4a0b-a1ae-efef8a6c3118">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "de5dfb9f-95e2-4750-8fbf-3afc6d046320">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("93d30eec-97fb-4a0b-a1ae-efef8a6c3118");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_truth.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_truth.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Why didn't you tell me?\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_leaving_confirmed");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"When?\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_leaving_confirmed");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Under the Seat <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_map)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Folder</div> <p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is inside the gas station. She's in the truck. Waiting.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_map.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+alone+pickup+truck+searching+seat&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_map.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman alone pickup truck searching seat</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=truck+interior+woman+searching+under+seat&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_map.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 truck interior woman searching under seat</a></div></div><p>Her phone slips between the seats. She reaches under the bench to grab it. Her fingers find something else.</p><p>A folder. Manila, bent at the corners. Inside: a road map with a city circled in red marker. Highway routes highlighted. A printed email — job offer letterhead, a company she doesn't recognize.</p><p>She reads it. Construction foreman. His own crew. Start date six weeks from now. Salary that's three times what Frank pays.</p><p>Under the email: a handwritten list. Things to pack. Things to sell. 'Tell Dad' at the bottom, circled twice, with a question mark.</p><p><em>He's leaving. Not someday. Soon. And 'Tell Dad' has a question mark because he's not sure he will.</em></p><p>The gas station door opens. He's walking back with two coffees. He sees her face. Then the folder in her hands.</p><p>The coffees stop. His grin dies.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> That wasn't— you shouldn't have seen that.</div></div> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "456e9953-cab0-4d31-b634-7ab7b44db1ba">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "799c2c59-1647-4d3e-9bae-b97767f19b55">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("456e9953-cab0-4d31-b634-7ab7b44db1ba");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_map.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_map.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"You're leaving.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_secret_discovered");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Put the folder back. Take the coffee. Say nothing." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_secret_discovered");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Two Weeks <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_phone)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Fragments</div> <p>Truck. Back roads. His phone buzzes on the bench seat between them. He glances at the screen. His jaw tightens.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_phone.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+phone+truck+driving+back+roads&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_phone.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man phone truck driving back roads</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=truck+driving+man+phone+call+rural+road&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_phone.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 truck driving man phone call rural road</a></div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I gotta take this.</div></div><p>He pulls over. Gravel shoulder. Gets out. Walks ten feet from the truck but doesn't close his door all the way.</p><p>She can hear fragments through the gap. His voice low, careful — not the Ryan voice. A different one.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Yeah... two weeks... I know... I said I'd be there.</div></div><p>A pause. He kicks gravel. Runs his hand through his hair.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I'll figure it out. Just hold the spot.</div></div><p>He comes back. Phone in his pocket. Starts the truck. Doesn't look at her.</p><p><em>Two weeks. Hold the spot. What spot?</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "dad975d4-de63-4fac-9d6a-43392ce48493">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "c7686052-cc0d-40fe-b507-579d43634eed">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("dad975d4-de63-4fac-9d6a-43392ce48493");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_phone.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_phone.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Who was that?\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_phone_heard");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Let it go. He'll tell her when he's ready." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_phone_heard");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Wrong Turn <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryan_detour)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Wrong Road</div> <p>Highway. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> driving. She's looking at her phone when the truck slows and turns onto a gravel road she doesn't recognize.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_ryan_detour.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=pickup+truck+gravel+road+detour+rural&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_detour.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 pickup truck gravel road detour rural</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=truck+turning+gravel+road+unknown+rural&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_ryan_detour.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 truck turning gravel road unknown rural</a></div></div><p>Not the campus road. Not the creek road. Somewhere she hasn't been.</p><p>A construction site. Half-built commercial building, heavy equipment, a crew she doesn't recognize. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> pulls in. Cuts the engine.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> One minute.</div></div><p>He gets out. Walks to a man in a hard hat. They talk — shoulders square, handshake, something exchanged. A business card. A folder.</p><p>He comes back. Starts the truck. Doesn't explain.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Wrong turn.</div></div><p>It wasn't a wrong turn. She's been in this truck enough times to know every road he takes. This one was new. And deliberate.</p><p><em>He talked to that man like they'd met before. Like there was a plan.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e91e25aa-afb5-47d2-a3f1-4ca873374916">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "877ff755-3dd6-4324-892c-2ebf14537b31">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e91e25aa-afb5-47d2-a3f1-4ca873374916");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryan_detour.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryan_detour.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"You missed the turn.\"" "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_detour");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Say nothing. Watch the road." "Location_Ryan's_Truck">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_detour");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hand on the Knee <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryans_push)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Drive Back</div> <p>Driving back from town. The road narrows to two lanes. Pine trees crowd both sides.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> has one hand on the wheel. The radio is off. That's unusual — <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> always has the radio on.</p><p>His other hand is on the bench seat between them. Close to her knee. Not touching. But close.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_ryans_push_the_ride.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>He glances at her. Then his hand moves. Settles on her knee. Not gripping. Just... there. Testing.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Relax.</div></div><p>One word. The grin is there but it's different — less cocky, more careful. Like he's calculating what happens next based on what she does in the next three seconds.</p><p><em>His hand is on my knee. It's warm. He's watching my face, not the road.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e4080328-e524-4bcf-81b0-6a70cc1fdd7e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "dd6141d2-5351-4d1e-a889-92287c5b6935">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("e4080328-e524-4bcf-81b0-6a70cc1fdd7e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryans_push.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryans_push.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Slap his hand away." "Canvas_story_ryans_push_Node_2">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", -1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_resisted");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "truck_incident_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Let his hand stay." "Canvas_story_ryans_push_Node_3">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_allowed");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "truck_incident_complete");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hand on the Knee <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryans_push)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Slap</div> <p>She smacks his hand off her knee. Hard enough that it stings.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> pulls back. Both hands on the wheel. The grin flickers — surprise, then something that might be respect.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> Alright. Message received.</div></div><p>He turns the radio on. Loud. Doesn't say another word until they pull into the driveway.</p><p>But she notices: he holds the door for her when she gets out. He's never done that before.</p><p><em>He's not angry. He's... recalculating.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e4080328-e524-4bcf-81b0-6a70cc1fdd7e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "031622cb-a846-4fb2-9264-7c63dfb3d587">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryans_push.resisted") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryans_push.resisted"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>> [[Go inside.->Location_Ryan's_Truck]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hand on the Knee <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_ryans_push)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Stay</div> <p>She doesn't move. His hand stays on her knee. His thumb traces a small circle on her kneecap.</p><p>The grin sharpens. He knows what her not-moving means.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> That's what I thought.</div></div><p>He drives slower for the last mile. His hand doesn't move. Neither does she.</p><p><em>I should have moved his hand. I didn't want to move his hand.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "e4080328-e524-4bcf-81b0-6a70cc1fdd7e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "481fa490-363f-4e2d-9119-3618e15be7ab">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_ryans_push.allowed") === -1) { vn.push("story_ryans_push.allowed"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>> [[Get out of the truck.->Location_Ryan's_Truck]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Hallway at Midnight <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_awareness_frank)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Sleep Shirt</div> <p>Midnight. She can't sleep. The hallway is dark except for the kitchen light — a warm line under the door.</p><p>She's wearing a sleep shirt. Just a sleep shirt. The hallway is cold. She doesn't go back for pants.</p><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> is at the table. Whiskey. Undershirt. Barefoot. The controlled version of himself coming loose at the seams.</p><p>He looks up when she enters. His eyes drop to the hem of the sleep shirt — mid-thigh — then snap back to her face.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_awareness_frank_the_encounter.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> Can't sleep?</div></div><p>Not a question. A statement. His voice is different at midnight — lower, less controlled.</p><p><em>He looked. Just for a second. He looked.</em></p><p><em>I felt it.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "dc730150-793b-4384-8602-e71c9008fe55">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0e3c9049-1513-47e2-afc3-2e888814d9d9">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("dc730150-793b-4384-8602-e71c9008fe55");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_awareness_frank.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_awareness_frank.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Sit across from him. \"Pour me one.\"" "Location_Hallway">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 4.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "exposure_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_awareness");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Get the water. Go back to bed." "Location_Hallway">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "exposure_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "frank_awareness");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Creek <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_awareness_ryan)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Shirt Off</div> <p>The creek. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> drove them here — back roads, no music for once. He strips his shirt without ceremony and wades in.</p><p>Sweat and creek water. His back is tanned from the job site. Muscles that come from labor, not vanity.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_awareness_ryan_the_creek.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> You coming in or just gonna watch?</div></div><p>The grin. He knows she's looking. He wants her to know he knows.</p><p><em>When did I start looking? When did I stop pretending I wasn't?</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "03609397-2421-4e03-9b4c-7d83615ca6af">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "575878e2-bcf4-4df7-bded-2aa94caeb02f">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("03609397-2421-4e03-9b4c-7d83615ca6af");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_awareness_ryan.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_awareness_ryan.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Wade in. Match his energy." "Location_Creek">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "fitness", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "exposure_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_awareness");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_swim");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Sit on the bank. Watch from a safe distance." "Location_Creek">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "exposure_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "ryan_awareness");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_swim");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Collarbone <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_awareness_jake)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Hold Still</div> <p>Afternoon light through <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s window. He's drawing — her hands this time. She's sitting on the edge of his bed, holding still.</p><p>Graphite and clean laundry. The scratch of his pencil.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Your collar is casting a shadow. Can you—</div></div><p>He gestures at her neckline. She pulls the collar to one side. Her collarbone exposed.</p><p>His pencil stops.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_awareness_jake_the_moment.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><p>Three seconds. He's looking at her collarbone, her neck, the shadow line. Not as an artist. As a boy who just realized what he's been feeling isn't just artistic admiration.</p><p>His pencil starts again. Faster. He doesn't ask her to fix the collar.</p><p><em>He's looking at me differently. Not like <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> looks — not measuring. Like he's seeing something he wants to draw a hundred times.</em></p><p><em>I don't hate it.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "40b8843d-1dd6-4427-9930-100205a5e1a1">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "8ed1888d-528a-4de2-af85-8f22010abcc5">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("40b8843d-1dd6-4427-9930-100205a5e1a1");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_awareness_jake.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_awareness_jake.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Hold the pose. Let him look." "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 3.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "exposure_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_awareness");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Fix the collar. \"Better?\"" "Location_Jake's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "exposure_unlock");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "jake_awareness");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pencil Stops <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_notices)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Breakfast</div> <p>Morning. She comes downstairs. Hair done — not elaborate, just cared for. The yoga shows in her posture. The gym in her shoulders.
