The grooming in the way light catches her skin.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_jake_notices.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+man+pencil+stops+kitchen+morning+staring&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_notices.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young man pencil stops kitchen morning staring</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=man+drawing+kitchen+staring+woman+morning&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_jake_notices.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 man drawing kitchen staring woman morning</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> is at the table. Sketchbook propped against the salt shaker. Pencil moving. Earbuds in. The usual.</p><p>He looks up.</p><p>The pencil stops.</p><p>He's never looked at her like that. Two weeks of earbuds and closed doors and 'knock' — and now his hand is still and his eyes are tracking the line of her jaw. The curve of her collarbone. The way the morning light hits the side of her neck.</p><p>He looks back down. Fast. The next line he draws curves wrong — her jawline, not whatever he was sketching. He tears the page out. Crumples it. Shoves it in his pocket.</p><p><em>He drew my jaw. Without meaning to. I saw it before he crumpled it.</em></p><p><em>Two weeks of nothing. And now his pencil can't draw a straight line when I walk in.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9d2689cf-4c72-4708-b252-7b950c3efcd5">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "0fd0bf85-d90c-4c19-a2af-19f347587483">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("9d2689cf-4c72-4708-b252-7b950c3efcd5");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_notices.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_notices.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Eat breakfast. Pretend she didn't notice." "Canvas_story_jake_notices_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Pencil Stops <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_jake_notices)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Invitation</div> <p>Afternoon. He's walking past her in the hallway. Sketchbook under his arm. He stops.</p><p>He doesn't look at her. Looks at the floor. At the wall. At his sketchbook.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> I could draw you. This afternoon. If you're not busy.</div></div><p>He says it to the floor. Already walking away before she answers. His ears are red — the first color she's seen on him since the bathroom.</p><p><em>Three weeks of nothing. Earbuds and closed doors and one-word answers. And now this.</em></p><p><em>'If you're not busy.' Like he's been rehearsing it. Like he's been wanting to ask since the crumpled page at breakfast and couldn't find the words until now.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9d2689cf-4c72-4708-b252-7b950c3efcd5">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "11db7690-5253-460d-928c-5cc0892dad08">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_jake_notices.hallway") === -1) { vn.push("story_jake_notices.hallway"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I'd like that.\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "love", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_started");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"What changed your mind?\"" "Location_Kitchen">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "drawing_started");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Routines <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_week)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Patterns</div> <p>One week. She knows things now.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_first_week.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=farmhouse+morning+routine+kitchen+hallway&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_week.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 farmhouse morning routine kitchen hallway</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=rural+house+interior+morning+light+routine&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_first_week.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 rural house interior morning light routine</a></div></div><p><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> makes coffee at five. The grinder wakes her through the floor. He's in the workshop by six, back for dinner at six sharp. His routine is the house's clock.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> hums when he draws. Something with no melody. She hears it through the wall at midnight — pencil scratching, humming, the click of his desk lamp going off.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is unpredictable. Some mornings he's shirtless in the kitchen. Some mornings his truck is already gone. He comes home dusty, loud, fills whatever room he's in.</p><p>She's learning the house. Which floorboards creak. Which doors stick. That the bathroom lock doesn't catch and the walls are thin and the kitchen is never really empty.</p><p><em>I'm learning them. I wonder what they're learning about me.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "8ac23961-12bf-452d-ab6f-9e84f1bdc113">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "83979931-2de6-48ea-851c-b1963abcd7c8">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("8ac23961-12bf-452d-ab6f-9e84f1bdc113");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_week.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_week.base"); }<</script>> <<script>>advanceTime(60);<</script>> <<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_week_complete");<</script>> [[Get on with the day.->Location_Lily's_Room]]<div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Thirteen Dollars <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_the_math)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Numbers</div> <p>She sits on the bed with her phone calculator and the back of a receipt.</p><p>Bus pass: $80 a month. Art supplies: $60. Phone bill: $45. Food contribution — <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> mentioned it at dinner, casual, like it was obvious — $50 a week.</p><p>That's $385 a month. She has $400.</p><p><em>Thirteen dollars. For ten weeks.</em></p><p>Mom's $200 transfer — when it comes — covers half a month. Maybe. If the exchange rate cooperates. If Diana remembers.</p><p><em>I'm not calling her. I'm not asking <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>. I'm not asking anyone.</em></p><img src="./videos/story/story_the_math_morning_realization.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "11cdb758-0a24-4441-b643-4a62f7119fcb">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "5bbec633-d3e7-4f7a-82ae-e4b903fe1d01">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("11cdb758-0a24-4441-b643-4a62f7119fcb");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_the_math.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_the_math.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "Go find Frank. Ask about work." "Canvas_story_the_math_Node_2">><<script>>advanceTime(3);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Thirteen Dollars <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_the_math)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Frank's Offer</div> <p>She finds him in the kitchen. He's reading the paper. Coffee black, half finished.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> The house could use regular cleaning. Twenty dollars per session. I'll show you what needs doing.</div></div><p>He says it like he's been waiting for her to ask. Maybe he has.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/frank.jpg" alt="Frank" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>>:</strong> And the food money — fifty a week. That's non-negotiable. Everyone pulls their weight.</div></div><p>His tone isn't unkind. It's practical. The same tone he uses for everything — delivering information, not opinions.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "11cdb758-0a24-4441-b643-4a62f7119fcb">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "3a609972-d6eb-4c4d-8d14-b14389776da4">> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_the_math.frank_offer") === -1) { vn.push("story_the_math.frank_offer"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Deal. When do I start?\"" "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 20.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "money_crisis_realized");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "chores_started");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"That's generous. Thank you, Frank.\"" "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_frank", "trust", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 20.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "money_crisis_realized");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "chores_started");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Transfer's Delayed <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_moms_call)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> Mom's Voice</div> <p>Her phone buzzes. Mom.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_moms_call.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+phone+bed+worried+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_moms_call.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman phone bed worried evening</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+woman+phone+call+bedroom+concerned&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_moms_call.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young woman phone call bedroom concerned</a></div></div><p>Diana's voice is tired. The connection crackles — Dubai to rural Virginia. She called at 3 AM her time.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="dialog-content"><strong>Diana:</strong> Honey, the transfer's going to be a few days late. The exchange rate is complicated. I'm sorry.</div></div><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="dialog-content"><strong>Diana:</strong> I wouldn't have asked you to stay if there was any other option. You know that, right?</div></div><p><em>I know, Mom. I know.</em></p><p>She stares at the phone after hanging up. The bank app shows $398. The list of expenses she wrote on the back of a receipt is getting longer.</p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9f154699-b3dc-452f-a185-35288cd3a9be">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "157d2206-0b69-47a9-b221-ea6208b35f62">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("9f154699-b3dc-452f-a185-35288cd3a9be");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_moms_call.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_moms_call.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"It's fine, Mom. I'm fine.\"" "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "mom_called");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Tell her the truth about the money situation." "Location_Lily's_Room">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", 100.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "mom_called");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Bus or the Truck <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_bus_problem)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Offer</div> <p>She needs to get to campus. The bus stop is a fifteen-minute walk down the road. Forty minutes each way, two dollars per ride.</p><p><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> is in the hallway. Keys in hand. Truck keys — she can hear the engine ticking from the driveway.</p><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/ryan.jpg" alt="Ryan" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>>:</strong> I can drive you. Fifteen minutes. Free.</div></div><p>He says it casually. Like it's nothing.</p><p><em>Free? Or does 'free' mean he decides when I leave and when I come back?</em></p><img src="./videos/story/story_bus_problem_the_ride.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "89e6de3a-c02d-4471-ae5e-cbb2099a7e05">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "d6a3cf53-849e-43b9-883a-95b6ecb7c433">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("89e6de3a-c02d-4471-ae5e-cbb2099a7e05");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_bus_problem.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_bus_problem.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"I'll take the bus. Thanks though.\"" "Location_Hallway">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "money", "add", -2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 2.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "bus_problem_discovered");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "town_access");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(90);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "\"Sure. Let me grab my bag.\"" "Location_Hallway">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_ryan", "love", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "corruption", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "bus_problem_discovered");<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "town_access");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(30);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> The Bathroom Door <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_first_morning)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> The Door That Doesn't Lock</div> <p>Morning. The bathroom door is shut but not locked — the hook latch doesn't catch. She'd forgotten.</p><p>She pushes it open.</p><p><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>> at the sink. T-shirt, boxers. Toothbrush in his mouth. He looks at her in the mirror.</p><p>Not embarrassed. Not surprised. Annoyed.</p><img src="./videos/story/story_first_morning_bathroom_problem.jpg" alt="" loading="lazy" decoding="async" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /><div class="dialog-block dialog-npc"><div class="portrait"><img src="./videos/jake.jpg" alt="Jake" onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.innerHTML='&lt;svg viewBox=&quot;0 0 100 100&quot; xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot;&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;35&quot; r=&quot;20&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;ellipse cx=&quot;50&quot; cy=&quot;85&quot; rx=&quot;35&quot; ry=&quot;25&quot; fill=&quot;#6c757d&quot;/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;';" /></div><div class="dialog-content"><strong><<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>:</strong> Knock.</div></div><p>One word. He doesn't look away from the mirror. Doesn't stammer. Doesn't blush. Goes back to brushing his teeth like she's already gone.</p><p><em>Not 'sorry.' Not 'the lock doesn't work.' Just 'knock.' Like I'm intruding on his house. His bathroom. His morning.</em></p><p><em>The walls are thin. The lock doesn't work. One bathroom for four people. And one of them doesn't want me here.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "3ae90ae6-8ee0-4048-afcd-ebaec5c5643e">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "15af1dc1-2ca5-43ac-8e04-97b8b416c256">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("3ae90ae6-8ee0-4048-afcd-ebaec5c5643e");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if (vn.indexOf("story_first_morning.base") === -1) { vn.push("story_first_morning.base"); }<</script>> <<nobr>> <<link "\"Sorry.\" Back out. Close the door." "Location_Shared_Bathroom">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("npc", "npc_jake", "trust", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_morning");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <<link "Say nothing. Close the door." "Location_Shared_Bathroom">><<script>>setup.pendingEffects = [];<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyTrait("player", null, "confidence", "add", 1.0, false, null);<</script>><<script>>setup.applyAndNotifyFlag("player", null, "first_morning");<</script>><<script>>setup.showEffectNotification();<</script>><<script>>advanceTime(15);<</script>><</link>><br> <</nobr>><div class="dev-canvas-info"><strong>Canvas:</strong> Unpacking <span style="opacity:0.7;">(story_unpacking)</span> | <strong>Node:</strong> One Suitcase</div> <p>The room is small. Single bed, desk for homework, closet that won't fit much. The window faces the backyard — she can see the creek from here.</p><div style="border:2px dashed #666;padding:20px;margin:10px 0;border-radius:8px;background:#f5f5f5;"><p style="margin:0;font-weight:bold;color:#333;">[IMAGE MISSING] story/story_unpacking.jpg</p><div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=young+woman+small+bedroom+suitcase+bed+unpacking+evening&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_unpacking.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 young woman small bedroom suitcase bed unpacking evening</a><a href="https://www.google.com/search?q=woman+unpacking+suitcase+bedroom+single+bed+lamp&amp;_tmc_game=output&amp;_tmc_scene=story%2Fstory_unpacking.jpg" target="_blank" style="display:inline-block;margin:4px 8px 4px 0;padding:6px 12px;background:#3b82f6;color:white;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:13px;">🔍 woman unpacking suitcase bedroom single bed lamp</a></div></div><p>She sets the suitcase on the bed. Unzips it. Everything she owns for the next two months.</p><p>Hoodie. Jeans. The good sundress — why did she pack that? Three t-shirts. Shorts. Sleep clothes. Underwear she shoves into the drawer without looking.</p><p>Through the wall: the scratch of pencil on paper. <<print $npcs["b762e174-a7cf-4eb4-8093-b43b959b319b"].name>>'s room. She can hear him drawing.</p><p>Down the hall: the TV, low volume. <<print $npcs["dde22ac5-2ef0-49d7-8a91-08489160dfdc"].name>> watching something.</p><p>Downstairs: dishes. <<print $npcs["6a399a5c-35a2-4da4-a10a-b05cbfdcefd5"].name>> cleaning up alone.</p><p><em>The mattress smells like someone else's laundry detergent. The pillow is too soft. The walls are too thin.</em></p><p><em>Home for fifty-six days.</em></p> <<set $game_state.current_canvas = "9ed5a417-9ced-4713-b5ab-f0349c3bf922">> <<set $game_state.current_node = "7f5fbb6d-2f0d-413c-817d-f9514e664af1">> <<script>>setup.markCanvasTriggered("9ed5a417-9ced-4713-b5ab-f0349c3bf922");<</script>> <<script>>var vn = State.variables.game_state.visited_nodes;if class="activity-group"> <strong>You're Never Around</strong> <div class="tier-buttons"> <span class="canvas-item" data-canvas-id="story_ryan_catches"> <span class="approval-badge pending">·</span> <<button "T10">><<goto "CanvasReview_story_ryan_catches">><</button>> </span> </div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "Back to Game">><<goto "Navigation">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="opening_arrival" data-game-name="output"> <h2>One Suitcase</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>opening_arrival</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Taxi</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The taxi smells like pine air freshener and someone else&#x27;s cigarettes. Forty minutes from campus. She&#x27;s counted every mile.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/opening_arrival_taxi.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Three weeks ago: the call from housing. Water damage. Dorm condemned. Four hundred dollars in her account and nowhere to go.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Mom&#x27;s voice on the phone, Dubai static crackling: &#x27;@diana said you can stay with @frank. His boys are there but they&#x27;re good boys. It&#x27;s just until I&#x27;m back. Fifty-six days.&#x27;</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank. Mom&#x27;s husband. Met him at the wedding — twice. Firm handshake, didn&#x27;t talk much. A contractor with a property outside town.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His sons: @ryan, 23 — something about construction, trucks, the gym. @jake, 20 — art student, quiet, draws. She&#x27;s never met either of them.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Three men. One bathroom. Thin walls. Fifty-six days.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The taxi turns onto gravel.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Here we go.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The House</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Gravel crunching under tires. The taxi driver doesn&#x27;t get out — just pops the trunk and waits. One suitcase. She&#x27;d packed light on purpose, like packing light might make this temporary.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The house is bigger than she remembered from the wedding. Clapboard siding, a wraparound porch with paint peeling at the edges. The workshop out back. Fields beyond that. No neighbors close enough to wave at.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/opening_arrival_the_drive.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The front door opens before she knocks.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Kitchen. @frank is at the stove. Sleeves rolled. The smell of garlic and something burning slightly. @jake is at the table with his sketchbook — he stands when she walks in, awkward, adjusts his glasses.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You must be exhausted. Dinner&#x27;s in ten.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Firm handshake. Calloused hand that swallows hers. He&#x27;s bigger than she remembered. Steady dark eyes that don&#x27;t blink.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A door slams somewhere in the house. Boots on hardwood. @ryan fills the hallway doorframe — tank top, arms that don&#x27;t fit, cocky grin already loaded.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> So you&#x27;re the new roommate.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He looks at her like she&#x27;s a new piece of furniture. Interesting. Temporary.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake hasn&#x27;t said a word. He smiled, looked at his shoes, and went back to drawing. His pencil hasn&#x27;t stopped moving since she walked in.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Fifty-six days. I can do fifty-six days.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Nice to meet everyone.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Where&#x27;s my room?&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="utility_buy_groceries" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Buy Groceries</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>utility_buy_groceries</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The General Store</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>General store. Fluorescent lights, linoleum floors. The kind of place that sells everything and specializes in nothing.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/utility_buy_groceries.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She grabs a basket. Eggs, bread, pasta, chicken, vegetables. The basics.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Buy groceries ($15)</li><li>Just browsing.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="utility_buy_gym_pass" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Gym Pass</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>utility_buy_gym_pass</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Front Desk</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Gym front desk. A signup sheet and a bored attendant.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/utility_buy_gym_pass.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>$30 for a 30-day pass. @ryan is already at the bench press — he raises an eyebrow when he sees her at the counter.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pay $30. Get the pass.</li><li>Not today.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="utility_buy_art_supplies" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Art Supplies</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>utility_buy_art_supplies</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Back Aisle</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>General store. Art supplies in the back — charcoal sticks, heavyweight paper, blending stumps. The good stuff @jake uses.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/utility_buy_art_supplies.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>$60. She can feel the number in her stomach. But campus assignments need materials. And @jake&#x27;s face when she brings her own sketchbook...</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Buy them. $60.</li><li>Not today.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_workshop_frank" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Workshop Help</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_workshop_frank</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Workshop</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Workshop. Sawdust, tool pegboard, the hum of the compressor. @frank is building something. He could use an extra pair of hands.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_workshop_frank.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Help without being asked.</li><li>&quot;What do you need?&quot;</li><li>Work in silence together.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_late_night_frank" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Late-Night Kitchen</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_late_night_frank</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: 2 AM</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Kitchen. Past midnight. @frank at the table. Whiskey. Lamp light. The glass across from him is already poured.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He knew I&#x27;d come down.*</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Listen. Let him fill the silence.</li><li>Ask the question he&#x27;s avoiding.</li><li>Move your chair closer.</li><li>Touch his hand.</li><li>Under the table.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Whiskey Mouth</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her hand covers his on the table. He doesn&#x27;t pull away. Her pinkie traces his knuckle.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She leans across the table. The whiskey glass tips. Neither catches it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_late_night_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He tastes like whiskey and something underneath — the taste of a man who&#x27;s been sitting alone at 2 AM for months. His hand finally moves. Finds her jaw. Holds it like he&#x27;s been wanting to for weeks.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The kitchen clock ticks. Upstairs, nothing moves. The house sleeps while they don&#x27;t.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Good night, Frank.&quot; Leave him wanting.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Below the Whiskey</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She slides from her chair. Under the kitchen table. The wood is cold against her knees.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank looks down. His face — disbelief, then something darker. His hand finds the edge of the table. Grips.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_late_night_handjob.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She finds him. Already hard. He won&#x27;t make a sound — the boys are upstairs. His breathing comes through his nose, measured, controlled. His knuckles on the table are white.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The whiskey glass trembles. His whole body trembles. He finishes without a word. Just his eyes closing.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She climbs back into her chair. Picks up her glass. Drinks like nothing happened.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You should go to bed.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He means it this time. He also doesn&#x27;t. She can still hear both.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Good night, Frank.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_cooking_frank" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Cooking Dinner</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_cooking_frank</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Kitchen</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Kitchen. @frank at the stove. Sleeves rolled. Garlic and something simmering. He nods at the cutting board without looking up.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_cooking_frank.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pick up the knife.</li><li>Set the table instead.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Side by Side</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Side by side at the counter. Chopping, stirring, reaching past each other. The kitchen is small — their elbows brush.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He talks about Diana&#x27;s old recipes. His voice softens when he says her mom&#x27;s name.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Ask about Diana.</li><li>Focus on the food. Work in rhythm.</li><li>Reach past him for the skillet.</li><li>&quot;Don&#x27;t move.&quot;</li><li>The counter.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Garlic and Guilt</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s stirring. She says it from behind him. Two words. He freezes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She turns him by the shoulder. The spatula clatters on the counter. His mouth tastes like the sauce he was testing — garlic, wine, something bitter underneath.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_cooking_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The kiss lasts three seconds. He pulls back. Checks the doorway. Nobody.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> The sauce is burning.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>It&#x27;s not burning. He just needs something to say that isn&#x27;t what he&#x27;s feeling.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Save the sauce.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Butcher Block</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The counter. Butcher block. His back against the edge. Her hand finds him through the apron.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His grip tightens on the counter behind him. His breathing stays measured — counted — even as his hips betray him.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_cooking_counter.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The stove hisses. Something is actually burning now. Neither of them moves to fix it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>When it&#x27;s over, he straightens his shirt. Turns back to the stove. Fixes the sauce.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Dinner in five.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Set the table. Act normal.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_bookkeeping_frank" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Bookkeeping</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_bookkeeping_frank</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Office</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Office. Invoices, receipts, the amber desk lamp. Leather and old paper.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_bookkeeping.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Do the books. Efficiently. Correctly.</li><li>Ask about the client who&#x27;s late on payment.</li><li>Let the silence stretch. Watch him work.</li><li>Reach past him for the ledger.</li><li>Move higher.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Charged Silence</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She puts down the pen. Looks at him. Doesn&#x27;t say anything.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank is writing in the ledger. He feels her looking. His pen slows. Stops.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The clock ticks. The ledger page is still open to receivables but nobody is reading numbers anymore.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Coffee. His. Black. Getting cold.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Say what you mean, Frank.&quot;</li><li>Pick up the pen. Get back to work.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Ledger Excuse</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She reaches past him for the ledger. Her arm crosses his chest. Their faces six inches apart.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He doesn&#x27;t move. His jaw tightens. The pen in his hand hasn&#x27;t moved in three minutes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She closes the gap. The kiss is fast — his mouth tastes like black coffee and restraint. His hand grips the edge of the desk. Not her. The desk.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_bookkeeping_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He pulls back. Eyes closed for one second. Opens them.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Page forty-two.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Like nothing happened. Except his hand is shaking.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Go back to the numbers.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Below the Ledger</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Under the desk. The ledger is still open. His hand grips the edge of the oak — knuckles white.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She found him. Through the fabric first, then the zipper. He didn&#x27;t stop her. That&#x27;s how she knows the dam broke.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_bookkeeping_handjob.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s thick. Warm. His jaw clenches — he won&#x27;t make a sound. Control, even now. She strokes him slowly. His breathing changes — measured, deliberate, like he&#x27;s counting.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The pen in his other hand hasn&#x27;t moved in three minutes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>When he finishes, his eyes close. Just for a moment. Then he opens them. Looks at her. Says nothing.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Page forty-two.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She&#x27;s never felt more powerful in her life.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pick up the pen.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_creek_ryan" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Creek Swimming (Ryan)</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_creek_ryan</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Race</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Creek. @ryan strips his shirt. &#x27;Last one in&#x27;s a coward.&#x27;</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s already running. Splash. Cold water. She can hear his laugh bouncing off the trees.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_creek_ryan.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Race him to the rock.</li><li>Try to keep up. (She&#x27;ll lose.)</li><li>&quot;Raise: loser tells a secret.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_job_site" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Job Site</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_job_site</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Work</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Workshop. Sawdust and motor oil. @ryan puts her to work — holding boards, sorting nails, sweeping.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A heavy board needs moving. He could do it alone.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_job_site.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Help him lift it.</li><li>Solve the measurement problem instead.</li><li>Keep sweeping.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_tv_couch" data-game-name="output"> <h2>TV on the Couch</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_tv_couch</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Couch</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Living room. TV on — something @ryan picked. Blue glow. The leather couch fits three if nobody cares about personal space.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The cushion between them is either a buffer or a bridge.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_tv_couch.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Watch the show.</li><li>Comment on the show. Make him laugh.</li><li>Remove the cushion between you.</li><li>Lean into him.</li><li>Kiss him.</li><li>Under the blanket.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: No Buffer</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Cushion gone. Their legs almost touching. The TV is background noise.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He doesn&#x27;t look at her. But his leg shifts. Closes the gap by an inch.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Let her knee touch his.</li><li>Just sit close. Comfortable silence.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Blue Light</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The TV casts blue light across his face. She leans across the cushion gap. His eyes widen for half a second — then he meets her halfway.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_tv_couch_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His hand finds the back of her neck. The TV plays to an empty audience.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pull back before someone walks in.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Under Cover</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The throw blanket from the arm of the couch. She drapes it over their laps. His eyebrows go up. Then the grin.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her hand finds him under the blanket. The TV is loud enough to cover the sound of his breathing. Barely.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_tv_couch_blanket.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank could walk through at any moment. The danger is the point.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Finish before anyone comes.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_gym_ryan" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Gym Workout</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_gym_ryan</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Gym</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Gym. Free weights. @ryan is already at the bench press — his altar.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_gym_ryan.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Treadmill. Solo.</li><li>Work out near him.</li><li>&quot;Spot me.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Side by Side</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Side by side. He demonstrates form — his hands adjust her stance. Professional. Charged.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Match my set. Ten reps.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Match his set.</li><li>Try. Fail at eight.</li><li>&quot;Add five more. If I win, you buy protein shakes.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Hands Close</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She spots him. He spots her. Hands near each other&#x27;s bodies — functional, necessary. Professional.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His fingers brush her ribcage adjusting her grip. Neither acknowledges it.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Focus on form.</li><li>Hold longer than necessary.</li><li>&quot;Locker hallway. Now.&quot;</li><li>&quot;The shower.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Between Locker Rooms</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The hallway between locker rooms. Narrow. Fluorescent buzz overhead. Nobody here at this hour.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She grabs his tank top. Pulls. He lets himself be pulled — @ryan, who never lets anyone pull him anywhere.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_gym_ryan_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He tastes like sweat and protein powder. His hands grip her waist — not gentle, but not rough. Somewhere between workout and worship.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Anyone could walk in.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Hot Water</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The shower stall. Steam. The water is too hot and neither of them adjusts it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His back against the tile. Her hand finds him through the water. He groans — the sound bounces off every surface in the empty locker room.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_gym_ryan_shower.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>&quot;If someone comes in—&quot; She doesn&#x27;t finish. He doesn&#x27;t care.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Finish what she started.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_truck_ryan" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Truck Ride</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_truck_ryan</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Truck</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Pine air freshener and whatever @ryan wore to the job site. I need supplies.&quot;</li><li>&quot;The creek.&quot;</li><li>Challenge: &quot;Bet you can&#x27;t name three songs on this station.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Pull over.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Don&#x27;t tell me to stop.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Nowhere</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>No destination. He drives slow. The road unwinds through fields. Something&#x27;s on his mind.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The radio is off. Wind through the open windows. She waits.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;You don&#x27;t have to talk.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Tell me about the scar. The real story.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Dare</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His grin snaps into place. He LOVES this.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You&#x27;re on. If I win, you owe me a beer.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Name them. (Try to win.)</li><li>&quot;Raise: if I win, you tell me about the scar.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Gravel and Silence</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He pulls over. Gravel under tires. Engine off. The radio dies mid-song.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> C&#x27;mere.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>One word. His hand behind her neck, pulling her across the bench seat. He tastes like mint gum and adrenaline. His stubble scrapes her chin.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_truck_ryan_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She grabs his collar. The truck lurches — his foot slipped off the brake.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Took you long enough.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;I didn&#x27;t do anything.&quot;</li><li>Kiss him harder.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Gearshift</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Parked by the creek. Engine off. Windows fogged from the inside.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His hand is on the gearshift. Her hand covers his. Moves it. Higher.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Fuck.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>One word. All breath. She grips him — firm, fast, no hesitation. His hand slams the truck ceiling.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_truck_ryan_handjob.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He finishes with a groan that fogs the windshield. Chest heaving. Then the grin comes back.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Your turn?</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Maybe next time.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Definitely.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_creek_jake" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Creek Swimming (Jake)</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_creek_jake</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Water</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Creek. @jake on the bank with his sketchbook. She wades in. The water is cold — her toes go numb, then her calves adjust.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He draws. She floats. The only sound is water over stones and the scratch of his pencil.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_creek_jake.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Float on her back. Let him draw.</li><li>Swim to the deeper part.</li><li>&quot;Come in.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_park_jake" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Park Sketching</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_park_jake</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Bench</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Park bench. @jake&#x27;s sketching the pond — the way light moves on water. She sits next to him. Close enough to see the page.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_park_jake.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Peaceful. Public. Nobody from the house watching.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Watch him draw.</li><li>Bring your own sketchbook.</li><li>Lean against his shoulder.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_library_jake" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Library Studying</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_library_jake</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Carrel</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Library basement. Low ceilings, fluorescent buzz. @jake at a study carrel, books spread open. He looks up when she sits down next to him.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_library_jake.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Side by side. Textbooks and sketchbooks. He explains composition theory — the rule of thirds, negative space, why Vermeer&#x27;s light feels alive.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Listen and learn.</li><li>Help him with his art history essay.</li><li>Close the textbook. Talk about something real.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_wall_knocking" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Wall Knocking</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_wall_knocking</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Tap-Tap</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Night. Through the wall: tap-tap. The familiar rhythm. Their ritual.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Knock back.</li><li>Open his door.</li><li>Silence.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Through the Wall</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She knocks back. Tap-tap.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Through the plaster: his voice, muffled. &#x27;You up?&#x27;</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>They talk. About nothing. About everything. The wall between them makes honesty easier — no eye contact, no body language. Just voices and thin plaster.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Tell him about her day.</li><li>Ask what he&#x27;s drawing.</li><li>&quot;I wish this wall wasn&#x27;t here.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Good night, Jake.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: His Room</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She opens his door. He looks up from the sketchbook. Not surprised — he was hoping.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The room smells like graphite and clean laundry. Desk lamp on. The walls covered in drawings she&#x27;s seen a hundred times and one she hasn&#x27;t.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Sit on the floor next to him.</li><li>Sit on his bed.</li><li>Kiss him.</li><li>Pull him to the bed.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Through the Dark</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The desk lamp clicks off. The room goes dark except for the moonlight through the curtain.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She finds his face in the dark. His glasses are on the desk. Without them, his eyes are softer. Closer.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The kiss is different at night. Slower. No art between them. No excuse. Just mouths and the sound of breathing through the wall that used to separate them.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_wall_knocking_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Stay a little longer.</li><li>&quot;Good night, Jake.&quot; Go back through the wall.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Narrow Bed</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The bed is too narrow for two people. They make it work.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His hands are uncertain in the dark. She guides them. He makes a sound against her neck — quiet, like he&#x27;s trying not to let it through the wall.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_wall_knocking_intimate.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*The wall is thin. @ryan might hear. @frank might hear. The whole house might hear.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I don&#x27;t care.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Stay until his breathing slows.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="activity_drawing_jake" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Drawing Session</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>activity_drawing_jake</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Room</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Afternoon light through @jake&#x27;s window. Graphite and clean laundry. He&#x27;s set up — sketchbook open, pencils arranged by grade.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_drawing_jake_base.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He looks up. The smile is automatic — his face decided before his brain caught up.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I was just— sit anywhere. The light&#x27;s good today.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Sit down. Hold still.</li><li>&quot;I&#x27;ll come back later.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Drawing</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The scratch of charcoal on paper. His hand moving with a certainty his voice never has.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Ask about what he&#x27;s drawing.</li><li>Adjust your pose to help the composition.</li><li>&quot;Can I see?&quot; Look over his shoulder.</li><li>Hold still and watch his eyes.</li><li>&quot;Come here.&quot;</li><li>Guide his hand.</li><li>Kneel by his chair.</li><li>&quot;Stay tonight.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: What He&#x27;s Drawing</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She leans over his shoulder. Her hair brushes his neck. He goes very still.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The drawing. Her jawline. Her hands. Details she didn&#x27;t know he&#x27;d noticed — the chip in her thumbnail, the freckle below her ear.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He sees things nobody else sees. Small things. True things.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;It&#x27;s beautiful, Jake.&quot; Be specific.</li><li>&quot;Sign it. I want to keep this one.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: His Eyes</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She watches him watching her. Neither blinks.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Then stop concentrating.&quot;</li><li>Look away first. Let him win.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Pencil Drops</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She says it quietly. Two words. He sets the pencil down like it weighs nothing and everything.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He crosses the room. His glasses bump her forehead — he pulls back, embarrassed — and she closes the gap.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_drawing_jake_kiss.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His mouth is soft. He tastes like graphite and coffee he drinks too sweet. His hand finds her jaw, holds it like he&#x27;s positioning a portrait. The sketchbook slides to the floor. Neither of them picks it up.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pull him closer.</li><li>Pull back. &quot;We shouldn&#x27;t.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Not the Sketchbook</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His pencil is shaking. Has been for twenty minutes. She knows why.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her hand finds his. The pencil drops. She guides his hand — not to the sketchbook. He makes a sound. Small. Surprised. His glasses fog.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_drawing_jake_handjob.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She wraps her fingers around him. Gentle. He shakes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>player:</strong> Is this okay?</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He nods. Can&#x27;t speak. She moves her hand. Slow. His hips lift off the chair without him deciding. The sketchbook slides to the floor.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He comes quietly — a shudder, his forehead against her shoulder. His hand finds her waist and just holds on.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I drew you a hundred times. This is better.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Hold him.</li><li>&quot;Draw me again tomorrow.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Below the Sketchbook</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She slides off the edge of his bed. Kneels by his chair. His eyes go wide behind the glasses.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You don&#x27;t have to—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She does. His hand finds her hair — not pushing, not guiding. Just resting. Like he needs to hold something or he&#x27;ll float away.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_drawing_jake_oral.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His other hand grips the arm of the chair. Knuckles white. His breathing is the only sound in the room besides the clock.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>When it&#x27;s over, he pulls her up. Into the chair with him. It&#x27;s not built for two but neither of them cares.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Stay in the chair with him.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Drawing Can Wait</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The sketchbook is on the floor. The pencils are scattered. The afternoon light makes everything gold.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He undresses her slowly. Reverently. Like he&#x27;s unwrapping something he&#x27;s been drawing from memory for weeks. His hands shake but they know exactly where to go.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/activity_drawing_jake_sex.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She pulls him down to the narrow bed. It creaks — the wall is thin, @ryan&#x27;s room is next door, and neither of them cares.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s gentle. Careful. His forehead against hers, glasses abandoned on the desk. Every movement is slow, like he&#x27;s memorizing it for later.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Afterward, he traces her collarbone with his fingertip. The same line he&#x27;s drawn a hundred times. But this time, it&#x27;s real.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I love you. I drew you again. I always draw you.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;I know.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="utility_diner" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Diner Shift</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>utility_diner</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Shift</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Vinyl booths. Coffee that&#x27;s been sitting too long. The bell on the door. Five hours on her feet.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/utility_diner.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She pours, she carries, she smiles. The tips are better when she smiles. The tips are better since she started caring about how she looks.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="utility_cleaning" data-game-name="output"> <h2>House Cleaning</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>utility_cleaning</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Cleaning</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Mop. Scrub. Dust. The house is old and it shows — every surface collects something. Wood shavings from the workshop tracked through the hallway. @ryan&#x27;s boot prints. @jake&#x27;s eraser shavings.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Three hours. Her back aches. But the $20 is guaranteed and it doesn&#x27;t require anyone&#x27;s permission or presence.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="meal_dinner" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Dinner</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>meal_dinner</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Table</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Dinner. Five chairs at the table — @frank at the head, @ryan and @jake on opposite sides, Lily between worlds.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/meal_dinner.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Eat with everyone.</li><li>Sit next to @jake.</li><li>Sit across from @ryan.</li><li>Sit across from @ryan. Hold his gaze.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="meal_lunch" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Lunch</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>meal_lunch</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Midday</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Sandwich. The kitchen is empty — everyone else is working or gone. Quiet. Just the fridge hum.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/meal_lunch.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="meal_breakfast" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Breakfast</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>meal_breakfast</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Morning Table</h4> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Kitchen. Coffee maker still hissing. @frank at the head of the table, paper open. @ryan inhaling eggs.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/meal_breakfast.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Eat quietly.</li><li>Talk to @jake about his drawing.</li><li>Ask @ryan about his plans today.</li><li>Offer to pour @frank&#x27;s coffee.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_jake_evening" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Sketchbook</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_jake_evening</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Cover-Up</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake on the floor by the couch, sketchbook on his knees, TV casting light he isn&#x27;t watching. He&#x27;s drawing something. When she walks in, his hand flips the page.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_jake_evening.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Too slow. She caught a curve. A shoulder. Not a landscape.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;What are you drawing?&quot;</li><li>Just passing through.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_jake_lunch" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Ramen</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_jake_lunch</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Boiling Water</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake at the stove, reading the back of a ramen packet like it&#x27;s literature. The water is already boiling over.
