He hasn&#x27;t noticed.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_jake_lunch.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Want help?&quot;</li><li>Leave him to it.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_jake_breakfast" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Soggy Cereal</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_jake_breakfast</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Napkin</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake at the table. Earbuds in, cereal getting soggy, drawing on a napkin with a stub of pencil. He doesn&#x27;t look up when she enters.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_jake_breakfast.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Then he does. Quick. Back to the napkin. The pencil moves faster.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Sit across from him.</li><li>Just coffee.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_ryan_afternoon" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Couch</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_ryan_afternoon</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Dead Weight</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan on the couch, boots off, arm behind his head. Half-watching TV, half-napping. The couch sags under him like it&#x27;s given up.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_ryan_afternoon.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He cracks one eye open when she walks in. Doesn&#x27;t sit up.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Sit down.</li><li>Leave him.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_ryan_lunch" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Leftovers</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_ryan_lunch</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Fridge Door Open</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan standing with the fridge open, staring into it like it owes him money. He takes up most of the kitchen just by existing. Pulls out three containers, sniffs each one, puts two back.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_ryan_lunch.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Eat together.</li><li>&quot;I&#x27;ll eat later.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_ryan_morning" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Protein Shake</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_ryan_morning</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Before Coffee</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan at the counter. Shirtless — he&#x27;s always shirtless before 7 AM. Scratching his stomach, scrolling his phone, protein shake blending loud enough to wake the dead.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_ryan_morning.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He looks up. The grin loads automatically.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Don&#x27;t drink the shake. You&#x27;ll puke.</blockquote></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Morning.&quot;</li><li>Grab something and go.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_frank_workshop_pm" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Afternoon Work</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_frank_workshop_pm</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Sawdust</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank sanding a cabinet door. Sawdust in the air, catching the light from the high windows. Sleeves rolled past the elbow. Radio playing something old and country. He works like nobody&#x27;s watching — and he&#x27;s better at it that way.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_frank_workshop_pm.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Watch him work.</li><li>Leave him to it.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_frank_whiskey" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Nightcap</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_frank_whiskey</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Lamp</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Living room. One lamp. @frank on the couch, whiskey glass balanced on the armrest, TV on so low it&#x27;s just moving light. He looks tired in a way that has nothing to do with the day.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_frank_whiskey.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He sees her in the doorway. Doesn&#x27;t straighten up. Doesn&#x27;t hide the glass.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Sit down.</li><li>&quot;Good night.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_frank_lunch" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Lunch Break</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_frank_lunch</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Standing Lunch</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank at the counter, sleeves rolled, assembling sandwiches with the same precision he uses on a table saw. He slides one toward her without asking. Turkey. Extra mustard. He remembered.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_frank_lunch.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Eat together.</li><li>Take it to her room.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_frank_coffee" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Morning Coffee</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_frank_coffee</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Before Dawn</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Kitchen. The sky outside is still dark. @frank is at the table — newspaper flat, coffee black, reading glasses she&#x27;s never seen him wear anywhere else. He nods when she walks in. Doesn&#x27;t talk before his second cup.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_frank_coffee.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The coffee maker is still warm. The only sound is him turning pages.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pour a cup. Sit with him.</li><li>Grab coffee and go.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_ryan_shower_evening" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Occupied</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_ryan_shower_evening</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Post-Workout</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She needs the bathroom. The door is cracked. @ryan&#x27;s sweaty gym clothes are on the floor in a heap. Steam everywhere.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_ryan_shower_evening.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She&#x27;ll use the bathroom later.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_jake_shower" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Occupied</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_jake_shower</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Steam</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She opens the bathroom door. The shower curtain is drawn, water running. @jake&#x27;s glasses are folded neatly on the sink beside a worn paperback.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_jake_shower.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She backs out so carefully the door doesn&#x27;t make a sound. Her heart does, though.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_ryan_shower_morning" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Occupied</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_ryan_shower_morning</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Steam</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The bathroom door is ajar. Steam curling into the hallway. She pushes it open without thinking.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_ryan_shower_morning.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Her hand is still on the doorknob. She forgot how to let go.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="ambient_frank_shower" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Occupied</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>ambient_frank_shower</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Steam</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She pushes the bathroom door. It swings open — the latch catches on nothing. Steam billows out. The shower is running.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/ambient_frank_shower.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She stands there for three full seconds before her brain reconnects to her legs.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="event_street_encounter" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Alley</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>event_street_encounter</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Shortcut</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The alley between the hardware store and the laundromat. A shortcut. She&#x27;s used it before.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/event_street_encounter.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Halfway through — movement. Against the brick wall. Two people. His hand in her hair, her leg hooked around his hip. The sounds are unmistakable.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She should turn around. Walk the long way. Her feet don&#x27;t move.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She watches. Five seconds. Ten. The woman&#x27;s head falls back against the brick. The man&#x27;s hand slides up her thigh.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Fifteen seconds. She counted again. Just like the phone.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She walks back the way she came. Her face is hot. Her hands are shaking. But not from fear.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="event_door_cracked" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Not Quite Closed</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>event_door_cracked</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Gap</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Morning. She&#x27;s changing. The door isn&#x27;t latched — it drifts open two inches. She notices. Reaches for the handle.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/event_door_cracked.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her hand stops.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A shadow moves in the hallway. Footsteps slow, then stop. Someone is standing just outside the gap.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She looks at the door latch. It works fine. Always has.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_sleep_less" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Less Clothes</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_sleep_less</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Thin Shirt</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She opens the drawer. The oversized sleep shirt — the thin one. Cotton so worn it&#x27;s almost translucent. No bra. She pulls it on. It barely reaches mid-thigh.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_sleep_less.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The bathroom is down the hall. She opens the door. Bare feet on hardwood. The hallway is dark but the bathroom light is on — someone just left it.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She could have worn the long pajamas. She chose this.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="event_overhear_jake" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Through the Wall</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>event_overhear_jake</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Through the Wall</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Past midnight. The house is quiet except for the creek outside and the refrigerator hum downstairs.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/event_overhear_jake.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Then — through the wall. @jake&#x27;s bed. A rhythmic creak. Slow at first. His breathing, ragged, muffled like his face is in the pillow.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A groan. Low. Stifled. And then her name. Barely a whisper. But she hears it. She hears it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She lies perfectly still. Hand on the sheet. Knuckles white. Heart slamming against her ribs.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The creaking stops. A long exhale through the wall. Then silence. She doesn&#x27;t move for twenty minutes.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="event_yoga_stare" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Eyes On You</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>event_yoga_stare</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Stare</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Halfway through a downward dog, the floorboard behind her creaks.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/event_yoga_stare.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*She holds the pose. Doesn&#x27;t adjust her shorts. Doesn&#x27;t pull down her top.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_tv_channels" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Watch TV</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_tv_channels</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Channel 1 — News</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She drops onto the couch, grabs the remote. The TV flickers on.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_tv_channels.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Weather. Traffic. A segment about property taxes. Her eyes glaze.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Change channel.</li><li>Turn it off.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Channel 2 — Cooking Show</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A chef is doing something aggressive to a chicken. Studio audience laughs at nothing.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_tv_cooking.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Change channel.</li><li>Turn it off.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Channel 3 — Action Movie</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Car chase. Explosion. The lead actor says something that&#x27;s supposed to be witty. She&#x27;s seen this one. Twice.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_tv_movie.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Change channel.</li><li>Keep watching.</li><li>Turn it off.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Channel 4 — Sports</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Two teams she doesn&#x27;t recognize doing something with a ball. The commentator is yelling like someone died. The crowd agrees.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_tv_sports.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Change channel.</li><li>Turn it off.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Channel 5</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The screen changes. Soft focus. Low music. Two bodies, tangled, moving together. Not acting.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_tv_adult.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She should change it. Her thumb is on the button. She doesn&#x27;t press it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The sounds fill the living room. She turns the volume down — not off. Down.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Anyone could walk in. The hallway is right there.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Change channel.</li><li>Keep watching.</li><li>Turn it off.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_rest" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Rest</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_rest</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Winding Down</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She falls back on the bed, phone balanced on her chest. The ceiling fan ticks. Somewhere in the house, dishes clink — someone&#x27;s cleaning up after dinner.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_rest.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She scrolls past nothing. Puts the phone down. Picks it up. Puts it down again. The window is open and the evening air smells like cut grass and the creek.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Two hours of just... existing. No one asking anything. No one watching.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_sleep" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Sleep</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_sleep</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Lights Out</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She clicks the lamp off. The room goes blue — moonlight through the window, the backyard silver and still.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_sleep.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Through the wall, @jake&#x27;s pencil scratches paper. Down the hall, the TV murmurs — @ryan watching something with the volume low. The floorboards creak once near @frank&#x27;s office, then nothing.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*The house breathes. She breathes with it.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_stargazing" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Stargazing</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_stargazing</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Stars</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The porch. No light pollution out here — the sky is absurd. More stars than she&#x27;s ever seen.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_stargazing.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The house hums behind her. Kitchen light. Someone&#x27;s still up. She doesn&#x27;t go inside.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_journal" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Journal</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_journal</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Writing</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The notebook Mom gave her before Dubai. She writes. Not about the house — about herself. Who she was. Who she&#x27;s becoming.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_journal.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The words come easier now than they did on day one.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_grooming" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Self-Care</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_grooming</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Mirror Time</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Shower. Steam fills the bathroom — the lock doesn&#x27;t catch but she&#x27;s learned to wedge a towel under the door.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_grooming.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Skincare. The stuff she brought from the dorm. Her face in the mirror looks different than it did eight weeks ago. Sharper. More aware of being looked at.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_campus" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Campus Classes</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_campus</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Art History</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Brick buildings. North-facing windows. The professor talks about Caravaggio&#x27;s use of light — chiaroscuro, the dramatic contrast between dark and light.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She takes notes. Thinks about the lamp in @frank&#x27;s office. The way it casts everything in amber. Chiaroscuro.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_campus.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_jog_park" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Jogging (Park)</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_jog_park</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Trail Run</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The park trail loops around the pond. Shade from oaks. Nobody here on weekday mornings — just her and the ducks.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_jog_park.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She runs until her lungs burn. Then walks. Then runs again.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_jog_property" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Jogging (Property)</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_jog_property</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Morning Run</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Early morning. The grass is still wet. She runs loops around the property — past the workshop, along the tree line, back to the porch.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_jog_property.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The air smells like dew and cut wood. From the workshop window, @frank&#x27;s silhouette. He&#x27;s already working.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="solo_yoga" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Yoga</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>solo_yoga</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Yoga</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She rolls out an imaginary mat on the bedroom floor. Stretches, breathes, tries to quiet her head.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The floor creaks. Through the wall, @jake&#x27;s pencil stops — then starts again.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/activities/solo_yoga.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_jake_pencil_drops" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Pencil Drops</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_jake_pencil_drops</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: He Can&#x27;t Draw</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She&#x27;s bare. He&#x27;s been drawing for forty minutes. The golden hour is ending — the light shifting from warm to amber to something that makes skin glow.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_jake_pencil_drops.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s drawing her hip. The curve where it meets her thigh. His pencil traces the line on paper. His eyes trace the same line on her body.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His hand slows. The pencil stops moving but stays on the page. He&#x27;s not drawing. He&#x27;s staring. At the real thing, not the paper.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His breathing has changed. She can hear it from across the room.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I can&#x27;t— I can&#x27;t draw right now.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The pencil drops. Rolls off the desk edge. Falls to the floor. The sound is small — wood on hardwood — but it fills the room.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Neither of them picks it up.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*The artist disappeared. What&#x27;s left is a boy holding nothing, looking at me like I&#x27;m the only real thing in the room. Like the drawings were practice for this moment and now the practice is over.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Then don&#x27;t draw.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Don&#x27;t stop. Keep drawing.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Then Don&#x27;t Draw</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She reaches for his hand. The one that was holding the pencil. Charcoal-stained fingers, shaking. She pulls it from the desk to her knee.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His fingers — warm, rough from graphite — on her skin. First time he&#x27;s touched the subject instead of drawing it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He crosses the room. His glasses bump her forehead — he pulls back, embarrassed — and she closes the gap.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His mouth is soft. He tastes like graphite and the coffee he drinks too sweet. His hand finds her jaw. Holds it like he&#x27;s positioning a portrait. But this isn&#x27;t a portrait. This is her mouth and his mouth and the sketchbook sliding off the bed and neither of them reaching for it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He drew me a hundred times. Hands, face, body, bare. Every line was practice for touching me. And now his hand is on my jaw and the pencil is on the floor and the drawing can&#x27;t hold him anymore.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pull him closer.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Keep Drawing</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She stays still. He picks up the pencil.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>But his hand doesn&#x27;t go to the paper.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>It goes to her hip. The charcoal tip traces the line he was drawing — on her skin instead of paper. Collarbone. Ribcage. The curve of her waist. He&#x27;s drawing ON her.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The charcoal is cool on her skin. His breathing changes. Hers changes. The line he draws follows the same path his eyes have been tracing for weeks — but now the paper is her body and the distance is zero.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Hold still.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>But his voice is different now. Not the artist&#x27;s instruction. Something lower. Something that makes her stomach pull.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He&#x27;s drawing on me. The art and the body are the same thing now. His hand on my skin and the charcoal leaving lines and I can feel every one like a sentence he can&#x27;t say out loud.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Don&#x27;t stop.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_drawing_milestone_5" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Without Anything</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_drawing_milestone_5</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Everything</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She takes off the shirt without being asked. Folds it on the chair. Sits on the edge of his bed in the afternoon light.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_drawing_milestone_5.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake&#x27;s hand doesn&#x27;t shake anymore. That&#x27;s new. He looks at her the way he looked at the creek at sunset — like he&#x27;s memorizing something that won&#x27;t stay.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Don&#x27;t move. This is... you&#x27;re perfect.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The pencil moves. Steady. Sure. The shy boy who couldn&#x27;t finish sentences draws her like he was born to.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He&#x27;s not shaking. He&#x27;s not blushing. He&#x27;s just drawing me like I&#x27;m the most important thing he&#x27;s ever seen. And I&#x27;m sitting here bare and I don&#x27;t feel naked. I feel seen.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_drawing_milestone_4" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Strap</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_drawing_milestone_4</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Lower</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s drawing her shoulder. The strap keeps slipping — it&#x27;s been slipping for twenty minutes and neither of them has fixed it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_drawing_milestone_4.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> The strap is casting a shadow. Can you—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He doesn&#x27;t finish. She lowers it herself. His pencil stops. Starts again. Slower.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The room is very quiet. Just charcoal on paper and his breathing, which has changed.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He asked me to lower it. He&#x27;ll never say what he actually wants — he&#x27;ll frame it as art. And I&#x27;ll let him. Because it IS art. And because it isn&#x27;t.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_drawing_milestone_3" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Pose That Changed</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_drawing_milestone_3</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Different Now</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She looks at the latest drawing. It&#x27;s different from the first one — the hands drawing was careful, respectful. This one is intimate. The way her collar falls. The shadow on her collarbone. The look in her eyes that she didn&#x27;t know she was making.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_drawing_milestone_3.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> They&#x27;re getting better. Or you&#x27;re getting more comfortable. I can&#x27;t tell which.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Both. It&#x27;s both.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_drawing_milestone_1" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Finished Drawing</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_drawing_milestone_1</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Finished</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake sets down the pencil. Looks at the page. Then at her. Then back at the page.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_drawing_milestone_1.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> It&#x27;s done.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He turns the sketchbook toward her. Her hands — every line, every shadow. The chip in her thumbnail. The freckle below her ear.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He finished it. The first one. He&#x27;s already looking at a blank page like he&#x27;s planning the next.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_final_week" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Seven Days</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_final_week</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Last Week</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Seven days.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_final_week.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The number is in the sidebar. She&#x27;s been watching it shrink for weeks but it never felt real until now.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The house is different. Charged. Everyone knows the timer is running.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Seven days. Everything I&#x27;ve built — routines, relationships, whatever this is — has an expiration date.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Every conversation from now on is a last conversation. Every touch might be the final one.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_moms_return" data-game-name="output"> <h2>She's Coming Home</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_moms_return</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Call</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her phone rings during dinner. Mom.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_moms_return.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She excuses herself. The kitchen goes quiet behind her — @frank&#x27;s fork stops, @ryan watches her leave, @jake&#x27;s pencil pauses.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Honey, I&#x27;m coming home. Next week. I booked the flight.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The words land in her stomach like cold water.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She hangs up. Sits on the bed. The countdown in the sidebar just became real.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*One week. She&#x27;ll walk through that door and see... what? Who am I now?*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She goes back to the kitchen. Tells them.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank sets down his fork. Carefully.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan leans back. Looks at the ceiling.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake&#x27;s pencil snaps.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_franks_arrangement" data-game-name="output"> <h2>I'll Cover Everything</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_franks_arrangement</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Offer</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Evening. @frank asks her to come to the office. The door closes. The lock clicks.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s not behind the desk. He&#x27;s standing by the window. Looking out at the dark yard.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I know you&#x27;re struggling with money.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Not a question. He&#x27;s been doing the books. He knows exactly how much she has.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_franks_offer_the_office.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> In exchange, you stay. Late nights. The office. Whatever I need help with.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>&quot;Help with.&quot; They both know what that means. The words are doing a job the truth won&#x27;t do.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He&#x27;s offering to save me. The price is him. Or maybe the price is me.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Deal.&quot;</li><li>&quot;I don&#x27;t need your money.&quot;</li><li>&quot;I&#x27;ll help with the business. As a partner, not a favor.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Deal</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>One word. She watches it land on him.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Relief. Hunger. Guilt. All three cross his face in two seconds.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Starting tonight.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He sits behind the desk. His chair. Her chair. The positions set.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I sold something. I&#x27;m not sure what yet. But the math works now. The math finally works.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Refusal</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His eyebrows lift. Genuine surprise. He wasn&#x27;t expecting no.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You can barely afford—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>player:</strong> I&#x27;ll figure it out. I always do.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He looks at her. Really looks. Not at the girl who cleans his house or does his books. At a person who just chose difficulty over comfort.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> ...Alright.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The ellipsis is audible. Something shifted. He sees her differently now — not a transaction, not a responsibility. A person.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*The money&#x27;s still impossible. But I&#x27;m still mine.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Partnership</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He blinks. That wasn&#x27;t one of the options he&#x27;d prepared for.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> A partner.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>player:</strong> I&#x27;m good with numbers. You said so yourself. Let me help with the real books. Not the cleaned-up version — the real ones. I&#x27;ll earn my keep, but as a partner, not a...</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She doesn&#x27;t finish. They both know what she didn&#x27;t say.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank sits down. Leans back. Studies her with those steady dark eyes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Fifty a session instead of twenty-five. I&#x27;ll cover the bus pass. The rest you earn.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He extends his hand across the desk. A handshake. Like the first day — but this time, neither of them lets go quickly enough.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Business partners. In a room with a locked door. At night. Sure, Frank. Business partners.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_financial_crisis" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Bounce</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_financial_crisis</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Red Numbers</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her phone buzzes. Bank notification. Mom&#x27;s transfer: returned. Insufficient funds on the sending end.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She stares at the number. $47. In three days: bus pass due ($80). Art supplies overdue ($60). Phone bill overdue ($45).</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Total needed: $185. She has $47.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I can&#x27;t call her. She doesn&#x27;t have it either. The exchange rate, the timing — it&#x27;s not her fault. But the math doesn&#x27;t care whose fault it is.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_financial_crisis_the_bounce.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>At dinner, @frank mentions the food contribution. Not aggressive — the weight of it. He&#x27;s been covering more than he should. The business that&#x27;s $40,000 in debt, covering a girl who can&#x27;t afford $50.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Something has to give. Something already has.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pick up extra diner shifts. Work harder.</li><li>Call Mom. Ask her to try again.</li><li>Wait. Something will come up. It has to.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_brothers_discover" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Hallway</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_brothers_discover</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: No More Secrets</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Night. She opens @jake&#x27;s door. Steps into the hallway.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan is standing three feet away. Leaning against the wall. Arms crossed. He&#x27;s been waiting.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Late night art class?</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His voice is quiet. No grin. The humor stripped out.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Behind her, @jake appears in his doorway. Sees @ryan. Freezes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_brothers_discover_discovery.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Both of us?</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake&#x27;s face crumbles. @ryan&#x27;s jaw tightens. The hallway is four feet wide and it&#x27;s the smallest space in the world.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*This is it. This is the moment everything breaks.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;It&#x27;s none of your business.&quot;</li><li>&quot;Please don&#x27;t fight.&quot;</li><li>(Say nothing. Walk away.)</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: None of Your Business</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Both brothers stare at her. The silence is loud.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan uncrosses his arms. Not angry — stunned. Nobody talks to Ryan like that.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake looks at his feet. Then at her. Something in his eyes shifts — fear to something else. Admiration, maybe.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I didn&#x27;t know you had that in you.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She walks between them. Doesn&#x27;t touch either one. Goes to her room. Closes the door.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Through the wall: silence. Then @ryan&#x27;s boots going downstairs. Then @jake&#x27;s door closing. Nobody fights tonight.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I don&#x27;t belong to either of them. They needed to hear it. I needed to say it.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Please Don&#x27;t Fight</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her voice cracks. Both brothers look at her instead of each other.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake&#x27;s hand finds the doorframe. Holding on.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan takes a step back. Unclenches his fists. He didn&#x27;t know they were clenched.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Nobody&#x27;s fighting.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A lie. But a necessary one. The hallway breathes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake goes back inside. Closes his door. Quietly.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@ryan stands there a moment longer. Looks at her. Then walks downstairs. She hears the front door open and close. His truck starts.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*Fragile peace. Everyone pretending. But nobody bled.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Walk Away</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She turns. Walks to her room. Doesn&#x27;t look back.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Behind her: silence. Then voices. Low at first.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Through her closed door: @ryan&#x27;s voice getting louder. @jake&#x27;s getting quieter. A thud. Something falls off a shelf.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You little—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Another thud.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Don&#x27;t—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Boots on the stairs.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> ENOUGH.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Silence. The kind that comes after something breaks.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She lies in bed. Through the wall: @jake crying. Trying not to. Failing.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I walked away. I let them fight. I don&#x27;t know if that makes me smart or a coward.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: location</em></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_jake_repair" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Drawing Under the Door</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_jake_repair</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Apology</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Something under her door. A sheet of paper slid through the gap.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_jake_repair.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Not her. Not a portrait. Not a body.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her coffee mug. The one she uses every morning. Drawn from memory — the chip on the rim, the way the light hits the ceramic. A detail only someone who watches her constantly would notice.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>No signature. No note. The drawing IS the apology.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Go to his room. Sit with him.</li><li>Slide a note back. &quot;Draw me something new.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_frank_repair" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Come In</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_frank_repair</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Three Days Later</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Three days of cold dinners. @frank eating in the workshop. Clipped sentences. &#x27;Miss Chen&#x27; instead of &#x27;Lily.&#x27;</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The office door has been locked every day. No bookkeeping. No amber lamplight. Just silence and the sound of him drinking alone.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She knocks. First time she&#x27;s knocked instead of walking in.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Come in.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Two words. An opening.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s behind the desk. Unshaven. Eyes red. The whiskey bottle is on the shelf — not the desk. He put it away before she knocked. Trying.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She doesn&#x27;t sit across from him. She walks around the desk. Sits in the chair beside his. Same side. First time.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He doesn&#x27;t tell her to move.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_frank_repair_repair.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Tell me what happened.&quot;</li><li>Sit in silence with him. Let the quiet do the work.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_frank_crisis" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Call</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_frank_crisis</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Miss Chen</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She arrives for bookkeeping. The office door is locked. Not closed — locked. First time.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_frank_crisis.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Through the wood: a drawer slamming. A bottle on the desk. @frank&#x27;s voice — low, tight, the one she&#x27;s never heard.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> What do you mean the payment&#x27;s not coming?</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Silence. Then his chair scraping the floor. Pacing. She can feel the floorboards through her shoes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The door opens. He sees her in the hallway. His face: white. The controlled mask with a crack running through the center.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> No bookkeeping today, Miss Chen.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Miss Chen. Not Lily. The wall is back up. He closes the door.</p></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="review-block block-other"></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Frank—&quot;</li><li>Wait in the hallway. Listen to the silence.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_jake_sex" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Truth</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_jake_sex</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: No More Pretense</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Drawing session. But nobody&#x27;s drawn anything in twenty minutes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_jake_sex.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The sketchbook is open. The pencils are out. The pretense is set up and neither of them is using it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She&#x27;s on his bed. He&#x27;s in his chair. Afternoon light turning gold. The same room. The same positions. Everything the same except nothing is.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She looks at him.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>player:</strong> I want to fuck you.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Three seconds. His glasses. His shaking hands. The sketchbook slides off the desk and hits the floor.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He crosses the room.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The narrow bed. It creaks. The wall is thin — @ryan&#x27;s room is right there. Neither of them cares.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s gentle. Careful. His forehead against hers, glasses abandoned on the desk. Every movement is slow, like he&#x27;s memorizing it for a drawing he&#x27;ll never make.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Afterward, he traces her collarbone with his fingertip. The same line he&#x27;s drawn a hundred times. But this time it&#x27;s real.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> I love you. I drew you again. I always draw you.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*No art metaphor. No pretense. No pencil between us. Just his body and mine and the truth we ran out of ways to avoid.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Stay.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_jake_blowjob" data-game-name="output"> <h2>You Deserve This</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_jake_blowjob</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Three Pieces</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She walks in. @jake is at his desk. A letter open in front of him. He&#x27;s smiling — not the nervous smile. The real one.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_jake_blowjob.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> They said yes. Three pieces. The creek, the hands, and—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He stops. The third piece is of her. The portrait she posed for. The one she told him to submit.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Three pieces. My first show.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His first exhibition. The boy who couldn&#x27;t finish a sentence when she arrived just got his art on a wall. Because she told him it was good enough. Because she sat still while he drew.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She&#x27;s proud of him. Not the way you&#x27;re proud of a child. The way you&#x27;re proud of someone who worked for something real and got it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She kneels by his chair.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>player:</strong> You deserve this.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> You don&#x27;t have to—</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She does. His hand finds her hair — not pushing, not guiding. Just resting. Like he needs to hold something or he&#x27;ll float away.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His other hand grips the arm of the chair. Knuckles white. The acceptance letter flutters off the desk. Neither reaches for it.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He earned this. Not just the show — this. Every drawing, every hour of holding still, every line he traced on paper and on my skin. This is what &#x27;you deserve this&#x27; feels like.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;I know.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_frank_wine_night" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Wine</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_frank_wine_night</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Bottle</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She doesn&#x27;t bring paperwork. She brings wine.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_frank_wine_night.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Knocks on the office door. Late. The house is asleep.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>player:</strong> You look like you need this more than I do.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@frank looks at the bottle. Then at her. The controlled face — calculating, measuring, deciding. Then something loosens behind his eyes.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He opens it without a word.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>They don&#x27;t sit at the desk. Not tonight. The floor. Backs against the bookshelf. Wine between them. The amber lamp casts everything in gold.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Pour. Sit. Listen.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Floor</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He talks. Really talks. Not the clipped @frank sentences. The underneath ones.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Diana. How she looked the morning she left for Dubai. How she kissed him at the airport like she was already gone. The mortgage payment he&#x27;s missed twice. The client who owes eight thousand and won&#x27;t return calls.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The wine goes down. His voice gets lower. Rougher. The control slipping with every sip.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She&#x27;s close. Her knee against his thigh. The bookshelf behind them. The lamp above.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She&#x27;s been teasing this man for weeks. No bra in the kitchen. The short shorts mopping. The skirt on bookkeeping days. Crossing and uncrossing her legs while he tried to read receivables. All deliberate. All to see if the controlled man would crack.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She looks down.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He&#x27;s hard. Straining against his jeans. Not because of anything she did tonight — because of everything she&#x27;s done for a month.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>He doesn&#x27;t know she noticed. Or maybe he does and he&#x27;s praying she won&#x27;t say anything.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I&#x27;ve been giving him those for weeks. In the kitchen. In the office. Every time I reached for the top shelf or crossed my legs or wore the sleep shirt downstairs. All for him. All to see that exact reaction.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*This time I&#x27;m not going to walk away smiling.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Put your hand on his thigh.</li><li>Pour more wine. Let it build.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Lily</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her hand on his thigh. He stops talking mid-sentence. The word dies in his mouth.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She doesn&#x27;t move it away. She moves it higher.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His breath catches. His eyes close. The controlled man — the one who runs the house, reads the numbers, says &#x27;Miss Chen&#x27; when he&#x27;s angry — makes a sound he&#x27;s never made in front of anyone.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She strokes him through the denim first. Feeling the shape of him. He grips the wine bottle like it&#x27;s the only solid thing in the room.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Then the zipper. He doesn&#x27;t stop her. His head falls back against the bookshelf. A book shifts behind him. Neither of them cares.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His hand finds her wrist — not to stop her. To hold on. His fingers wrap around her forearm like she&#x27;s an anchor.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>When it&#x27;s over, he opens his eyes. Looks at her. The mask is gone. Not cracked — removed. He took it off.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Lily.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Not Miss Chen. Lily. First time since the crisis.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*The game was fun. The teasing, the watching him try not to look. But this isn&#x27;t the game anymore. This is the man underneath it. And he said my name like it&#x27;s the only word he knows.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;Say it again.&quot;</li><li>Clean him up. Don&#x27;t say a word. Let the silence hold.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_escalation_ryan" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Gearshift</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_escalation_ryan</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: Higher</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Parked by the creek. Engine off. The windows are fogged from the inside.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>They&#x27;ve been kissing. His hand is on the gearshift between them — has been since they parked. But his fingers are tracing circles on the vinyl. Getting closer.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> Tell me to stop and I&#x27;ll stop.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His voice is different. Lower. The performance stripped away.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_first_flirtation_ryan_truck_flirt.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>His hand moves from the gearshift. To her knee. Higher.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He&#x27;s asking. Ryan is actually asking.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>Don&#x27;t tell him to stop.</li><li>&quot;Stop.&quot; Mean it.</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_escalation_jake" data-game-name="output"> <h2>The Complete Series</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_escalation_jake</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: All of It</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She walks into his room. The drawings are laid out on the bed. All of them. In order.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Her hands — the first one. The chip in her thumbnail, the freckle below her ear. Then her face. Her jawline in afternoon light. Then full figure by the window. Then the strap, lowered, collarbone exposed. Then bare. All of her, in charcoal, from the first sketch to the last.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A complete series. She&#x27;s never seen them together like this. Each one is a step — a step of trust, a step of skin, a step closer.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_first_flirtation_jake_charged_pose.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>@jake is standing by the window. Nervous. He laid them out on purpose. Wanted her to see them together.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-dialog"><blockquote><strong>npc:</strong> It&#x27;s you. All of it. I wanted you to see what I see.</blockquote></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She looks at the drawings. Then at him. The boy who couldn&#x27;t finish a sentence when she arrived just showed her every version of herself he&#x27;s been carrying in his head.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She crosses the room. Her hand finds him. Not the drawings. Him.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He gave me something nobody else ever has. He showed me what I look like when someone is paying attention. Every line. Every shadow. Every inch I gave him, given back in charcoal.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*I want to give him something back.*</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;You earned this.&quot;</li><li>&quot;They&#x27;re perfect. You&#x27;re perfect.&quot;</li></ul></div> </div> <div class="review-back-btn"> <<button "← Back to List">><<goto "CanvasReviewList">><</button>> </div> </div><div id="canvas-review-detail" data-canvas-id="story_franks_secret" data-game-name="output"> <h2>Forty Thousand</h2> <p class="canvas-id-display">Canvas ID: <code>story_franks_secret</code></p> <div class="review-node"> <h4>NODE: The Real Numbers</h4> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Bookkeeping. The usual — invoices, receivables, payroll. @frank is in the workshop. He left her alone with the books.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She opens the wrong drawer. Or maybe the right one.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>A second ledger. Not the one she works from — the one underneath. Different handwriting. @frank&#x27;s. The numbers are smaller, tighter, cramped with worry.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>Outstanding loans. Credit line maxed. Three clients who haven&#x27;t paid in six months. A mortgage payment circled in red with a question mark.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-image"><img src="./videos/story/story_franks_secret_the_ledger.jpg" style="max-width:100%;max-height:70vh;object-fit:contain;height:auto;border-radius:8px;" /></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>She does the math. The intelligence she&#x27;s built — campus classes, bookkeeping practice — makes the picture clear in seconds.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The business is $40,000 in debt. @frank has been hiding it. From @ryan, from @jake, from Diana.</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He can&#x27;t afford this house. He can&#x27;t afford his sons. He can&#x27;t afford the fifty dollars a week he&#x27;s charging me for food.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>*He&#x27;s drowning. And nobody knows but me.*</p></div> <div class="review-block review-block-paragraph"><p>The workshop door opens. Boots on gravel. He&#x27;s coming back.</p></div> <div class="exit-info"><em>Exit: choices</em><ul><li>&quot;I found something in the books, Frank.&quot;</li><li>Close the drawer. Put the ledger back.
